name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: New Year’s Resolutions for America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Time for renewal |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8eb22b6c7b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark FInchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Conservative running for Secretary of State in Arizona to secure our elections. I am the only candidate in the country that has personally worked on and developed groundbreaking watermarking technology for fool-proofing our ballot process!

_And I’m talking currency grade! We can get this done, folks. And we have to._

**That’s why I’m writing you today. To wish you a Happy New Year, and tell you about what I’ve been working on over the holidays:**

**_My New Year’s Resolutions for America._**
---
| **_Resolution #1: Remember what we are fighting for_**
If you’re anything like me, you know how hard it can be to think clearly and precisely when there is so much noise and clutter drowning out what really matters.

I spent a lot of time re-focusing on that over the holiday season, spending time with my family, and reflecting on what I really value in my life.

And when it comes down to it, there are really only three things for me: faith, family, and freedom.

**Now, the first two are personal, but the third is universal.**

_We are blessed beyond measure to have been born into the greatest country of all time, the United States of America, where freedom is a promise that is delivered._

**And recently, that promise is becoming more and more just that: a promise. And less and less something delivered.**

So, for my first New Year’s Resolution for America, let’s refocus on why we are proud to be Americans. Because we are the freest people on earth!

_No amount of doom and gloom can ever let us forget why we’re here in the first place._
**_Resolution #2: Let’s have the most secure elections yet!_**
Wow, this next one is tough, but its definitely doable. I worked all of last year developing waterproofing technology that is currency-grade that will make our elections as secure as the greenback.

**I have spent countless days talking with legislators around the country who want to bring this technology into their ballots and into their states.**

_If we can do this on a nationwide level, I have no doubt that we will have the most secure elections in 2022._

**But here’s the difficult part. We have the technology, now we just need nationwide adoptions. This takes enormous funding for petitions, ads, and getting the word out while the media silences us.**

_But this is very doable. I just can’t do it without your help. Help us get the word out on our currency-grade ballot protection technology!_
**_Resolution #3: Let’s set the stage for the greatest Conservative Renaissance in Decades!_**
This one’s exciting folks. I have a vision here that I just hope and pray will come true. And it will if Republicans around the country work hard enough.

**We are set up for a huge Republican wave that will take back the Congress and the Senate, statewide offices, and in 2024, the White House! If we do this thing right, we could have a huge majority.**

_And with state wide elected officials such as myself, and both legislative houses, and the White House all on the same page, we can set the stage for Conservative legislation and policy that will stand the test of time._

**We will build a huge wall around Conservative policy that can’t just be undone by the next Democrat’s signature. We will build and reinstall Conservative policy into the _BEDROCK_ of America.**

And no Democrat, no liberal, no here-today-gone-tomorrow radical will undermine that which it really means to be an American. To be Free and to love those Freedoms, not to look for every opportunity to throw America under the bus. [These are very attainable New Year’s Resolutions, but I cannot do it without your help! ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7fe17be267&e=44b8c466b0)

**This is the year, this is 2022, and this is what we are fighting for. We can win, but we have big goals ahead of us.**

[**_Please donate as much as you can, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more, to make sure that we have the New Year that Republicans have been dreaming about for decades._**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bdac1b55ab&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4c00e587a9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9f5a39b853&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=489240c8bb&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Help Expose Dr. Fauci

body:
He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American,

I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

_**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**_

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018!

_When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people._

18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison.

_We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide!_

[**Take a stand to help me EXPOSE FAUCI >>>**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=19ca598bb9f54afe888c489d9efa91c1&_e=9ae2LduVYntWCzhzWIDWsfSHMWfBR9_LuBWvmzqq6dVMVvqanfAmo3V8gEG5bBNPq6LibzZFbaFA1XqptJBnu7FZEquHuzLMFgNtsls4r3R81DspiPPkV_COAoiGOmvsnk9pUNQo_SQSMkUsgKSmO7o_7hZK5BdfF_S9SPJCJz9S-Ib5Ij_dqU0YXt-01-ZO1upfG-jNLUNy4-18vAqAyQApqDZom8QlHBu_2DX34XFtV6NX_6eV1AuYa30H5-emOMpJzO8DGLQYf3NZcytHtpq-NspJviumwajps0QzQrtQQzhGpcJQvQ22hyEjloXtiYP3y7ganbHNksYOC6BPxYjFSGyxpCOmqVKgqBeHeI8EAyCAjcgE4bT-LspRsG6qyLP0z6wFunduUmSyngcZ68AWi_EsXvwMLEx7niL2CqhGdTjLMKIIw0zl_wbb6fzXHmzasI9MLazWKA_0OeGuwg%3D%3D)

And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018! When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people. 18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison. We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide! This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus. Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... I WILL NOT STOP fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: And now Dr. Fauci says he supports new vaccine mandates and other onerous COIVD-19 restrictions on our freedoms- such as showing proof of vaccination to get on an airplane or even visit a private home! Dr. Fauci needs to go. YES – I Support Ted Cruz: Expose & Prosecute Fauci! If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Mike=20Van=20Someren?=
subject: Can you join us Thursday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Join us for a demonstration to mark one year since the January 6th insurrection | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7c868c9a50df/i-am-running-for-congress-8702942?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=43cdb6d2a1&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hi there,

We wanted to make sure you saw Mike’s invitation for you to **join us this Thursday, the one-year anniversary of the Capitol Insurrection, for an outdoor demonstration at 5:30 PM outside the Waukesha Dems office. **

There will be events all over the country commemorating the anniversary and we hope you can join us for our event in downtown Waukesha. Mike will also be unveiling a plan to help restore our democracy. You can find more information about the event below.

We hope to see you there,

Team Mike Van Someren for Congress.

_**Please Note:** we encourage you to join us for the outdoor program, but attendance for the indoor portion will be restricted due to Covid-19. Masks must be worn by all attendees at all times and social distancing will be enforced as we follow public health guidelines to keep us all safe. _
---
|
---
| Folks,

**January 6th is the one-year anniversary of the darkest day of our democracy’s recent history. **

It’s the day that Donald Trump and his allies like Scott Fitzgerald, then a brand-new Congressman whose first substantive vote was to overturn a lawful election, empowered and encouraged a group to storm the United States Capitol in an attempted coup.

That day demonstrated to all of us just how far our fragile democracy has been eroded, and how critical it is that we protect it.

**That’s why I’m inviting you to join us on the anniversary of the Capitol Insurrection on Thursday, January 6th at 5:30 PM, at the Waukesha Dems office, as I roll out a comprehensive plan to restore and strengthen our Democracy. **
---
|
---
| Join us as Mike rolls out his plan on **RESTORING OUR DEMOCRACY**
on the anniversary of the insurrection

**_THURSDAY, JANUARY 6TH_
5:30 pm | **Outdoor flag waving
**6:00 pm |** Indoor program*

[**WAUKESHA DEMS OFFICE**
336 Wisconsin Ave,
Waukesha, WI 53186](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=1bf017b17d&e=356c0699dd)

* Indoor attendance will be limited to ensure social distancing. All attendees must be vaccinated and remain masked at all times they are indoors.

---
|
---
| **Our democracy is not set in stone. It’s fragile, and the events of the last four years have brought it dangerously close to its breaking point. **

Doing nothing is no longer an option. It’s past time for us to stand up and take our democracy back.

I hope you can join me on the 6th as I roll out my comprehensive plan to do just that.

I’ll see you then,

Mike Van Someren
---
| | | Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
---
| | | | | | [](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=7f2daf3fcf&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | [](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=dcb6cac9b2&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | [](www.MikeVanSomeren.com)
---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
Mike Van Someren for WIPO Box 366Pewaukee, WI 53072
[Add us to your address book](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=31c9df9df4)

You can [update your preferences](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=31c9df9df4&e=356c0699dd&c=00defbc4cf) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=31c9df9df4&e=356c0699dd&c=00defbc4cf).

Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: 12/31/2021 To: < > Friend, I emailed you. My son, Don, emailed you. Kimberly Guilfoyle emailed you. Team Trump emailed you. And now I 'm emailing you, again. We have a CRITICAL FEC-mandated End-of-Year deadline coming up, and each day when I ask my team who has stepped up, they've never mentioned your name. Why is that, Friend? You've always been a strong ally in the past and this just isn't like you. In a time when Joe Biden is FAILING our Country, your support is needed now more than ever. Today is the FINAL day to contribute towards our goal, so I 've decided to GO BIG and INCREASE your 700%-IMPACT offer to 800%! This offer expires at midnight tonight, Friend. This is your last chance, Friend. Next time I ask my team for an update on who contributed towards our FEC End-of-Year goal, I want to hear your name. Thank you, Donald J. Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that he would "shut down the virus."
But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing.
Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there "is no federal solution to COVID" and it is now "up to the states to figure things out."
What a difference a year makes, Friend.

But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing. Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there "is no federal solution to COVID" and it is now "up to the states to figure things out." What a difference a year makes, Friend. Back in August, Biden told me to "get out of the way" if I wouldn't go along with his administration's authoritarian, lockdown COVID policies, guided by Dr. Fauci and his (political) "science." Now, after months of repeated policy failures and a new variant, Joe Biden has finally admitted that his central campaign promise of "shutting down the virus" was a lie. Fortunately, I never caved to Biden's ineffective and authoritarian government lockdowns and mandates in Florida. Instead, we've preserved individual liberty and freedom, kept businesses and schools open, and protected the livelihoods of our workers. And we did all of that while providing information, vaccines, and treatments to Floridians so they could make informed decisions that work best for their families. When the going got tough, Joe ran back to his basement. This isn't leadership. It's a systemic failure of the entire Biden administration and it deserves to be held accountable AND called out. That's why I'm running for reelection to ensure Biden's lockdowns and mandates never come to Florida. Thank you for stepping up and helping us continue the fight. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "CONTRIBUTE" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: You are Officially FIRED!
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=1)
---
Peter \-- You are officially fired for not rolling up your sleeve and getting the vaccine. Pack up your things and leave this building! Can you imagine your boss telling you that nonsense for a vaccine that doesn't stop you from getting or spreading COVID? Well, thousands of Mayo health care workers received that message yesterday when they were terminated.
## And Governor Walz and Crony Establishment Politicians are doing NOTHING about it!
Listen, you might be next. Even if your employment is safe, the authoritarians want vaccine passports and more control over YOUR life. And don't forget, the President of the United States is continuing forward with his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandates. But there is something YOU can do to STOP vaccine mandates and End Emergency Powers for good.
## Watch this:
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=2) People think we can't win in politics. The forces against us are TOO big. But we were able to End Walz' Emergency Powers. And we can Stop Vaccine Mandates and pass the Never Again Bill with your help. **_Which is why I need you to[commit to going](https://www.action4liberty.com/commit_to_caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=3) to your precinct caucus on February 1st._** We also MUST pass Stop Vaccine Mandate legislation to save our jobs and our way of life from these authoritarians. Politicians need to see that there are consequences for attacking our health freedoms. These important issues can quickly be catapulted to the top of politics in this state but ONLY if you attend your precinct caucus on February 1st. You see, [Mayo Clinics just fired thousands of health care workers](https://www.action4liberty.com/mayo_fires_nurses_staff_for_not_getting_the_jab_playing_politics_over_science?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=4) for refusing to take part in a mass vaccination experiment against their wishes. During the largest health care worker shortage of our generation, Mayo decided to delve into the politics, instead of following actual science or ethical business practices. It's not difficult to understand why a health care worker would refuse to take part in the experimental jab that has no long term data on risks. Vaccines should all be measured from a risk vs reward viewpoint - and the rewards of the vaccines become less clear by the day. The jab does not prevent a person from getting or spreading the disease. What was once called a "breakthrough case", has become common place. Even Governor Walz himself recently got COVID despite his constant mask wearing and triple vaxxed status. **Furthermore, natural immunity offers far superior protection against COVID than the vaccines according to a[study conducted in Israel](https://www.action4liberty.com/mayo_fires_nurses_staff_for_not_getting_the_jab_playing_politics_over_science?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=5). ** The risks of the vaccines are concerning, but few understand them since government, Big Tech and the Medical Establishment does everything possible to silence and censor any information that shines a bad light on the vaccines. In a [recent podcast with Joe Rogan](https://www.action4liberty.com/mrna_vaccine_inventor_dr_robert_malone_discusses_vaccine_problems_with_rogan?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=6), Dr. Robert Malone (a developer of mRNA vaccine technology) explained the issues with the vaccines which include unexpected spread to ovaries in women and myocarditis in young men. There's no doubt a lot of forces against us. Big Tech censorship, the Medical Establishment's blockade of therapeutics and the Government's mandates are REAL THREATS. But WE CAN BEAT them all! **If you, me and the other hundred thousand Action 4 Liberty supporters show up on February 1st, politicians will be FORCED to make the Never Again Bill and Stopping Vaccine mandates a priority!**
## But only if we show up!
Watch my video by clicking the link. Learn how you can quickly make an impact in Minnesota politics. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=7 "LEARN ABOUT THE CAUCUS") [LEARN ABOUT THE CAUCUS](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=7)
---
If **you would like to help more** , we continue building our team of young liberty professionals who fight everyday on your behalf. My field team is making thousands of calls a day right now and traveling the state hosting events.
[**Make a donation of $100, $50 or even $25 to equip us with the resources to expand our message and DEFEAT the COVID Cultist agenda!**](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_to_reach_more?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=8)
**In Liberty,**
****
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty
1920 Oakcrest Ave #5
Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=you_are_officially_fired&n=11), software for leaders.

clean_body: He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Peter, I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct. He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history. I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China. And now, we have 221 pages of records obtained by Judicial Watch through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit that provide DAMNING new evidence, including a grant application for research involving the coronavirus that was submitted back in 2018! When Fauci lied to Congress, he lied to the American people. 18 USC 1001 makes this a felony, punishable by up to 5 years in prison. We need to know the FULL EXTENT of what Fauci is attempting to hide! This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus. Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... I WILL NOT STOP fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: And now Dr. Fauci says he supports new vaccine mandates and other onerous COIVD-19 restrictions on our freedoms- such as showing proof of vaccination to get on an airplane or even visit a private home! Dr. Fauci needs to go. YES – I Support Ted Cruz: Expose & Prosecute Fauci! If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! clean_body: Background on record seizures of fentanyl at the border [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [==] More Fentanyl Seized At U.S. Borders Than Heroin For First Time In U.S. History [==] Source: Daily Wire [==] For the first time in U.S. history, more fentanyl than heroin has been intercepted by federal law enforcement at the country’s borders. Fentany is now the leading killer of American adults ages 18-45, causing more deaths than suicide, COVID-19, and car accidents. [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 05/09/17 Corruption and the Increasing Opioid Epidemic [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Mexican drug cartels continue to grow and harvest poppies, but now, like the Chinese, they can also get their hands on precursor chemicals and create fentanyl in their own labs. The direct threat to American lives and communities could not be any graver. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [==] 12/07/21 Sinaloa Cartel Ring Busted in U.S. 1,400 Miles from its Mexican Headquarters [==] Source: Judicial Watch [==] Around 110,000 counterfeit fentanyl pills were confiscated, along with 11.5 kilograms of cocaine, six kilograms of methamphetamine, 8.5 pounds of heroin, 28 firearms, three hand grenades, multiple high-capacity magazines including one 200-round drum magazine, armor piercing ammunition, body armor with rifle rated ballistic armor plats and $450,000 in U.S. [13x13x1] [==] READ MORE [==] [180x150x3] [] 03/04/21 Mexican Cartels Overcome Pandemic to Remain Greatest Criminal Drug Threat to U.S. [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Synthetic opioids, primarily illicitly manufactured fentanyl, appear to be the primary driver of the increases in overdose deaths. The DEA discloses that Mexican cartels have established clandestine laboratories in Mexico for the synthesis of fentanyl, and Mexican authorities have encountered a rise in illegal fentanyl pill press and tableting operations. name: Election Integrity Update
subject: ICYMI: Republicans recruit historic number of poll workers
body:
Our efforts are making headlines!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- In case you missed it, the media is taking notice of Republicans’ historic poll worker recruitment effort. The Cambridge News-Deerfield Independent [**reported**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=e-UjA-660R8Hds5jlcKMx3vXtpUsNu-WJp6QXnH2uWIGmQnPS6w6gvAoqW7lgFdBvYSCQZTWtJFnXxGc0bC1ClMiWZQC5yJVxfUzR_Oayb3bqLvd8LckPSpCW59VHg5T&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=2) that in Dane County alone, more Republicans will be serving at the polls than ever – representing just one area of our work alongside grassroots activists that resulted in around 5,000 poll workers recruited statewide. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=e-UjA-660R8Hds5jlcKMx3vXtpUsNu-WJp6QXnH2uWIGmQnPS6w6gvAoqW7lgFdBvYSCQZTWtJFnXxGc0bC1ClMiWZQC5yJVxfUzR_Oayb3bqLvd8LckPSpCW59VHg5T&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=3) According to the story: _Election workers with ties to the Republican Party will have a greater presence at local polls this year and next._ _Dane County saw a five-fold increase in Republican Party-affiliated poll worker applicants for the 2022-2023 election cycle, according to county party leadership._ _..._ _Mark Jefferson, executive director of the Republican Party of Wisconsin, said in an interview that its statewide recruiting did uptick in advance of the Nov. 30 deadline to submit names, with a resulting statewide increase in applications._ _In the end, he said about 5,000 people affiliated with the Republican Party applied to be poll workers in Wisconsin for the 2022-23 election cycle. He said about one-third of those applied through the state party’s website and their names were forwarded to their county parties, that are statutorily the ones responsible for submitting lists of names to municipalities._ _The Democratic Party of Wisconsin did not respond to repeated emails on whether it had seen a similar statewide increase in recruiting and interest among its members.___ Poll workers are the first line of defense for election integrity, so recruiting poll workers is a priority as we work to ensure free, fair, and secure elections. Thank you to our grassroots activists and county party leaders for partnering with us on this successful initiative!__ While the statutory deadline for county parties to submit poll workers has passed, some local clerks may take new applicants on a rolling basis. If you are interested in becoming a poll worker to help ensure election integrity in your community, you can sign up on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0R_kNr4x5AW03jFWL_9dJJI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=4). To read about the Republican Party of Wisconsin’s ongoing election integrity efforts, visit our Election Integrity Dashboard [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eH7mQqnwg7TiRkzkxQsBEjYN0qYIVr_dl05xpqOQV0I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=5). \- Team WisGOP | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXbvFQ2shsBAdMWxLdWEVpdm1jb0pfmlzmPcGBa3bUWbK&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=6 "CONTRIBUTE TO OUR ELECTION REFORM FUND") [CONTRIBUTE TO OUR ELECTION REFORM FUND](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDV0-ridujlNJmRGsRDe0xHXbvFQ2shsBAdMWxLdWEVpdm1jb0pfmlzmPcGBa3bUWbK&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=6)
---
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=7).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=8) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=poll_worker_icymi_v3&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Joe Knopp
subject: I’m Joe Knopp: Christian, Husband, and Father
body:
The DeWine Administration is “UnPlanned”
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMtSxCAQ_BpyS4pAyOOQw-q6XvSil9ULxSsJayCRELf274UYPVgFA3TPNDMt25I3skx0iyBCMIcE4nhkUuREqJrDpiawKSpQQJNdtHHKMiF0JiaTDKGIqbJrMIakwkXNSYO4xJyHC6nKmiRjO3g_LwAfADqFtSixOpVdtXVKRpGA7ZJpN7m0n76Us5MLsFHKp5dJpR92mmeAT6s31CipVwPwURmmR4DKCC7T6oQKoBUjZWYedXfbKRGeTPc2kGHAPEd5lcZAtaFBm27aVAxOL14zS4d14cxKGnfH_KDcr9BkvbL-55OU4L7q8Bs_vwea2lHLQPwDBy3D3Menz_PrY5EnrpXzVY-jXspoZh_731zcG25BdQcQ2qoQ2gxDxe3w_DKQ20zSIJMyax4ih-5D9LdZ_SXuGtnuCgLV8RtveZdK)
---
| | Friend,

If I was your typical politician, I would start by bragging about my powerful friends and all the years I’ve been in government. But **I’m not a career politician** , I’m a Christian filmmaker.

A few years ago,I produced an anti-abortion movie called “UnPlanned.” After the last couple of years, that title seems to be more fitting to the DeWine administration.

DeWine wasn’t prepared nor did he plan an effective response to Covid. Instead he used it as an opportunity to punch down on ordinary citizens. Our pain was his pride.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkMFygyAQhp8GbziIoubgIa1JL-2h6aHtiSGAkVTAIjbj2xes7aEzsAz_v3zsrmjK806UiWowwhhliKA8HqngGeGyPqNdTdCuqECBdHpV2knDOFcptzrpm4KQqq5RzkIuZlgS3gnOUId4lpclzpOh6b0fJ5DvAT6GNUk-O5nelHFSREjQNiTsrIMX-yWdsS7IWkoPr1bCD2PHEeTH2WuqpVCzBnkrNVMDwGUUJzs7LoNo-ECZHgfVLZvFw5WpiwlmaDDLcFbBGKjSNLDpyqa8d2ryihnaz9OZGUHj7pjvpfsFWeOl8T-fwNNz-2qm9wMvgk3NoEQw_om9EqHv9vHz7eWhyBLXiPGmhkFNZRzmJda_TnEruAHVHcB4fYXxOjBcLPunU0-WkcCAgczoQ_TwfYh-GeVf4sZIt6lgULXffL6YUg)
---
| | Churches were non-essential. Your job was canceled. School was closed. Masks were mandated. More than a year later, DeWine still won’t loosen his grip on your freedom.

I vividly remember what it was like in the early days of the pandemic. As a father of 3, **I remember when the classroom was our living room.** As a Christian, I remember when DeWine asked churches to close. As a defender of the unborn, I remember how abortion clinics were labeled essential.

**The DeWine administration is as “UnPlanned” as it can get. **But guess what? Here’s one more thing they didn’t plan on doing - losing the election.

Please consider supporting the campaign today.

I look forward to meeting you all out on the road!

Sincerely,

Joe Knopp
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Ohio
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxNjk1PhDAQhn9NuS0p_QIOPayu60UvevHaTstS03YrhRj-vYWgMZnMxzszT14jhe6NqJwkmBDcYI7pVmoDDQfbadx3HPesRQyH-tOFyUYF4Gq4h2qUTFBNNfCBA4iuH4ShSlNmAKteABWVl-M8p4zoGZFriX-EuIC3S7ZBOb_hylaF5N2wli4vOsPk0uzuMZd5iYeiLaLX0ZmCvLx8fbw_s6aapEnfznuXxebz9kusDp5E7QMiZP8iZPdC2Hp-fRv5mvipYE4qhqdtRx5Lntdk_w4PRr373NT28gOTPWAq)
---

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Media Advisory: Vernon Jones Calls For A Federal Investigation of 2020 Ballot Harvesting and Trafficking
body:
There's A Dead Cat On The End Of That Line
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 5, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: [GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| |
---
PRESS CONFERENCE:VERNON JONES CALLS FOR A FEDERAL INVESTIGATION OF THE 2020 BALLOT HARVESTING & TRAFFICKING
---
| |
---
|
---
| ATLANTA, January 5, 2022\- Vernon Jones will hold a press conference on Wednesday, January 5th at The Georgia State Capitol in Atlanta to discuss the recent news that Georgia's Secretary of State is launching an investigation, including subpoenas into possible ballot harvesting and trafficking during the 2020 election.
Rep. Jones has been calling for the leaders in Georgia to look into the integrity of the 2020 elections, since November 4, 2020. He has been on the frontlines while others were on the sidelines. Jones has been a Champion for Georgia, fighting to get answers for what Georgians want to know; was every legal vote counted, and were any illegal votes counted? Voting is one of our most basic rights and at the forefront of our democracy, this is a bipartisan issue.
"I'm calling for a federal investigation, because the Georgia's Attorney General has compromised his independence by endorsing Brian Kemp's re-election and embracing his position of denial of any election fraud. We simply cannot trust the Attorney General." Vernon Jones

We invite you to join us on Wednesday to stand with Vernon Jones.
WHAT: Vernon Jones Press Conference WHEN: Wednesday, January 5, 2022 at 2:30PM WHERE:The Georgia State Capitol, South Wing on the Second Floor

[Just The News: Georgia Authorities Call for An Investigation of 2020 Elections](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGwOT24Y3oDmNHZ7h7Olx6O8jAcE8h2NInn7rV7jlEcPH0ooTH6_f9GGgdraElDQpbHN703myRsuRozTcoPxaY1NhrVTKnReVpHb2Tj84eystC2q-uxSQErRscUVDUXJsBfFQwVq9G9uBcbpDo_4TDm3evtErASR05uV3-jqtO90OEo5j3bbU8amoXf118t2K4QUJSAo4dmZFs_Uj6Duh_4g==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==)
---
|
Below are the Rules of the State Election Board Regarding Absentee Ballot Drop Off Boxes and links to the codes regarding who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. These rules were used in the 2020 General Election and the 2021 Runoffs.
---
|

RULES OF STATE ELECTION BOARD CHAPTER 183-1 GEORGIA ELECTION CODE SUBJECT 183-1-14 ABSENTEE VOTING TABLE OF CONTENTS 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (1) For the Elections held on June 9, 2020, County registrars are authorized to establish one or more drop box locations as a means for absentee by mail electors to deliver their ballots to the county registrars. Placing a voted absentee ballot into the drop box shall be deemed delivery pursuant to [O.C.G.A. § 21-2-385](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGBMY2RXkkskfLw3i2yHdWeHt0He-Wg7IbLA7SYfgXuE01NMJrIHKgv7FT_u4tR4MjFQR9sWM3QWu5W9gRRxcsHadGojtFIbcXL8uwiFXQaMVhHBK3Rx0SQGmnJNxUuuH5VM_odAipifq6sqy0xgeI7g==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGBMY2RXkkskfLw3i2yHdWeHt0He-Wg7IbLA7SYfgXuE01NMJrIHKgv7FT_u4tR4MjFQR9sWM3QWu5W9gRRxcsHadGojtFIbcXL8uwiFXQaMVhHBK3Rx0SQGmnJNxUuuH5VM_odAipifq6sqy0xgeI7g==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==)and is subject to the limitations on who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. (2) A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public. (3) Drop box locations may open beginning 49 days before Election Day and shall close at 7:00 p.m. on Election Day. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Counties shall provide notice of the location of each drop box by posting such information on the home page of the county election website no later than the day the drop boxes are placed in a location. (4) Drop box locations must have adequate lighting and use a video recording device to monitor each drop box location. The video recording device must either continuously record the drop box location or use motion detection that records one frame, or more, per minute until detection of motion triggers continuous recording. (5) Video recordings of the drop box locations must be retained by the county registrars for 30 days after the final certification of the election, or until conclusion of any contest involving an election on the ballot in the county jurisdiction, whichever is later, and shall be made available to Secretary of State investigators upon request. (6) A drop box shall be constructed of durable material able to withstand vandalism and inclement weather. The opening slot of a drop box shall not allow ballots to be tampered with or removed and shall be designed to minimize the ability for liquid to be poured into the drop box or rain water to seep in. (7) A drop box shall be securely fastened to the ground or an immovable fixture. Page 1 of 2 (8) If the drop box utilizes a drop-slot into a building, the ballots must drop into a locked container, and both the drop-slot and the container must be monitored by video recording devices. (9) A drop box shall be clearly labeled "OFFICIAL ABSENTEE BALLOT DROP BOX". Each drop box location shall clearly display signage developed by the Secretary of State regarding Georgia law related to absentee ballot harvesting and destroying, defacing, or delaying delivery of ballots. (10) The county registrars must arrange for collection of the ballots from each drop box location at least once every 24 hours. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Collection of ballots from a drop box must be made by a team of at least two people. Any person collecting ballots from a drop box must have sworn an oath in the same form as the oath for poll officers set forth in O.C.G.A. § 21-2-95. The collection team shall complete and sign a ballot transfer form upon removing the ballots from the drop box, which shall include the date, time, location and number of ballots. The ballots from the drop box shall be immediately transported to the county registrar and processed and stored in the same manner as absentee ballots returned by mail are processed and stored. The county registrar or a designee thereof shall sign the ballot transfer form upon receipt of the ballots from the collection team. Authority: O.C.G.A. § 21-2-31

[O.C.G.A. § 21-2-385](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGBMY2RXkkskfLw3i2yHdWeHt0He-Wg7IbLA7SYfgXuE01NMJrIHKgv7FT_u4tR4MjFQR9sWM3QWu5W9gRRxcsHadGojtFIbcXL8uwiFXQaMVhHBK3Rx0SQGmnJNxUuuH5VM_odAipifq6sqy0xgeI7g==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGBMY2RXkkskfLw3i2yHdWeHt0He-Wg7IbLA7SYfgXuE01NMJrIHKgv7FT_u4tR4MjFQR9sWM3QWu5W9gRRxcsHadGojtFIbcXL8uwiFXQaMVhHBK3Rx0SQGmnJNxUuuH5VM_odAipifq6sqy0xgeI7g==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==)-(a) At any time after receiving an official absentee ballot, but before the day of the primary or election, except electors who are confined to a hospital on the day of the primary or election, the elector shall vote his or her absentee ballot, then fold the ballot and enclose and securely seal the same in the envelope on which is printed "Official Absentee Ballot." This envelope shall then be placed in the second one, on which is printed the form of the oath of the elector; the name and oath of the person assisting, if any; and other required identifying information. The elector shall then fill out, subscribe, and swear to the oath printed on such envelope. Such envelope shall then be securely sealed and the elector shall then personally mail or personally deliver same to the board of registrars or absentee ballot clerk, provided that mailing or delivery may be made by the elector's mother, father, grandparent, aunt, uncle, brother, sister, spouse, son, daughter, niece, nephew, grandchild, son-in-law, daughter-in-law, mother-in-law, father-in-law, brother-in-law, sister-in-law, or an individual residing in the household of such elector. The absentee ballot of a disabled elector may be mailed or delivered by the caregiver of such disabled elector, regardless of whether such caregiver resides in such disabled elector's household. The absentee ballot of an elector who is in custody in a jail or other detention facility may be mailed or delivered by any employee of such jail or facility having custody of such elector. An elector who is confined to a hospital on a primary or election day to whom an absentee ballot is delivered by the registrar or absentee ballot clerk shall then and there vote the ballot, seal it properly, and return it to the registrar or absentee ballot clerk. If the elector registered to vote for the first time in this state by mail and has not previously provided the identification required by [Code Section 21-2-220](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGneE2KqyvkY7tktDokg8y-OI9Hqs3W0FwtDsU2ii4xIPvYOcDrLDgrxYywj82ZhJlBbiwTaJv7oouWeN5sxCP1aBmFs94PXgFbSiGcfwQw9KlJ9liBXa1zeqCvf2e0_Y6XYvKpRRar-q4D4feGp6WMDBXof43rkKGiEcYN9DiD_pfRUQe2EI04QVtTc__ZQNTR1qf6ak4Sq4ufUzDHn0BcFBVVFIHtORWkHPKaUw2Wl_PGsyYJlgRfKZrtKSYB6bWMXFGfTu1PTkLPHtGDGUITJYE1LktMep3kUu8D6fh3fgBIKIm_ZD0U6pCAE02wPhCyvm7pO8lkMFse6ViIf7ipcqVOD0COD5JND6kgErz4bsBAzJnr0RyGw==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==) and votes for the first time by absentee ballot and fails to provide the identification required by [Code Section 21-2-220](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGgkNaH_AQf5GVh_yk2rtpvWiWMU-lex22MW1Gw6U7uA2kLnMG9T389tPv5AJuHu0MuP72kxj2XcveMwID4eGqnDc9eKWb0HqKHGtrhg112Pdauh0oeAn9o_SRhuZE6ZbL6AujxdtVnLGy6YQvpeEzVm_OHM1hl66_75cBnnI7WCioq6-Dy3efoB8aIVPtRDeQGysJ0YS4DS4jXSDGrIPFT2KZrI9lwpBmlWswIAg0PCEAUJAN8tgPDhjfe1JC1BsAOjECqhhdBQWM3VSgOyO3i6CsN9zf80UWZLc57do3KO2m_tAUlmAzclgk5WP2ye43ae4lUlMZMXOrvjMf9XQVBjJTthMGDZUV64aBaYs0tJnk-6oaIhi4Iw==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==) with such absentee ballot, such absentee ballot shall be treated as a provisional ballot and shall be counted only if the registrars are able to verify the identification and registration of the elector during the time provided pursuant to [Code Section 21-2-419](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bsi1f0GA-P42PLegL5Rz9b9wh3QSepAEpBsCzwOptTrU4yyp1-l1v5iJmXWZrtXGL6bBDqEtRfMGirhMzDsCOSrOd6x85k3trigLDYbRrqtnWN-p_gM6m_ni8OfAS6shlbUZROf2AWvyCVZWHX-i8O3DcrqsuwlhxwIGy6KR1zmB2ZtFysjz9w0oKLUnc3rcB6r6zuIU_MZDCMe7TnOgBb_IEBNMbrvmz677p_IULUNrrDiOgHR9OmQRue_ldtvQ0eEQChI4Ie_jiMbcry1Of3Vi16Di__63DEXla63lZ8CaFaI1vRdDmDNlQulfHfPlhGY0kGMUsa3qSuPzxJBMEMX9mGdTzlrrLvoFuTByPZsyL6E8YmxqS02TPJf3htz_HOIinza0o9dr5PcNkpWulNxkSyPE-oZ3X1Js3qUY2QghtzLpKB1WJg==&c=fydDY1lPCbvxPKVJsoZoNWMOchrkdZ8NjfY0rsFKN09hZwETZ3R5Tg==&ch=iKtiR6AbMVEHt7wrohR_lSSUix9ZvVA_VX4788b3ccwYuI_IntMrrg==) .

---
| About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running to be the next Governor of the state of Georgia. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running to defeat Brian Kemp, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia First and Take Georgia Back.
---

|
---
| |
---

name: American Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8397%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=aW%2fqb6jhhqJNQstV43KD1w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11053%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3xUKJ0ipgS5ehfJ95qeFWg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c11054%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lLUTgGXWdcfl7MwBkO5vtQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv3fvkrm21ec1hho8onthhoc1p8ru2714vffcr9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpge0ob4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z12tu8cfhs8j8m4co301qs4jcjtdlgoltda4ncog_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpge0ob4cph2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgbto9q07o0nf8i2d3ktjn7d03m09umij59uk8ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cpge0ob4cph2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Val Demings
subject: The words I always carry with me (reading time 1.5 minutes)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
this email is unlike any other you'll get
| | |
---
Friend: We are approaching one of my first fundraising goals of the year. What we do right now will set the pace for the rest of this year and show the strength of our campaign.

I don't doubt you're getting a lot of emails, **but this email is unlike any other you'll get ahead of such a monumental midterm election, so I hope you'll give it a read.**
When I'm in the middle of make-or-break moments like this for my Senate race, my mind often goes back to Jacksonville – back to the tiny house I grew up in with six brothers and sisters. Things weren't always easy. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and although we didn't have a lot of money, we had each other.
In fact, it was Mom who used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val — _never_ tire." Those words inspired me to get into public service, and ever since then, growing tired of doing what's right has never been an option.
These words have been deep in my soul as I have served the public, from my time in the Orlando Police Department to Congress. They're the words I spoke to myself as I impeached Donald Trump. And they're the words I think about now, as I see how we desperately need more than a 50-50 Senate to build back better for the American people.

_Never tire,_ I think, as I recognize Florida is Democrats' best opportunity to expand our Senate majority. _Never tire_ , I think, as polls show me statistically tied with my opponent, and I come out of yet another finance meeting with the realization I'm far behind where I need to be before a big deadline like this.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what's possible – and I promise I will never tire as I work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for _all_ Americans. **A 50-50 Senate isn't working for you or our country, and it's up to us to expand our majority and secure a future for voting rights, reproductive freedom and all our shared values.**
**So as I look toward one of my first fundraising goals of 2022, I need to build a huge grassroots team to help me surge ahead in the new year. That's why I set an ambitious goal to recruit 10,000 members before midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to join, friend:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40373324/324065704/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2063-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=)
**[Friend, I ask a lot of you because I have so much faith that you'll never tire _, _either. You know the stakes of this election, so before my midnight deadline, can you donate $5 to become a member of this grassroots team? Every donor will help me defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40373325/324065705/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2063-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=)**
Thank you for being in this with me.

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40373326/324065706/1581265324?refcode=jtk2063-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40373327/324065707/1804727444?refcode=jtk2063-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40373328/324065708/-460395862?refcode=jtk2063-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=&emci=aac33dcd-f06c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=097956fa-2c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40373329/324065709/-144803992?refcode=jtk2063-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=&emci=aac33dcd-f06c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=097956fa-2c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/aac33dcd-f06c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e/097956fa-2c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTc5NTZmYS0yYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fubSgM-c4VnTrYguam70GRDNkiWtVtfDEEBuY8Yo2rs=&id=123159867).

clean_body: this email is unlike any other you'll get | | | Friend: We are approaching one of my first fundraising goals of the year. What we do right now will set the pace for the rest of this year and show the strength of our campaign. I don't doubt you're getting a lot of emails, but this email is unlike any other you'll get ahead of such a monumental midterm election, so I hope you'll give it a read. When I'm in the middle of make-or-break moments like this for my Senate race, my mind often goes back to Jacksonville – back to the tiny house I grew up in with six brothers and sisters. Things weren't always easy. Mom was a maid, Dad was a janitor, and although we didn't have a lot of money, we had each other. In fact, it was Mom who used to say to me: "Never grow tired of doing good, Val — never tire." Those words inspired me to get into public service, and ever since then, growing tired of doing what's right has never been an option. These words have been deep in my soul as I have served the public, from my time in the Orlando Police Department to Congress. They're the words I spoke to myself as I impeached Donald Trump. And they're the words I think about now, as I see how we desperately need more than a 50-50 Senate to build back better for the American people. Never tire, I think, as I recognize Florida is Democrats' best opportunity to expand our Senate majority. Never tire , I think, as polls show me statistically tied with my opponent, and I come out of yet another finance meeting with the realization I'm far behind where I need to be before a big deadline like this. My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what's possible – and I promise I will never tire as I work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. A 50-50 Senate isn't working for you or our country, and it's up to us to expand our majority and secure a future for voting rights, reproductive freedom and all our shared values. So as I look toward one of my first fundraising goals of 2022, I need to build a huge grassroots team to help me surge ahead in the new year. That's why I set an ambitious goal to recruit 10,000 members before midnight tonight, and I'm counting on you to join, friend: = = Thank you for being in this with me. Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

Hello,
Last month, our country yet again faced the grim reality that has become commonplace in America: Another school shooting; another community devastated by gun violence; another day of wondering about America’s fascination with firearms and whispering “thoughts and prayers.”
Most Republicans want us to believe that the answer to stopping gun violence in this country is _more_ firearms. Everyone knows that’s not true, but the Republican blinders are on because the NRA is paying them handsomely.
**And just days after 4 more teenagers were killed in Oxford, Michigan, my opponent Chuck Grassley went on the Senate floor and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. You couldn’t make this up.**
I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I’m done with Republicans kowtowing to the NRA and caring more about their campaign donations than the lives of our children.
[**If you’re ready to elect a Democrat who will take on the NRA – not take their blood money – then chip in $5 or whatever you can afford right now to my campaign. clean_body: Hello, Last month, our country yet again faced the grim reality that has become commonplace in America: Another school shooting; another community devastated by gun violence; another day of wondering about America’s fascination with firearms and whispering “thoughts and prayers.” Most Republicans want us to believe that the answer to stopping gun violence in this country is more firearms. Everyone knows that’s not true, but the Republican blinders are on because the NRA is paying them handsomely. And just days after 4 more teenagers were killed in Oxford, Michigan, my opponent Chuck Grassley went on the Senate floor and BLOCKED a bill requiring universal background checks for gun purchases. You couldn’t make this up. I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I’m done with Republicans kowtowing to the NRA and caring more about their campaign donations than the lives of our children. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being part of this campaign, Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: 1 year since my election in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Friend: One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more. But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority. **But here’s the deal, folks: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR!** **Right now, CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic Senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as a TOP target for defeat.** **So I need to ask:[ Will you split a $5 donation between my reelection campaign in Georgia and Maggie Hassan's in New Hampshire? Whatever you give will go a long way in defending our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40376020/324078300/-1743828285?refcode=e20220105_warnock-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjE1ZjQ1Zi0zNDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8LKy89dx8_q7jV7wVL_D-u34FzuqLYgXdLOWI4INL0=)** As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control. **[So will you give $5 or more now – before the critical midnight deadline – to help me win in Georgia, reelect Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40376021/324078301/-1743828285?refcode=e20220105_warnock-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjE1ZjQ1Zi0zNDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i8LKy89dx8_q7jV7wVL_D-u34FzuqLYgXdLOWI4INL0=)** Thank you, friend. It's going to take all of us coming together to win this. – Reverend Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40377976/324083259/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ3MjRjYS0zNjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3yN-IYf42qnPk1_SaG6mgcTAHBOBCoM38eg5wliWWY=)

Peter, I need your help to reach my first goal of 2022.
The election year sprawled out before us is sure to be a tough one. I have fought tirelessly to hold the powerful and wealthy accountable – **but now they’re fighting back. **
With my attempts to bring justice to New York under attack, I need the support of every last fearless fighter to get across the finish line. **That’s why I set a goal to receive 2,022 donations to fill our 2022 Election Year Fund, but we’re still 1,271 short.**
**[_Peter, will you rush a donation of $5, $15, $25, or more to activate your 2022 Election Year Fund donor status? Every dollar you can spare will provide me with more resources to hold the powerful accountable and secure reelection as your attorney general. _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40377977/324083260/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ3MjRjYS0zNjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3yN-IYf42qnPk1_SaG6mgcTAHBOBCoM38eg5wliWWY=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40377979/324083261/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ3MjRjYS0zNjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3yN-IYf42qnPk1_SaG6mgcTAHBOBCoM38eg5wliWWY=)
I’m running for reelection because I’m not done fighting for justice and equality in New York. During my time as your attorney general, I’ve taken on the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and the Trump administration to hold them all liable for the harm they’ve caused to everyday working New Yorkers.
**Peter, I intend to finish these fights, but I can’t do it without your support. Which is why, with only a handful of months before Election Day, I’ve set the goal to receive 2,022 donations before midnight on Jan. 7.**
**[_Please, will you rush whatever you can spare to my 2022 Election Year Fund so I can continue my work to fight for the rights of every New Yorker – from New York City to our smallest towns upstate?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40377981/324083262/-39856258?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk273-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQ3MjRjYS0zNjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t3yN-IYf42qnPk1_SaG6mgcTAHBOBCoM38eg5wliWWY=)**
Thanks so much for being on my side. I couldn't be more grateful for your support.
Letitia James

name: NextGen America
subject: SURVEY: What should we focus on in 2022?
body:
| |
Friend, **This new year, we’re growing our collective power and working together to register, engage, and mobilize young people across the country as we head into the 2022 midterm elections.** But first, **we want to hear from you.** As a crucial part of our team here at NextGen,**your voice and values are the top priority to us as we shape our vision for 2022 and the years to come.** **[Act now: Let us know what issues matter most to you this year in our 2022 name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Keep Florida Free
body:
Thank you for supporting our efforts.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017Llz1EHd1LTUDchBkVTquNqGwPK3VIdbExHysDDZ-_iD-1183PYUh3QPuciMhm-vF9HQkUaWd_5kHddlZt7oevsph_maYvd_e56sVr8hvkRL1EslQvQxxegGYhWR9jzR5aHEfh4thT2wSGWTGYByA012anqPSIfUKCnxwT6zXMXZsfdaDMouVubwYBXLtTTI&c=VUPtlaorJ4mkZFpMxt0d41Inl5nF1-qYyRFaGD7oQOJbLKzXg5bdUQ==&ch=jFPq4o2IK96PUGktloCee2ngFNXenUmfNt-WRz5SJUUCXjgWNvb_Mg==)
---
| Dear Peter,
Thank you for supporting our efforts to keep Florida free. By joining our team, you are helping us defend our constitutional republic.
Contrary to "the science," the radical left and the liberal media have been on a crusade to destroy lives by adhering to their political ideology rather than the evidence and truth.
From the onset of this pandemic, I stood STRONG for the people of Florida by rejecting their narrative and holding true to my constitutional oath that preserved limited government and liberty for our residents.
I took hits from every political opportunist and corporate media entity who wanted to use this pandemic to destroy me and create more power for themselves.
In Florida, we lifted people up, we didn't lock people down, and the results speak for themselves...
I encourage you to get involved in this upcoming election. The future of our state and our nation is on the line.
We need to send a message that Florida is free, we're open for business, and our people are happy.
With a resounding victory in 2022, we will reject the left's attempted takeover of America and we will solidify a prosperous future for Florida.
[Please CLICK HERE to see how your support has been essential to our efforts!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017Llz1EHd1LTUDchBkVTquNqGwPK3VIdbExHysDDZ-_iD-1183PYUhy2zFjCVmdokoCBZju_Oo14084Az5qq26fuE2ywHzbPG3_j7Nt2kShX_iySXObGn5da9ios2DrkXelyfSeZyMk0zUYYCXkRsGe-sozmMP__O&c=VUPtlaorJ4mkZFpMxt0d41Inl5nF1-qYyRFaGD7oQOJbLKzXg5bdUQ==&ch=jFPq4o2IK96PUGktloCee2ngFNXenUmfNt-WRz5SJUUCXjgWNvb_Mg==)
Thank you for your support and just know, I have only begun to fight!
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Ron DeSantis
---

name: Tim Ryan (via Serve America)
subject: that’s not me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40379478/324089100/-2057546413?refcode=20220105_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDk1OTk5OC0zODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ABdxJcme-fFFYGPuWCrD4nH0sJXkwIpWYHfI9uJHgA=) Friend, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. **That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal.** [**Can you make a contribution today -- split between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us reach our fundraising goal? clean_body: | | | = Friend, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal. = = Thank you so much for your support. I hope you know how grateful I am to have this team by my side. \-- Tim | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Ras Smith
subject: Today I'm announcing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
the suspension of my campaign for Governor of Iowa. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40380874/324094392/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDM4N2EwMy0zYjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qZkomFBeHkigRKtSngf1Io106xjrkLruzJWZ9iVDYBA=)
Friend,

When my team and I launched my campaign for governor last summer, we invited all Iowans to join our movement with the message "come as you are." We believe that there is a place for everyone in our collective vision for the future of Iowa.

And over the past seven months, you have welcomed me into your homes, your communities, your struggles, and your aspirations. You have allowed me to come as I am, and it’s been a privilege. Knowing you better has helped me to know Iowa better and love Iowa more. It has reaffirmed for me the magnitude of mission-driven work that lies ahead to ensure Iowa is a state where all of us can not just survive -- but thrive.

Unfortunately, this process has also exposed a drastic disconnect between the current political system and the people. I have come to the heartbreaking conclusion that there are barriers that one campaign cannot overcome, no matter how hard we work or how faithfully we represent the majority of hardworking Iowans.

**Today I am announcing the suspension of my campaign for Governor of Iowa.** I am profoundly grateful to our countless friends, supporters, and donors, and invite you to stay connected as we continue to work to bring meaningful change to this state. My faith guides me in not being tethered to an outcome, but instead to remain committed to the work.

I return to the Iowa Legislature next week where I will focus on continuing to amplify the voice of the people. I strongly believe that people are Iowa's greatest resource. As I've traveled the state, my team and I have heard over and over that Iowans want leaders with shared experiences and who understand working class challenges. What they do not want is the most wealthy and elite to be solely at the table making decisions on their behalf.

We have a lot of work to do, Iowa. And I'm here for it.

With gratitude,

Ras Smith

PS. Here are just a few pictures from the past seven months. Meeting folks around the state was one of the best parts of this campaign.

---
