name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Top 5 liars in the media--
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)
Peter,

It's no secret the mainstream media is occupied by merchants of lies, Leftwing activists, and corrupt power hungry radicals. The Media Research Center (MRC) is the only conservative non-profit dedicated to exposing the Leftwing media and holding them accountable.

MRC monitors the Fake News media outlets to record their lies, expose them, and spread the truth to the American people. **I decided to rank the TOP 5 Liars in the Leftwing-Media and show you how the Media Research Center is fighting back!**

Here are the TOP 5 Liars in the Leftwing-Media (I will highlight the worst parts for you):
1. **Chris Cuomo and CNN:** As the leader of the Fake News Industry, CNN produces some of the most despicable and unethical liars in the media today. MRC recently helped expose Chris Cuomo for aiding his brother's (fmr. NY Governor Andrew Cuomo) sexual harassment allegations.

CNN and Chris Cuomo used their positions to lie about the story, keep Andrew Cuomo in power, conceal his criminal activity, and keep pushing lies about the COVID pandemic

[**You can help the Media Research Center expose more liars like CNN by making a donation here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)

2. **Jen Psaki:** Joe Biden's Liar-in-Chief, Jen Psaki, is a state sponsored propagandist whose sole job is to cover up the administration's failures and silence conservatives in the media.

MRC records each of her statements, identifies inconsistencies & lies, and holds her accountable to her own words. Jen Psaki attempted to sweep Biden's TOTAL FAILURE in Afghanistan under the rug... MRC refused to let that happen. _We sounded the alarm and let the American people know the truth_.

[**Help the Media Research Center hold the Biden administration accountable to their failures by donating here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)

3. **Joy Reid:** MSNBC's Joy Reid the Leftwing Media's attack dog for all of their favorite causes.

She uses her position in the media to compare abortion restrictions to "Shariah Law," cancel and silence people she dislikes by falsely accusing them of racism, and promote Critical Race Theory.

Joy Reid is NOT a journalist. MRC is fighting back by exposing her lies to the American people. [**Support the MRC 's battle against MSNBC by donating here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)

4. **AP "Fact-checkers":** The Leftwing Media has hired a small army of "Fact Checkers" to present their radically biased opinions as facts on all news stories. This is a dangerous new trick the Fake News industry has created to build a false sense of credibility for their political agendas.

Big Tech companies such as Facebook and Twitter have also hired "Fact Checkers" to review content they simply disagree with in an effort to silence conservatives, Trump supporters, and America-First patriots.

The Media Research Center is exposing these "Fact Checkers" and demanding an end to this rigged system. [**Donate to support our efforts here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)

5. **Rachel Maddow:** MSNBC doesn't even bother trying to present themselves as an unbiased news organization anymore. Rachel Maddow is the official spokesperson for socialism, the Woke agenda, and the Radical Left.

MRC is holding her accountable for failing to report the truth, and lying to the American people in order to force her sick and twisted ideology down our throats.

Peter, this list could easily be 80 pages long.

The Leftwing Media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, free speech, our values, the Constitution, and our liberty.

I have dedicated my life's work to combating Fake News and defending free speech. The Media Research Center has successfully shattered trust in the leftist media... but our fight isn't over.

The Media Research Center must now fight "Fact Checkers," Big Tech censorship, rabidly pro-socialist reporters, and outright liars in the mainstream media. I am counting on your help to WIN this battle.

My goal is to raise $50,000 to fund MRC's efforts... We are going to WAR with CNN, MSNBC, and the entire Fake News industry. Please use one of the links below to join our fight:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)

Defeating the Fake News empire will not be easy.

But we must fight.

The Leftwing Media is mobilizing to influence our elections, force Critical Race Theory into our classrooms, enact socialism, pass AOC's "Green New Deal", and destroy our country.

The Media Research Center is on the frontlines, exposing lies in the media, taking down corrupt "journalists" like Chris Cuomo, and spreading the truth in the media.

The best part? _We are winning_.

The MRC has a proven formula to expose the truth and hold the media accountable.

But the ugly truth is... We will fail without your help.

Unlike the media, we do not receive millions of dollars of funding from George Soros or Bill Gates. The Media Research Center is funded by patriotic Americans who wish to defend our values, fight for free speech, and protect the future of our Republic for the next generation.

[**Please join the Media Research Center by making a donation of $10, $50, $100, $250, $500 or ANY amount by clicking here. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174862:J8qhDlEdN:m:1:3298722022:1975F6199E038D7BA8D4914467E76F74:r)

Thank you for everything you do for liberty and for our country.

Brent Bozell
President & Founder of MRC

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry."**
Through**"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.********You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-TwJ4c6R0UCS1AFQ)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.__8DA)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDA1LWI2Nzc0ZTZjMTQxZjQxZDNiZTMzNmI4YzE5N2JiZjcwIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/-VaUETAFFg9ta3iqiI7naw) to unsubscribe.

name: Jen Kiggans for Congress
subject: Elaine Luria Voted To Put Criminals Over Citizens
body:
Last month, Elaine Luria voted not to consider H.R. 1995 (see the full legislation here: https://www.congress.gov/ [https://www.congress.gov/bill/117th-congress/house-bill/1995]), the Protecting Our Communities from Gang Violence Act. With this vote:

Elaine Luria voted to block a bill prohibiting illegal gang members from entering the United States...

Elaine Luria voted to allow illegal immigrant gang members to claim asylum and receive temporary protection...

Elaine Luria voted to block legislation that would ensure illegal immigrant gang members are inadmissible and can be deported for the US...

If you value community safety as much as I do, please join my team today! [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=Elaine+Luria+Voted+To+Put+Criminals+Over+Citizens]

-There have been 1,659,206 migrant encounters at our Southern Border in 2021,

-almost 11,000 pounds of fentanyl has been seized this year, a 132% increase from last year,

-and 9.5 million counterfeit pills have been seized this year!

Elaine Luria has made it clear: Public Safety is not a priority... She continues to put criminals over citizens and make our communities less safe.

In Congress, supporting the rule of law and our law enforcement will be one of my top priorities!

Chip in $25 today to show Radical Washington Liberals that we will not support criminals in our communities and will instead put families and safety FIRST!! [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=25&utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=Elaine+Luria+Voted+To+Put+Criminals+Over+Citizens]

Help me bring commonsense back to Washington!

Thank you so much in advance,

Sen. Jen Kiggans

CIVILITY & COMPETENCE

DONATE $10 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=10&utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=Elaine+Luria+Voted+To+Put+Criminals+Over+Citizens] DONATE $50 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=50&utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=Elaine+Luria+Voted+To+Put+Criminals+Over+Citizens] DONATE $100 [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?amount=100&utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=Elaine+Luria+Voted+To+Put+Criminals+Over+Citizens] DONATE OTHER [https://secure.winred.com/kiggans-for-congress/donate?utm_source=FR+Email&utm_medium=All+Lists&utm_campaign=Elaine+Luria+Voted+To+Put+Criminals+Over+Citizens]

name: Team Nikki
subject: On this day…
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Sen. Warnock, Sen. Ossoff, and Gov. Tayloe Ross

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40383968/324101640/-1987745334?refcode=jan5th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTNjODgyNy0zZjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6s8EZXFvz5wAEi6SPLF_Ty7lN61JEPErUQdIeIm0LA0=) Peter, On this day in 1925, Wyoming elected Governor Nellie Tayloe Ross — the first ever woman Governor in the history of our country. And, on this day just last year, Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff pulled off an incredible upset in Georgia, proving that, with the right candidates at the right time, Democrats _can_ win in the South. We’re not telling you this because January 5th is a particularly historic day. Throughout our history, countless women and countless Democrats have made history across this country, fighting for and delivering positive change. We’re telling you this because today is a sharp reminder that, here in Florida, we’re behind the times. For decades, GOP governors have led our state in the _wrong_ direction. And for centuries, women have been kept on the sidelines in state politics. **But Nikki is going to change all of that. ** [**This year, Florida has the opportunity to make history by electing our first Democratic Governor in decades, and our first ever woman Governor. And you can help make that happen. clean_body: Sen. Warnock, Sen. Ossoff, and Gov. Tayloe Ross = Peter, On this day in 1925, Wyoming elected Governor Nellie Tayloe Ross — the first ever woman Governor in the history of our country. And, on this day just last year, Rev. Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff pulled off an incredible upset in Georgia, proving that, with the right candidates at the right time, Democrats can win in the South. We’re not telling you this because January 5th is a particularly historic day. Throughout our history, countless women and countless Democrats have made history across this country, fighting for and delivering positive change. We’re telling you this because today is a sharp reminder that, here in Florida, we’re behind the times. For decades, GOP governors have led our state in the wrong direction. And for centuries, women have been kept on the sidelines in state politics. But Nikki is going to change all of that. = ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for your support. — Team Nikki ** Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Peter Franchot
subject: Final week of fundraising
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
We’re just one week out from our critical fundraising deadline. On January 12, I will no longer be able to accept donations when the General Assembly enters Session. It’s crucial that we get as many donations as we can before the cutoff so that we can sustain our operation in the weeks and months to come.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finalweek_010522?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finalweek_010522?amount=20.22]I am currently the frontrunner in the Democratic race for Governor, and your support in this final fundraising push is the key to maintaining our momentum. Will you rush a donation to help me hit my fundraising goal before the blackout period? My team is looking to raise an additional $2,000 to stay on pace by 11:59 PM tonight.

name: Madison Horn
subject: Thanks and Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Team,

Happy New Year and a giant THANK YOU for all you have done! Thanks to your support, we met our first FEC quarterly deadline goal _ever_ and are one step closer to electing the first woman to represent Oklahoma in the U.S. Senate!

Our team has a lot of work ahead of us, and grassroots supporters like you are crucial to defeating my self-serving opponent, James Lankford.

The fact is that Lankford voted against paid leave and affordable healthcare for working families, and he’s in favor of the Supreme Court gutting Roe v. Wade, taking away a woman’s right to make her own medical decisions. **He’s leading Oklahoma to the bottom on a lot of today’s top issues.**

With your support, we can bring a true public servant to Washington. Thank you again for helping us ring in the New Year on the right foot!

I hope you stay in touch with our campaign on social media and follow me on **[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40384509/324104535/-15035506?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220105_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEwZGRiMC00MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=knPFLrhnBRibFSo9bsCLcjYkDvWOl_dgmx-Ey-JKG-I=&emci=6849293e-ae6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=eba0ddb0-406e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5119200)** and like me on **[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40384512/324104537/732552061?refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220105_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmEwZGRiMC00MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=knPFLrhnBRibFSo9bsCLcjYkDvWOl_dgmx-Ey-JKG-I=&emci=6849293e-ae6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=eba0ddb0-406e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=5119200)** , if you haven’t already.

Thank you for your support.

Let’s get to work!
Madison

name: Michele Rayner
subject: I’m so excited for 2022 with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40385430/324107665/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDcwZjFmMi00MTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQGzXGKLBdfeHZmfW2jmD5dh6a-bONNEOFVBSz1FACw=)

Hi Peter,

First, let me personally wish you a happy new year! I hope that 2022 brings you nothing but happiness and joy.

Second, I hope you enjoyed the holiday season with family and friends. Bianca and I were so happy to take a moment to reflect on 2021 and all of the amazing things that last year brought on.

One of those things we’re grateful for? You, Peter!

Not only did we launch this campaign last year, but we’ve been able to keep it going, thanks to you. It’s such an honor to witness people-power work in real-time, and I couldn’t be more grateful to be on this journey alongside one another.

Last month marked the most critical fundraiser of 2021 -- with it being our end-of-year fundraiser, as well as the FEC quarterly fundraising deadline. Thankfully, together, we were able to meet our goal -- and for that, once again, I have you to express gratitude to.

I’ll be honest -- these next few months are only going to get more intense, especially with the primary so packed and this race gaining national attention. But as long as we stick together and put our grassroots power to work, we will make it across the finish line.

I’m so excited to see what 2022 holds for us, Peter.

Thanks again and talk soon,

Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40385431/324107667/1870454853?refcode=em22_220105_eoqty%20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDcwZjFmMi00MTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQGzXGKLBdfeHZmfW2jmD5dh6a-bONNEOFVBSz1FACw=)

* * *
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you no longer wish to hear from us you can [unsubscribe here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c4175d4a-696d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/8070f1f2-416e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDcwZjFmMi00MTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wQGzXGKLBdfeHZmfW2jmD5dh6a-bONNEOFVBSz1FACw=&id=140435042). name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Media Advisory: Vernon Jones_Press Conference Time Change Today_Georgia Opens Investigation into Possible Ballot Harvesting in 2020 Election
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 5, 2022
PRESS CONTACT: [GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM](mailto:GAPRESS@JONESFORGEORGIA.COM)
---
| |
---
PRESS CONFERENCE:VERNON JONES CALLS FOR A FEDERAL INVESTIGATION OF THE 2020 BALLOT HARVESTING & TRAFFICKING
---
| |
---
|
---
| ATLANTA, January 5, 2022\- Today's press conference time has been changed to 3:30PM. Vernon Jones will hold a press conference on Wednesday, January 5th at The Georgia State Capitol in Atlanta to discuss the recent news that Georgia's Secretary of State is launching an investigation, including subpoenas into possible ballot harvesting and trafficking during the 2020 election.
Rep. Jones has been calling for the leaders in Georgia to look into the integrity of the 2020 elections, since November 4, 2020. He has been on the frontlines while others were on the sidelines. Jones has been a Champion for Georgia, fighting to get answers for what Georgians want to know; was every legal vote counted, and were any illegal votes counted? Voting is one of our most basic rights and at the forefront of our democracy, this is a bipartisan issue.
"I'm calling for a federal investigation, because the Georgia's Attorney General has compromised his independence by endorsing Brian Kemp's re-election and embracing his position of denial of any election fraud. We simply cannot trust the Attorney General." Vernon Jones

We invite you to join us on Wednesday to stand with Vernon Jones.
WHAT: Vernon Jones Press Conference WHEN: Wednesday, January 5, 2022 at 3:30PM WHERE:The Georgia State Capitol, South Wing on the Second Floor

[Just The News: Georgia Authorities Call for An Investigation of 2020 Elections](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4a9Fk_Ob1QsVl3EdejW9KifXyZyvipy3_jw0wqfPQmqERyhmD4EXOlGsNS2poDJKzMmolxQcxR1jAgKSTf7fVaN4Uqk0rUq6EDxPyAgpJNl_piLmXZfJwk0ceRosebJB2vfk5y0i9KDZAMTiWEAojM8wmU9PxCCVcZVkAAQqtjiaG7yS1DikHuOafSxKORhVFX7RjI1Knj2fkF7e604fkPyQ==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==)
---
|
Below are the Rules of the State Election Board Regarding Absentee Ballot Drop Off Boxes and links to the codes regarding who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. These rules were used in the 2020 General Election and the 2021 Runoffs.
---
|

RULES OF STATE ELECTION BOARD CHAPTER 183-1 GEORGIA ELECTION CODE SUBJECT 183-1-14 ABSENTEE VOTING TABLE OF CONTENTS 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (1) For the Elections held on June 9, 2020, County registrars are authorized to establish one or more drop box locations as a means for absentee by mail electors to deliver their ballots to the county registrars. Placing a voted absentee ballot into the drop box shall be deemed delivery pursuant to [O.C.G.A. § 21-2-385](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4akJk4ZDOKw42z5_L5H3rlIdGe7gWtgsotFr8qUWs_BY-iZiSvW2AL6ioZfsYISvM3F7j4pbxZyQ7BZf9xkFt2NNVqnnBOTPfWa4r5bPDjmf7WkVGdKDbPpuRoA1BJCkExO1_QJG5b2e1ujPxUzeqU2g==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4akJk4ZDOKw42z5_L5H3rlIdGe7gWtgsotFr8qUWs_BY-iZiSvW2AL6ioZfsYISvM3F7j4pbxZyQ7BZf9xkFt2NNVqnnBOTPfWa4r5bPDjmf7WkVGdKDbPpuRoA1BJCkExO1_QJG5b2e1ujPxUzeqU2g==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==)and is subject to the limitations on who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. (2) A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public. (3) Drop box locations may open beginning 49 days before Election Day and shall close at 7:00 p.m. on Election Day. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Counties shall provide notice of the location of each drop box by posting such information on the home page of the county election website no later than the day the drop boxes are placed in a location. (4) Drop box locations must have adequate lighting and use a video recording device to monitor each drop box location. The video recording device must either continuously record the drop box location or use motion detection that records one frame, or more, per minute until detection of motion triggers continuous recording. (5) Video recordings of the drop box locations must be retained by the county registrars for 30 days after the final certification of the election, or until conclusion of any contest involving an election on the ballot in the county jurisdiction, whichever is later, and shall be made available to Secretary of State investigators upon request. (6) A drop box shall be constructed of durable material able to withstand vandalism and inclement weather. The opening slot of a drop box shall not allow ballots to be tampered with or removed and shall be designed to minimize the ability for liquid to be poured into the drop box or rain water to seep in. (7) A drop box shall be securely fastened to the ground or an immovable fixture. Page 1 of 2 (8) If the drop box utilizes a drop-slot into a building, the ballots must drop into a locked container, and both the drop-slot and the container must be monitored by video recording devices. (9) A drop box shall be clearly labeled "OFFICIAL ABSENTEE BALLOT DROP BOX". Each drop box location shall clearly display signage developed by the Secretary of State regarding Georgia law related to absentee ballot harvesting and destroying, defacing, or delaying delivery of ballots. (10) The county registrars must arrange for collection of the ballots from each drop box location at least once every 24 hours. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Collection of ballots from a drop box must be made by a team of at least two people. Any person collecting ballots from a drop box must have sworn an oath in the same form as the oath for poll officers set forth in O.C.G.A. § 21-2-95. The collection team shall complete and sign a ballot transfer form upon removing the ballots from the drop box, which shall include the date, time, location and number of ballots. The ballots from the drop box shall be immediately transported to the county registrar and processed and stored in the same manner as absentee ballots returned by mail are processed and stored. The county registrar or a designee thereof shall sign the ballot transfer form upon receipt of the ballots from the collection team. Authority: O.C.G.A. § 21-2-31

[O.C.G.A. § 21-2-385](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4akJk4ZDOKw42z5_L5H3rlIdGe7gWtgsotFr8qUWs_BY-iZiSvW2AL6ioZfsYISvM3F7j4pbxZyQ7BZf9xkFt2NNVqnnBOTPfWa4r5bPDjmf7WkVGdKDbPpuRoA1BJCkExO1_QJG5b2e1ujPxUzeqU2g==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==)[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4akJk4ZDOKw42z5_L5H3rlIdGe7gWtgsotFr8qUWs_BY-iZiSvW2AL6ioZfsYISvM3F7j4pbxZyQ7BZf9xkFt2NNVqnnBOTPfWa4r5bPDjmf7WkVGdKDbPpuRoA1BJCkExO1_QJG5b2e1ujPxUzeqU2g==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==)-(a) At any time after receiving an official absentee ballot, but before the day of the primary or election, except electors who are confined to a hospital on the day of the primary or election, the elector shall vote his or her absentee ballot, then fold the ballot and enclose and securely seal the same in the envelope on which is printed "Official Absentee Ballot." This envelope shall then be placed in the second one, on which is printed the form of the oath of the elector; the name and oath of the person assisting, if any; and other required identifying information. The elector shall then fill out, subscribe, and swear to the oath printed on such envelope. Such envelope shall then be securely sealed and the elector shall then personally mail or personally deliver same to the board of registrars or absentee ballot clerk, provided that mailing or delivery may be made by the elector's mother, father, grandparent, aunt, uncle, brother, sister, spouse, son, daughter, niece, nephew, grandchild, son-in-law, daughter-in-law, mother-in-law, father-in-law, brother-in-law, sister-in-law, or an individual residing in the household of such elector. The absentee ballot of a disabled elector may be mailed or delivered by the caregiver of such disabled elector, regardless of whether such caregiver resides in such disabled elector's household. The absentee ballot of an elector who is in custody in a jail or other detention facility may be mailed or delivered by any employee of such jail or facility having custody of such elector. An elector who is confined to a hospital on a primary or election day to whom an absentee ballot is delivered by the registrar or absentee ballot clerk shall then and there vote the ballot, seal it properly, and return it to the registrar or absentee ballot clerk. If the elector registered to vote for the first time in this state by mail and has not previously provided the identification required by [Code Section 21-2-220](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4aT7KgFUlRuTj2QzkJwB5iCD6k8EGpSr9L504TOBsa3ahnd_8RfLBh9tJXUGdrnqqm_7Wv9rLYPN9c8Cy_SiLnxgtKv4Ve1eO4HURtO0778iPRQxLVAfUlP1fGa41xSt8iWhSdcps28QA9_XgoZCnIeljguTuEURF533ftvGSP2dphIsxZlb_PZlOt6mQkktxP5OsCDowVKsTJtDqJSrH2RRBhou9gdNpbXjcxJnXTxUrq11DTFKUHeDTj5ICgeVdN6fLS4jDomSgc4qdQ0dcbx1Vsxwr17FlJcFGOJ_Km7yY-PGUilQ9VpjK4aaMZw7CLrpAXy5G5vI5A2klOVFcRnojn8BlLOQZ9TajlKQIZ1kEDuWAcQ0_i9g==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==) and votes for the first time by absentee ballot and fails to provide the identification required by [Code Section 21-2-220](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4aYCMPnozZJEvQ1NrHkQXwa_oWjrXhWdICoB8Zop9MdXdvkCF6M1-7lP_NYR3-qlJJYHSWoLqHux0_6kV_vSVbJTq2fO_QUAIBWDRkUNvEGtV0WoMErUnEFI6SA-sO42abpgCGhf9GoXT6vP2fvsQX1qQEzzfh8CxHQBjcE5jNn3F4brs29prrKNbtxFH9jCMuGq8JZEU3MXriOWVp34tnxbhR4duke2YS2VkGQ60ugF4v_Sh_7F53VgwpWPvsLXMOQE47hrWbQ_W1g1MYc4HXM-15lutJEcSxEGRDvRwUde79U7PRb-RWIDr5vVgxIxEk9S21sOxgnP4v67okUyANZgKdDrLpzTaIMlRscSO0lXLqZ8AWphNDzw==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==) with such absentee ballot, such absentee ballot shall be treated as a provisional ballot and shall be counted only if the registrars are able to verify the identification and registration of the elector during the time provided pursuant to [Code Section 21-2-419](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hs1yk56ChwPCO3BfKzbl0Qs7GjJ19ddDENogjpT09Cahs3FJ1aPN7uMrb15BWU4aXJHEs6vamew_XGUlhbata6mPNf79IdJPjm8SAP0Q-A7CJ9TvG__IRHHmQcoVfHF48DkqxztlnegvD2iuO94ze2-wILzrVYZ7EQF1KLRDIhzNOjfGYbOqrE3INUMURO2qAId_9Hw0pnvd4j6_btFLecYuFoNLmsrporrHEZ2cvvV3Lbxg_4yB7cLhmJtv9P8WxwHgzSlx6gNzthoBJGj9q26dhhHst9dV63Zgh-xLNl-p3CfJtmWKTImD4CIGPLRsVRHohLH0pdQyg2vHnyr5hV50NqawarTCGjTrZguqGr4KC6m-Twvx-gB3OitGgt6lIVPnoOnmb5igkP_eqVdzqxz7RPRx1XBjfTGHhmCm35qzkzeJCg8TSQ==&c=OoUPWKjGxZsqusNdAjzhNj_RivdBc8EmN3sDUfyRFhrgLsk_F_bl_A==&ch=KM2aRbYFqIVy1PRVnR6wIaHplc8INDVYCNkY9Ga_6GofO4id-twfnQ==) Vernon Jones will hold a press conference on Wednesday, January 5th at The Georgia State Capitol in Atlanta to discuss the recent news that Georgia's Secretary of State is launching an investigation, including subpoenas into possible ballot harvesting and trafficking during the 2020 election. Rep. Jones has been calling for the leaders in Georgia to look into the integrity of the 2020 elections, since November 4, 2020. He has been on the frontlines while others were on the sidelines. Jones has been a Champion for Georgia, fighting to get answers for what Georgians want to know; was every legal vote counted, and were any illegal votes counted? Voting is one of our most basic rights and at the forefront of our democracy, this is a bipartisan issue. "I'm calling for a federal investigation, because the Georgia's Attorney General has compromised his independence by endorsing Brian Kemp's re-election and embracing his position of denial of any election fraud. We simply cannot trust the Attorney General." Vernon Jones We invite you to join us on Wednesday to stand with Vernon Jones. These rules were used in the 2020 General Election and the 2021 Runoffs. | RULES OF STATE ELECTION BOARD CHAPTER 183-1 GEORGIA ELECTION CODE SUBJECT 183-1-14 ABSENTEE VOTING TABLE OF CONTENTS 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes RULE 183-1-14-0.6-.14 Secure Absentee Ballot Drop Boxes (1) For the Elections held on June 9, 2020, County registrars are authorized to establish one or more drop box locations as a means for absentee by mail electors to deliver their ballots to the county registrars. Placing a voted absentee ballot into the drop box shall be deemed delivery pursuant to is subject to the limitations on who may deliver a ballot on behalf of an elector. (2) A drop box shall only be located on county or municipal government property generally accessible to the public. (3) Drop box locations may open beginning 49 days before Election Day and shall close at 7:00 p.m. on Election Day. On Election Day, every drop box shall be closed and ballots collected at 7:00 p.m. Counties shall provide notice of the location of each drop box by posting such information on the home page of the county election website no later than the day the drop boxes are placed in a location. (4) Drop box locations must have adequate lighting and use a video recording device to monitor each drop box location. The video recording device must either continuously record the drop box location or use motion detection that records one frame, or more, per minute until detection of motion triggers continuous recording. (5) Video recordings of the drop box locations must be retained by the county registrars for 30 days after the final certification of the election, or until conclusion of any contest involving an election on the ballot in the county jurisdiction, whichever is later, and shall be made available to Secretary of State investigators upon request. (6) A drop box shall be constructed of durable material able to withstand vandalism and inclement weather. The opening slot of a drop box shall not allow ballots to be tampered with or removed and shall be designed to minimize the ability for liquid to be poured into the drop box or rain water to seep in. (7) A drop box shall be securely fastened to the ground or an immovable fixture. Page 1 of 2 (8) If the drop box utilizes a drop-slot into a building, the ballots must drop into a locked container, and both the drop-slot and the container must be monitored by video recording devices. (9) A drop box shall be clearly labeled "OFFICIAL ABSENTEE BALLOT DROP BOX". Each drop box location shall clearly display signage developed by the Secretary of State regarding Georgia law related to absentee ballot harvesting and destroying, defacing, or delaying delivery of ballots. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I refuse to be canceled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Peter:

The Silicon Valley cartel erasing President Trump from the internet was just the start.

**After Twitter permanently banned by my account, Facebook locked me out.**

All because I dared to speak the truth about the globalist elites China virus fascism and the deaths related to their supposedly "safe and effective vaccine."

If Big Tech can ban the duly elected President and sitting member of Congress, every America First patriot is under the gun.

This is the only way I can keep communicating with you, and I need to know if you are in my corner.

**[That's why I'm asking you to sign your "Stand with MTG" statement of support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)

Your action will show Big Tech and the D.C. swamp that the America First movement will not bow down or shut up.

**And right now I need to know if you are with me.**

The Big Tech oligarchs fear me because I fight for you.

So, the champagne socialists that run social media muzzled me.

I am now the most censored woman in Washington.

**But that 's only because the swamps know I'm the most dangerous woman in Washington.**

I am not afraid to call out the sleaze, corruption, and backroom deals that shred our fundamental rights.

And I promise you I will never stop fighting.

Our Silicon Valley overlords will not cancel me.

Even if I have to mail a handwritten letter to my supporters, I will never stop speaking the truth.

**[That's why I hope I can count on you in this fight by signing your "Stand with MTG" Statement of Support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r).**

After you sign your statement of support, I hope you will **[chip in a contribution of $100, $25, $50, or even $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)** so I can keep fighting to save America and stop socialism.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)

The arrogant puppet masters should have learned over the course of the last year I won't be bullied.

As soon as I took office, the fake news media, Communist Democrats, and the Never Trumpers kicked me off my committees and tried to expel me from Congress.

Now the hate-America Democrats like Adam Schiff teamed with RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger schemed to seize my records and lock me up.

**The D.C. swamp failed to take me out then.**

And some silly Twitter ban won't work now.

Every time some socialist in Silicon Valley presses the censor button to silence my voice, it makes me more determined, stronger, and effective.

_Why_?

I'm not here for the club.

I'm on here for you - the American people.

That's because elites in the Biden regime, fake news media liars, and Silicon Valley censors just want to abuse and control you.

But they will fail, and the people will win.

That's why it's crucial you **[sign your"Stand with MTG" statement of support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)** right away.

**[And after you take action to show you will fight back against the Big Tech censors, please chip in a contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432952:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r).** [_**STAND WITH MTG
CHIP IN $17.76 RIGHT AWAY**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432952:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)
Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

P.S. **If Twitter 's censors can blacklist a sitting president and a duly-elected congresswoman, what do you think they can do to you?**

That's why it's critically important that conservatives like you and me stick together - because they can't stop us from speaking the truth!

**[Help me drive Twitter's censors CRAZY and keep fighting for our conservative values in Congress by signing your "Stand with MTF" statement of support and chipping in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)!**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59432951:sLZWk-HNI:m:1:2365227053:7FC7ED634970F874EE2E04743E64B5C1:r)

name: Lorinser for U.S. Congress
subject: Full Details for Dr. Bob's Town Hall Next Thursday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Dr. Bob is hosting a live, in-person / virtual town hall on Thursday, January 13 to provide voters the opportunity to get to know the Democratic candidate vying for Northern Michigan and the U.P.'s Congressional seat. **You're invited. body:
We’re in this for our fellow Marylanders.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40386362/324110899/1512333912?refcode=BLU-KING-20220105-nd-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=adcb5f58-436e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGNiNWY1OC00MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qpB-IPMLzGLqilW-M7Yd2ffpsEXcZZB9MSFeF-adSWA=)

| Peter,

For the last few months, my team and I have been searching for the right person to join me on this journey to build a more equitable Maryland as my partner on this ticket. We set out looking for someone with bold, progressive ideas and a love for this great state. And, Peter, I’m proud to say that we found her and today I am sharing that news with you.

**Joining this ticket to become Maryland’s next Lieutenant Governor is Michelle Siri**! Michelle is coming to us with experience as a former Assistant Attorney General of Maryland, Board President of Maryland Planned Parenthood, and Executive Director of the Women’s Law Center of Maryland. A graduate of the University of Maryland Carey School of Law, Michelle is a proud Marylander raising her family in Baltimore County, and I am proud to have her join the team.

Michelle is a first-generation Iranian-American who has spent her entire life as a champion for women’s rights. From her work as an Assistant Attorney General to her legislative advocacy experience, Michelle has been a leader in the fight to create a more equitable Maryland and has been crucial in the fight to raise the minimum wage, pass pay equity laws, and ensure a women's right to abortion care is never infringed.

Michelle is exactly the type of courageous and thoughtful progressive leader that we need on our team and I know that she will be an incredible Lieutenant Governor. We’re in this for our fellow Marylanders, and I look forward to working with her to build a state government that acts as a transformative force for good and to serve Maryland the best we can — and I hope we can count on you to join us. clean_body: We’re in this for our fellow Marylanders. | = | Peter, For the last few months, my team and I have been searching for the right person to join me on this journey to build a more equitable Maryland as my partner on this ticket. We set out looking for someone with bold, progressive ideas and a love for this great state. And, Peter, I’m proud to say that we found her and today I am sharing that news with you. Joining this ticket to become Maryland’s next Lieutenant Governor is Michelle Siri! Michelle is coming to us with experience as a former Assistant Attorney General of Maryland, Board President of Maryland Planned Parenthood, and Executive Director of the Women’s Law Center of Maryland. A graduate of the University of Maryland Carey School of Law, Michelle is a proud Marylander raising her family in Baltimore County, and I am proud to have her join the team. | Michelle is a first-generation Iranian-American who has spent her entire life as a champion for women’s rights. From her work as an Assistant Attorney General to her legislative advocacy experience, Michelle has been a leader in the fight to create a more equitable Maryland and has been crucial in the fight to raise the minimum wage, pass pay equity laws, and ensure a women's right to abortion care is never infringed. Michelle is exactly the type of courageous and thoughtful progressive leader that we need on our team and I know that she will be an incredible Lieutenant Governor. We’re in this for our fellow Marylanders, and I look forward to working with her to build a state government that acts as a transformative force for good and to serve Maryland the best we can — and I hope we can count on you to join us. | Grateful as always, John King * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . Donald J. Trump January 4th, 2022
In light of the total bias and dishonesty of the January 6th Unselect Committee of Democrats, two failed Republicans, and the Fake News Media, I am canceling the January 6th Press Conference at Mar-a-Lago on Thursday, and instead will discuss many of those important topics at my rally on Saturday, January 15th, in Arizona—It will be a big crowd! What has become more and more obvious to ALL is that the LameStream Media will not report the facts that Nancy Pelosi and the Capitol Sergeant-at-Arms denied requests for the D.C. National Guard or Military to be present at the Capitol. Their emails and correspondence with the Department of Defense exist, but the media won’t ask for this evidence, or report the truth!

This is the Democrats’ Great Cover-Up Committee and the Media is complicit. Why did Adam “Shifty” Schiff forge and change the statement of Congressman Jim Jordan without any consequence? Why will Crazy Nancy Pelosi not provide her communications with the House Sergeant-at-Arms and the House Chief Administrative Officer, or promise to retain these vital messages, which many feel she has already destroyed—perhaps illegally? Also, why is the primary reason for the people coming to Washington D.C., which is the fraud of the 2020 Presidential Election, not the primary topic of the Unselect Committee’s investigation? This was, indeed, the Crime of the Century.

I look forward to seeing our Great American patriots in Arizona next weekend for a big rally to Save America!

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: 1 year since my election in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek, One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, our Democratic Senate and House have taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more. But the work my friend Adam Schiff and I are doing is far from over. As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. Friend,

I’m reaching out to close the loop on the quarter **— thanks to everyone on this team, we did it!** Not only did the campaign reach our final fundraising goal of 2021 in time but we exceeded it! Setting our movement up for success in the new year.

Honestly, I have all of you to thank, team. Without the generosity of grassroots donors chipping in a little of their hard-earned money to help drive progress, our campaign would have missed that goal.

So thank you, friend.

With the new year underway and just 307 days until Election Day, things are only going to get tougher.

But as long as I can count on you, I know we can overcome whatever comes our way and finally flip this seat blue!

Happy New Year and thanks again,

Kara Hahn

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Will you add your name to co-sponsor my 8-point plan to secure our democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friend,
All Americans and Pennsylvanians remember January 6, 2021 as a day that shook the foundations of our democratic republic.
Democracy is fragile and we all have a duty to protect it in the face of conspiracy theories, lies, and violence.
Securing our democracy is about securing a future for working families. That’s why I’ve released my 8-point plan to safeguard our democracy for generations to come.
[Will you read my plan below and add your name as a citizen co-sponsor if you agree we need a democracy that works for everybody?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40389203/324124763/1469640086?refcode2=78f87a24-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220105-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY4N2EyNC00ZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFzkNkNKfEGMIoU5pz7vwVg151G7UBcfEAAtzJZ6qK8=&emci=e593e9ff-486e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=78f87a24-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18034979)
**Malcolm Kenyatta’s Plan for Securing our Democracy**
1\. **Create a Civilian Democracy Corp:** To reinvigorate the teaching of civic education and how to spot misinformation and disinformation.
2\. **End the Jim Crow filibuster:** The filibuster has been used repeatedly to silence us and block movement on vital legislation overwhelmingly supported by the American people.
3\. **Pass the For the People Act:** A comprehensive set of reforms that would make voting easier, prevent voter suppression, end partisan gerrymandering, and fight dark money in our politics.
4\. **Pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act:** Re-enact the 1965 Voting Rights Act, one of the most important pieces of legislation ever passed by Congress.
5\. **Expand the Supreme Court:** Mitch McConnell has packed the Supreme Court with radical conservative justices who have taken a hammer to voting rights — to save the Court, we must expand it.
6\. **Statehood for D.C.:** The residents of D.C. have had their voices silenced for too long. We must make them the 51st state.
7\. **Self-determination for Puerto Rico:** We must empower Puerto Ricans to determine their own political future through an inclusive democratic process.
8\. **Democracy Observance Day:** We must make January 6 an annual day of remembrance — as a reminder that our democracy is fragile, and we all have a duty to protect it.
[Add your name below to become a citizen co-sponsor of this plan and join our fight for a democracy that works for working people >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40389204/324124764/1469640086?refcode2=78f87a24-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220105-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY4N2EyNC00ZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFzkNkNKfEGMIoU5pz7vwVg151G7UBcfEAAtzJZ6qK8=&emci=e593e9ff-486e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=78f87a24-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40389205/324124765/1469640086?refcode2=78f87a24-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&refcode=em220105-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGY4N2EyNC00ZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFzkNkNKfEGMIoU5pz7vwVg151G7UBcfEAAtzJZ6qK8=&emci=e593e9ff-486e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=78f87a24-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=18034979)**
The fate of our democracy is the fate of all of our freedoms and our inheritance of the American promise. A promise each generation pulls us closer to fully realizing.
I hope you’ll add your name to this plan and say you support our fight to save our democracy and protect voting rights for all.
Thanks for reading and taking action,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

Malcolm PAC
PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: 1 year since my election in Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control.
#
Peter: One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more.
But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority.
**But here’s the deal, Peter: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR!**
**Right now, CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.**
**So I need to ask: [Will you give $5 or more right now – everything you can spare before midnight tonight – to my reelection campaign and Patty Murray so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue delivering for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40389589/324126685/1263638320?refcode=pm_em_220105_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQyNmE2My01MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DucYXTQutLQc1VOvTWGdxM9S6RRQrcuLLkhRK-gf3c=)**
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history.
But with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control. **[So will you give $5 or more now – before the critical midnight deadline – to help me win in Georgia, keep Washington state blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40389590/324126686/1263638320?refcode=pm_em_220105_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQyNmE2My01MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DucYXTQutLQc1VOvTWGdxM9S6RRQrcuLLkhRK-gf3c=)**
Thank you, Peter. It's going to take all of us coming together to win this.
– Reverend Raphael Warnock
** **
** **
** **

****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40389591/324126687/1263638320?refcode=pm_em_220105_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjQyNmE2My01MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DucYXTQutLQc1VOvTWGdxM9S6RRQrcuLLkhRK-gf3c=)****

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**

name: Pete Sepp
subject: Elon Musk Vs. Elizabeth Warren: Which side are you on?
body:
Recently US Senator Elizabeth Warren attacked Elon Musk on social media for being a “freeloader” and demanded Time’s Perso
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztk67gejeuuakv63c4juos7hnduge228dnh8l7a8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj0p1ie9oedc36cepr2opi6hr7ed30eeqn6thm65o60s366pim4s5meaqebd70sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j3appjcgrr4sj66lgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5i62o35cdh62oh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhe4nd81aoonecp7pufst3dc0na4ve54u3d31v60_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g6aor2c5h2bs)
Friend,

Recently US Senator Elizabeth Warren attacked Elon Musk on social media for being a "freeloader" and demanded Time's Person of the Year pay more in taxes...

Attacking Elon Musk on social media isn't a wise move.

Elon replied, _" And if you opened your eyes for 2 seconds, you would realize I will pay more taxes than any American in history this year."._

He then added, _" Don't spend it all at once ... oh wait you did already". _

Elon Musk is paying over 10 billion dollars in taxes for 2021; the final amount will almost certainly be more than any other individual American has paid in one year during the history of the United States. __**But that 's not enough for Elizabeth Warren. **__

Warren is trying to push a "Wealth Tax" through Congress that would empower the IRS to tax an individual's "net worth" - property, financial assets, business interests, you name it.

This "Wealth Tax" is allegedly only for the mega rich... but we all know how that works. Remember the Alternative Minimum Tax?

Once the tax is enacted, somehow middle class Americans eventually end up sharing in the pain. After all, Warren's plan would boost the IRS's budget by $100 billion. The tax agency will not - I repeat not - use all that money to go after only the wealthy.

[_**The National Taxpayers Union (NTU) is fighting Elizabeth Warren 's socialist tax schemes and we invite you to join us! Donate $10 or more to NTU today >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z06d4ghmfe5vu4l4frf6nqpipudcbtkevehns6hg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g6aor2c5h2bs)

My name is Pete Sepp, I serve as the President of the National Taxpayers Union (NTU) and I've committed my life's work to fighting taxes, wasteful spending, and advocating for taxpayers.

I have good news and bad news about taxes for you, Friend.

> **The Bad News:** Socialists like AOC and Senator Elizabeth Warren have become more aggressive than ever before. Far-left politicians are saying with one voice they are not giving up! _Make no mistake, one year into Joe Biden 's Administration, Americans are still at risk of seeing new tax hikes. _
>
> **The Good News:** The National Taxpayers Union has a 52-year history of fighting and WINNING public policy battles with both Republicans and Democrats in power. _In fact, the National Taxpayers Union was a key player in passing both President Ronald Reagan and President Donald Trump 's historic tax cuts! _
>
> The next big fight the National Taxpayers Union is facing will be an epic showdown and I need your help. [**_Please consider making a generous donation to the National Taxpayers Union so we can defeat tax increases, cut wasteful spending, and fight for the taxpayer! You can donate by clicking here >>>_**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zig5qlqpbqghlc6venn8hnukm3f42ccavoopa3oo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g6aor2c5h2bs)

NTU has a proven history of winning public policy battles like these. **In fact, we have been named one of the TOP lobbyists for the taxpayers two years in a row!**

Allow me to give you an example of a recent victory:

Joe Biden has DESPERATELY been trying to pass his $2 Trillion "Build Back Better" spending bill. NTU took to the airwaves, sponsored phone banks, created digital advertising, and directly visited with Capitol Hill staff to persuade lawmakers to vote NO on this legislative ticket to bankruptcy.

Recently the bill stalled, with Senator Joe Manchin deciding NOT to support the bill... Now Biden must go back to the drawing board entirely! We need to be prepared for Round 2.

**Another example:** The IRS recently tried to add a new rule empowering them to monitor bank accounts with a balance exceeding $600 to "identify tax fraud." This is a gross abuse of power and a violation of your 4th Amendment rights.

NTU is educating Hill staff about this rule change and the IRS is already backing off. Now the alleged number is $10,000... But we're not done fighting this yet.

Friend, as you can see the National Taxpayers Union is the taxpayer's strongest voice in Washington. My goal is to find new online supporters to help me raise $25,000 ASAP. Can I count on your help?

Please use one of these links to send an URGENT donation to the National Taxpayers Union and help us fight new tax hikes!

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_
_**Donate $20.22 >>>**_
_**Donate $35 >>>**_
_**Donate $50 >>>**_
_**Donate $100 >>>**_
_**Donate $250 >>>**_
_**Donate $500 >>>**_
_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_
_**Donate ANY Amount >>>**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znn7ou3dcninmfpgoec2hshjheqokqqen85atfk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g6aor2c5h2bs)

Friend, your donation has a DIRECT impact on NTU's ability to fight for tax reform.

Why are we doing this?

NTU is working to build a freer and more prosperous America. Americans should be able to raise their families, start businesses, save for retirement, take vacations, all without the fear of overbearing government destroying their livelihood, or inflation stealing their wealth.

This isn't just about taxes. This is about building a better country that empowers free markets and free people to create value and enjoy their lives.

Please join the National Taxpayers Union by making a donation today.

Thank you,

Pete Sepp
President
National Taxpayers Union
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z2p788m013ouviph43olphtu0vlqmh4r20qqf2vo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3nahk1nput7bfnra0b8aqfn35hlnl53vtq5v8h0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g6aor2c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

body:
No one who attacked our country can ever be trusted to serve it, our people or our democracy.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40390880/324132269/-1995343361?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.10.04_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.05_b1_dvo-vid_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0ZTY2Yy01MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAB7Z6Sp1Vsl5Xm15JItLeAbTpZYkuPTQ1EMimDXPL0=)

Friends,

My opponent, Derrick Van Orden, was at the Capitol as a part of the insurrection on January 6th -- when people were killed, cops were beaten, and the American Republic was besieged.

No one who attacked our country can ever be trusted to serve it, our people or our democracy.

**[We released a new digital ad today highlighting Van Orden’s participation in the insurrection, and I want you to be among the first to see it. Everyone needs to know exactly where he was on that awful day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40390881/324132270/-870836711?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.05_b1_DVO-vid_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.05_b1_dvo-vid_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0ZTY2Yy01MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAB7Z6Sp1Vsl5Xm15JItLeAbTpZYkuPTQ1EMimDXPL0=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40390882/324132271/-870836711?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.05_b1_DVO-vid_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.05_b1_dvo-vid_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0ZTY2Yy01MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAB7Z6Sp1Vsl5Xm15JItLeAbTpZYkuPTQ1EMimDXPL0=) | [WATCH AND DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40390883/324132272/-870836711?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.05_b1_DVO-vid_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.05_b1_dvo-vid_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0ZTY2Yy01MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAB7Z6Sp1Vsl5Xm15JItLeAbTpZYkuPTQ1EMimDXPL0=)

The people I grew up with out here in western Wisconsin love this country, and that’s true whether they’re Republicans, Democrats or anything else. But let’s be clear, Derrick Van Orden is not a Republican, he’s an insurrectionist, and I can tell you this: we won’t send an insurrectionist to Congress.

**[Watch our ad, share with your friends, and chip in $5 if you can so we can make sure WI-03 voters know that Derrick Van Orden is an insurrectionist.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40390884/324132273/-870836711?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.05_b1_DVO-vid_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.05_b1_dvo-vid_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzU0ZTY2Yy01MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qAB7Z6Sp1Vsl5Xm15JItLeAbTpZYkuPTQ1EMimDXPL0=)**

Brad

name: Jane Hope Hamilton
subject: You're Invited: Campaign Launch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANE HOPE HAMILTON FOR CONGRESS
body:

subject: Starting 2022 with some amazing news →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress Christy Smith for Congress
body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391213/324133685/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZmMzk4Mi01NTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3tmd456I-5m8eWnhQXnLw5cMJTGZv1EJkx59iMQMT0=&emci=527f63c5-9b6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=496f3982-556e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=11385749)

Happy New Year, Peter!

I have some great news: With your support, we were able to hit our end-of-year goal, and I want to thank you for everything you did to get us there. I can't tell you how grateful I am for your continued support.

But we have some big news: Over the break, the redistricting maps were finalized and now, we're district CA-27!! Even bigger news: **Cook Political Report just listed us as one of the only true toss-up districts in the entire country.**

Dave Wasserman from Cook pointed out that CA-27 is one of the best chances to flip a red district blue.

**[Ready to flip CA-27 blue? We are too! Donate here to help us do it.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391214/324133686/1907459259?refcode=em21_220105_eoqty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZmMzk4Mi01NTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3tmd456I-5m8eWnhQXnLw5cMJTGZv1EJkx59iMQMT0=) ** **[FLIP CA-27 BLUE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391215/324133687/1907459259?refcode=em21_220105_eoqty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZmMzk4Mi01NTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3tmd456I-5m8eWnhQXnLw5cMJTGZv1EJkx59iMQMT0=) ** Although our district number has changed, my resolve to work for this community is exactly the same. Everything that is at stake for this district is still the same and the issues Mike Garcia has failed to address haven't changed at all.

When it comes down to it, the number of the district doesn't matter – I'm going to fight just the same.

Let's continue our fight for a brighter and better CA-27.

Wishing you a happy and blessed new year,

Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391216/324133688/1907459259?refcode=em21_220105_eoqty&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZmMzk4Mi01NTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3tmd456I-5m8eWnhQXnLw5cMJTGZv1EJkx59iMQMT0=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391217/324133689/1907459259?refcode=em21_220105_eoqty&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTZmMzk4Mi01NTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3tmd456I-5m8eWnhQXnLw5cMJTGZv1EJkx59iMQMT0=)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: The Legislature is back at it, again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please support my campaign to stand up to Beacon Hill's greed and lack of transparency.
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
Today, the state Legislature returns from its winter break and holds its first day of formal sessions for 2022.
It remains to be seen what state lawmakers ultimately will accomplish this year. But we do know a few things:

* Some state lawmakers are [making up to $220,000 a year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb0JxjzKDPc4jbU96Emrz9LBRQcMPJV1hGY9_xn3t1IrK1L4sCYRM-EGShmdr40HYE9pRvlwTm76Qk5ZLkZZDfn8tV8YRywxiphVItKC5Af3DJVgqDJedZEmoB4TjrBwRuIyHtUW0pPbGU8U8zb-ZY_BMv07-3y4gazxaY4n_vMLv78bB-0kD5PD5AuqSjvmf0VRmUlPnTks9YbBEe8wDt6II8Oa3WExpWsE5RtBz9UkR&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==), and it's likely they'll receive a [hefty pay raise](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb0JxjzKDPc4josAV73mY10KK3iYNef_tO9PX8mTGIPRZcEYqH9FeKVDM58k0X1AJcKAQszEAWYG3D2gvLloC29ZVN552sZZq7Wf8iyFfnAV5XNEvxnSb-infgDVIrEx3C7l-hppK0zgIxwxSEt24p_P3CzUqS_Fspei5y8eZ_wLaleiXXR3cU-8CbqOJbE1l8_ybSQFzIU72YjPhI2xY4FA=&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==) soon due to inflation. Meanwhile, the workings of the Legislature remain secluded in a State House that's been [closed to the public for almost two years](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb0JxjzKDPc4j2pds70_GpHC2hXggjNq-FO08nt1EexkmZChbIqz5SpezrTuV4tpppAzlmjzb2W1s8Wiw3TT4MsRKzZL96MmPVTPKC_VOAvjITACQ3L8y4xH3-HbCKH3xTD1FcjwTSxXgpG3uvrOyuEH8-D6Y8a-byRVQUF1cFIXWILrTvdtXGIJcPpnscVjAyUrjLORtkb3AdTT_ANzO9XeFxlDHyZfyPMHiU3A04HX6bSULBX0bFaKiFgwOoNToDlw7LSGXC0pN4vs8XBy0A5sGbgXcQcJ5kCb61TzPAgkB&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==). And, working families and small businesses across our state are[ struggling to make ends meet](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb0JxjzKDPc4jHqc-4CRB7x6mBFBvUIWAWTgjIH1utW3kj-ebB_pE7xzPM-0lTemtbrzy87QNb4aUNTEQz3s2AyGD4oQ9VNVnp-sKM1Dr76P2qBIbImZQTwOtZmPIkDp37iIRQCunM9k61vraLuebRUq4fElR09rdwJ0QpBymPRkMuF-ZODLQ_BguF4GbKiCcWs2tegY9RJZKBBJVKNgqvjAVtVD55PSn-g==&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==) amidst the very same inflationary pressure that allows lawmakers to collect more pay for themselves.

* But, that's not enough to satisfy a Legislature that recently went on a nearly $4 billion spending spree, including funding for many pet projects. Even though FY2021 [revenues exceeded initial estimates](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb0JxjzKDPc4j0iplFf1L_MMTFg8ou50XS1O1zC3qUPbUKEAotmWvIlzJL4VKi9m2TgtRMSOfBZJz94tYqQl5R3jDJhAUSFYpYQP7_IdCmtT_ypInXi9IFvHXNZqICMNL2rCzt2IoNK9X6AX24ThMto1sOn4iEA2NsapYKg797T3Bw_BzKsO3aQliSMZnz9Y0fzNQYrypxZb_uWw57uch_QZgFgDVdX6tVkfTd_T2_lks&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==) by billions of dollars, lawmakers voted overwhelmingly to push a [tax increase proposal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb0JxjzKDPc4jNAY3R-Tp8SIG5rklz4ok-s3s032wkIjB2ER2h6hJ8I9NgDFW82Jbii-exalg_8xgnryh1ruC6nbZXlAaw1xhpZLinliKGKE57w9o798pPmsAs2YrNWTXC8g6ZADc8X8UIz-UVKkTtCzNcnRV-FlFxGsGeaGdjqP1kL76rqla5KfxlHycI6Ic1kU7Ad1NdztUk2eivKdzLWLqT-AylieiTQ==&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==) as part of this year's ballot questions. And, small businesses are bracing for the possibility of future taxes as lawmakers still have not fully-addressed deficits in the state's unemployment insurance fund.

---
Am I missing something? Does this sound like the Legislature has its priorities in line with what most Massachusetts residents want? I think not.
I'm running for Governor to help hold the line. I'll stand up against pressure from the Legislature to spend money and raise taxes. Instead, I will work hard to make sure state policies work to the benefit of hard-working Massachusetts residents, small business owners, and their families.
---
But, in order to get there, I need your help.
If you agree that our next Governor needs to be someone who will stand up to Beacon Hill's greed and protect taxpayers and small businesses, will you please help our campaign? Please consider making a donation today:
---
---
| [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZSp95mcwIVy7RoHHNTqU9hZhZhonLQuydyKf2j4NM7nOAc_9HM2sb-yl9vaDWCeTk1suVtXXtXHttIzDtY3gRnyia5o9jhPaDLYbbjGlG1Y2qbuaOaaAMCV1nAgIu8gFt970sm1RG6RAlmUxwKsDoFEgYacuRE5-8uRYps1z2QZBm2H3q02cJQ==&c=4SdXVbOVaD5sC-JciyMtN0z9N9TpRcTkB9wuKtlsNOXtGoP8Wq-rJw==&ch=AsF2RTz2GlPOvy9DquCCfqcL1o1ZjePD1a1Jj5LcV7gzRM4fu-zfXQ==)
---
---
Thanks, as always, for your support!
---

Geoff Diehl Republican Candidate for Governor

It remains to be seen what state lawmakers ultimately will accomplish this year. But we do know a few things: Some state lawmakers are ==, and it's likely they'll receive a == soon due to inflation. Meanwhile, the workings of the Legislature remain secluded in a State House that's been ==. And, working families and small businesses across our state are== amidst the very same inflationary pressure that allows lawmakers to collect more pay for themselves. But, that's not enough to satisfy a Legislature that recently went on a nearly $4 billion spending spree, including funding for many pet projects. Even though FY2021 == by billions of dollars, lawmakers voted overwhelmingly to push a == as part of this year's ballot questions. And, small businesses are bracing for the possibility of future taxes as lawmakers still have not fully-addressed deficits in the state's unemployment insurance fund. Am I missing something? Does this sound like the Legislature has its priorities in line with what most Massachusetts residents want? I think not. I'm running for Governor to help hold the line. I'll stand up against pressure from the Legislature to spend money and raise taxes. Instead, I will work hard to make sure state policies work to the benefit of hard-working Massachusetts residents, small business owners, and their families. But, in order to get there, I need your help. If you agree that our next Governor needs to be someone who will stand up to Beacon Hill's greed and protect taxpayers and small businesses, will you please help our campaign? body:

We don't have much time to get some big changes... It's a lot to | "Yes! Defazio's retirement will be a blessing if we can get you into Congress! We need new leadership and Doyle, you have a large progressive movement that I believe will stand with you. We don't have much time to get some big changes... It's a lot to ask, but please run!"- T.T., Corvallis
---
_"Our country is facing the worst challenge to our democracy ever! If you choose to run, we cannot think of a better person. You have our support. Frightening/difficult times require strong rational leadership - this is critical now - you are our choice if you choose to run." - G. & V. R., Roseburg_
---
"Both the Republican party and the Democratic establishment, and all their investors, will fight against you, their only concerns are money and power - not what is best for America and the Planet. But, if you are willing to go for it I am behind you. Somebody needs to change the path we are on." - S.O., Eugene
---
"Dear Doyle, We would be thrilled to see you run again next year. We can't imagine a better candidate to take Peter's place. You truly represent what Oregonians stand for now and for the future of our state. You definitely have our support." \- N. R., North Bend
---
Dear Freinds,
---
Thank you for your outpouring of support in the last two weeks. I have been inundated with dozens of messages like these, taking them in while watching my children delight in the Christmas snowfall, making magical childhood memories in Oregon's natural wonderland. This has me** thinking hard about the future I want for them, and what is at stake for all of us in 2022.** I want a future for my children where they can breathe clean air in Eugene, drink clean water from the McKenzie, experience the awe of an old growth forest in the Coast Range, and eat Dungeness crab right off the boat in Florence. I want a future for my children where they can get an education without crippling debt, see a doctor or fill a prescription when they need to, and build a bright future in an America that lives up to the promise of a democracy with justice for all - no matter our skin color, first language, faith, or wealth. Where they can love whomever they choose, start families when and how they choose, and cast their ballot in free and fair elections, without fear of white nationalist political violence, like we saw one year ago on January 6. _This is the future we want for all of our children. It's the future we must build for our country. And right now, it's all on the line._ **That's why my next step is an [Exploratory Committee](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y0TiD2LFqyDZoCgu8R4O2v9q7UnwWv6Q40mxS5lbPeMs2Qsonz24deoLRdpCIVGQWASeTgxz1PSxpPqUOxjC5o4-iNVOnkz5rKDgADkhkRAItEm72vtSm2lK-58xKUtkcwPdVebD9MkQRQhYC2trdzXtxJBS4ctz90_ku8YLbwjnGR4RnG2JgfCq1NY_4uQN0vZ91Lj4Hw0qkpd5bNVHrpUn_WWcW-ilcMH1NYOglpOII3CS1N3XyUoxfPBjG00ifBzNlYP3-LGiZRyr2qVcFDYf59TbbEHP-_pnsftSXF6XJi_v4lGXYWMsx3pLaPc51a1elextY4WFAemPE93DkQ/3ig/0HMBegjOQPS5sKVZ5CGFOQ/h0/SGgBKLqbrDbHTufOrERJPzQaYu1L8LmcLhniTPriUQE) to assess if we have what it will take to mount a winning campaign together.** Before we make a final decision about running, we need to make sure we have the grassroots support to build a strong campaign that can transform our future. I am asking for your support right now. **I need everyone who donated in 2020 to give what you gave then -- and more if you can. I need everyone sitting on the sidelines to donate now too.** We need your support to know if we can build a movement powerful enough for this open primary.
