body:
RSVP to join me on January 10!
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391800/324136930/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=)

Hi! It’s Haley, Tom’s Deputy Campaign Manager.
I hope your 2022 is off to a great start, and you and your family had a safe and happy holiday season.
I wanted to make sure you received Tom’s note. On Monday, January 10, Team Tom is hosting a **[virtual reception with special guests Cecile Richards and Congresswoman Grace Meng](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391801/324136931/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**[**.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391802/324136932/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837) I hope you’ll be able to join us!
We have an incredible opportunity to **flip a Governor’s seat from red to blue,** and we need your help! **[Reserve your spot today to join Team Tom on Monday, January 10. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391803/324136933/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
Thanks for your support,
Haley Link Krogman
__________________________________________________
Dear Peter,
I wanted to reach out and personally invite you to join me for a**[virtual reception in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland on Monday, January 10 at 5:30 PM ET](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391804/324136934/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837). **
Since launching my campaign for Governor, I’ve been so honored to have the support of folks across the country. I’m especially thankful for the support of my friends **Cecile Richards** , former president of Planned Parenthood and co-founder of Supermajority, and **Congresswoman Grace Meng** , the first Asian-American woman elected to Congress from New York.
As President Biden often says, we are in the battle for the soul of our nation. Cecile’s work on reproductive rights and Congresswoman Meng’s tireless efforts on behalf of her constituents remind me that there’s nothing we can’t do **if we do it together.**
That's why I wanted to reach out and invite you to**[join us for a Virtual Conversation in support of my campaign for Governor of Maryland on Monday, January 10 at 5:30 PM.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391805/324136935/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)** While these are tough times for our democracy, I'm grateful for folks like you who've stepped up.
[**Virtual Conversation with Cecile Richards and Representative Grace Meng**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391806/324136936/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)
Monday, January 10, 2022 | 5:30 PM
**[RSVP Here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391807/324136937/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**
We need all hands on deck here in Maryland. **_[I hope you'll join us Monday, January 10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391809/324136939/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)_** to hear from these two inspirational women.
All the best,
Tom

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40391811/324136941/-380639616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzdmYTRkOS01OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Mfa1adMMyKON9duPeo_eBPN3TKk_zxDmGXby_DWUhU=&emci=e8372b92-9e6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cc7fa4d9-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14684837)**

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m proud to be an American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
_Sponsored message_
Looking forward to a great 2022.

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zji0olkjmlblds2a6gbkgvm3j5bshbg4d41mbsc8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g69oj2cph2bs)
---

Friend,

I’m so blessed to have been born in the greatest country in the history of the world. I can’t imagine growing up in any other nation and not having the opportunities and freedoms that our brave men and women of our armed forces have fought so long to protect.

I think as we get started in 2022, that we should all remember just how blessed we are to live in America. I think we should focus on working together and putting our best foot forward for America as a whole.
| [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT FOR A GREAT 2022](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdtshtodbvdrgge3qdvk7783g42um07ke9rmr4tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g69oj2cph2bs)
---

It’s an honor to have your support and an absolute honor to be able to fight every day for **EVERY. SINGLE. AMERICAN.**

I hope you’ll choose to continue supporting me as we enter a critical year for our nation. So, if you’re ready to move forward and make 2022 the best year we possibly can, I hope you’ll contribute what you can below to make 2022 a year that we’ll never forget.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: Victory will come
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- On the eve of the 1st anniversary of the January 6th Attack on the Capitol, it's a good time to reflect on one of the darkest days in American history. And that's just what I've done in our newest video: [](https://www.country1st.com/victory?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=2) | [](https://www.country1st.com/victory?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=3 "Watch Our NEW Video: ") [Watch Our NEW Video: "Victory Will Come"](https://www.country1st.com/victory?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=4)
---
The seed that has become Country First was planted that day, and led me to declare the "Republican Party has lost its way." One year later, sadly, the party's leaders have led it even farther from the truth.
I'll admit that I thought the insurrection would be a wake-up call to ALL Americans to turn their backs to Trump and his enablers; to the lies and conspiracies. But that huge wave of Republicans didn't materialize. Instead, an unexpected surprise: A massive group of reasonable people of goodwill, from all walks of life and political viewpoints, came together to say "WE will save our country." Among us are Republicans, Democrats, and Independents; conservatives, moderates, and progressives. There's plenty we disagree about, but we're united where it truly counts.
**We've put our Country before Party. We are Country First.**
And as we move into 2022, I've never been more optimistic about what this movement can do to defend democracy, vanquish autocracy, and inspire millions more to join us in this quest to save the republic we all love so dearly.
We will do this by:
* Calling out those who seek to divide us from the truth and each other for their own selfish gain;
* Waking up reasonable people of goodwill to their power as the real majority;
* Giving them hope that change can happen, proven solutions and real opportunity are possible, and that things don’t have to continue getting worse for our kids and grandkids;
* Inspiring them to join the fight, in a race against time, before the slide toward extremism is irreversible; and finally
* Launching a first-of-its-kind operation to take-on the most toxic partisans in Congress where it counts the most -- the primaries.

A year ago, I never would have imagined writing you this email -- and perhaps you never imagined you'd be reading it. But here we are, working together to save this grand experiment for future generations. This is the fight of our lives -- and I'm glad to have you, and every member of this movement, beside me. Thank you, sincerely.
Country First,
Adam
_PS: Please help me spread this message far and wide, and encourage your likeminded friends and family to learn more about the amazing work we're doing together. Here's the link to the video:[https://www.country1st.com/victory](https://www.country1st.com/victory?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=5)_
Paid for by Country First
---
Country First · PO Box 2385, Ottawa, IL 61350, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.country1st.com/unsubscribe?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jan6_anni_nd&n=7), software for leaders.

body:

Marco Rubio and the GOP know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to keep control of the Senate. That's why they're pouring money into Florida to try and buy this seat – no matter how much it takes.

name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: I’m personally asking again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend: One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more.

But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority.

**But here’s the deal: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR!**

**Right now, CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.**

**So I need to ask:[Will you give $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before midnight tonight – to my reelection campaign and the DSCC so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue delivering for our country?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=17&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20220105-ReverendRaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandemV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220105-ReverendRaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandemV2-Pros-sl1&akid=2469%2E9716520%2ER51rQf)**

As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history.

But with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control.**[So will you give $5 or more now – before the critical midnight deadline – to help me win in Georgia, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and keep Georgia blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=18&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20220105-ReverendRaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandemV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220105-ReverendRaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandemV2-Pros-sl1&akid=2469%2E9716520%2ER51rQf)**If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Raphael Warnock and the DSCC. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=19&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20220105-ReverendRaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandemV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20220105-ReverendRaphaelWarnock-WarnockTandemV2-Pros-sl1&akid=2469%2E9716520%2ER51rQf)

body:
It doesn't have to be if you join my team today! [](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=7543d9f80f5d4a91bd3c34eef6a6623b&_e=7Ycvspsvn-vjj5siHt2GmawVmMZTs9qUeUy3EUbtYKjFKKIylTGFo6ph0DEwllaCam2dyyfC2iJHHSYeFWfDXHQynKRhRKX4pSkn5pZh-hlfLkgy3v16XIW4pWsip9NB3lJFeA-RYpvw4IVFR0tGbXqOwovUhRq1H94PLFPfInl6CFHm7MYan3Ch04fEDVWIJfD57kA0kmLunZNyoVfDUbcqputED-sc17rxoRP6FtWYM5DMNkrt0YMVsk83TO8-VisRhs6y-bRwYz9jbNaKAePUbeHeHZcEK-6Os8Gg782isvuYD7wb1CLuu0XNlrLZZ0uzBkwIsfJ52qZkyOlpWA%3D%3D) I’m sure you’ve seen the headlines, but even if you haven’t, you’ve definitely noticed prices on **everything** rapidly increasing. _**Inflation is all the way up to 6.8% – the highest it's been in 31 years!**_ Floridians are paying more than we have in a long time, whether it be groceries or gas. Record high inflation couldn’t accelerate at a worse time — reaching new heights following an already expensive holiday season that can be financially trying even in the best of times. Don't forget — it's not just consumers who are feeling the pinch.**_73% of small businesses say they STILL haven't recovered from the pandemic. _** While larger businesses can take a few hits, our proud but small businesses here in Florida are struggling in the Biden Economy. **[Sign my petition below to tell President Biden that you are tired of his failing economic policies!](http://links.erikabenfieldforcongress.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=7543d9f80f5d4a91bd3c34eef6a6623b&_e=7Ycvspsvn-vjj5siHt2GmawVmMZTs9qUeUy3EUbtYKjFKKIylTGFo6ph0DEwllaCam2dyyfC2iJHHSYeFWfDXHQynKRhRKX4pSkn5pZh-hmIb2M_Ag8Vk3wHIvPCBoVRglnaJGddjvBtScL7PdXrXY1NgX5A1e2oLnM_jEp_7he093KdESGzAkrw2OaBQEoceFEGXXeHrVvcod--MZ9oDndDKftImAgMNX24PHDOtAp-v-caiJPgdZ5ClkItl04n5ZX076QnCZbpxJ7oupmxtOaKe3BMru0F4Dv5jWIR7d8e4Y8YL7RQz7U5ztXanFEeDpw2p7w6pjJcGxqYkkzTxw%3D%3D)** [**> > SIGN MY PETITION NOW <<

Inflation is all the way up to 6.8% – the highest it's been in 31 years! Floridians are paying more than we have in a long time, whether it be groceries or gas. Record high inflation couldn’t accelerate at a worse time — reaching new heights following an already expensive holiday season that can be financially trying even in the best of times. Don't forget — it's not just consumers who are feeling the pinch.73% of small businesses say they STILL haven't recovered from the pandemic. While larger businesses can take a few hits, our proud but small businesses here in Florida are struggling in the Biden Economy. Republicans have fought hard against the far Left's agenda, but Joe Biden has made it his mission to cut us off at every turn. Thank you, Erika Benfield Republican candidate for Congress, FL-07 | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Erika Benfield for Congress

subject: I’m proud to be an American

body:
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Looking forward to a great 2022.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv59egvtn9mqa46bbluc806rlvq51o7ppeop9v3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g69oj2clh2bs)
---

Friend,

I’m so blessed to have been born in the greatest country in the history of the world. I can’t imagine growing up in any other nation and not having the opportunities and freedoms that our brave men and women of our armed forces have fought so long to protect.

I think as we get started in 2022, that we should all remember just how blessed we are to live in America. I think we should focus on working together and putting our best foot forward for America as a whole.
| [RUSH YOUR SUPPORT FOR A GREAT 2022](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdm56tlvt4cqvvtjvc5jo0a6qfm08l5ruc2gssq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5g69oj2clh2bs)

It’s an honor to have your support and an absolute honor to be able to fight every day for **EVERY. SINGLE. AMERICAN.**

I hope you’ll choose to continue supporting me as we enter a critical year for our nation. So, if you’re ready to move forward and make 2022 the best year we possibly can, I hope you’ll contribute what you can below to make 2022 a year that we’ll never forget.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: one year later, our democracy remains in peril
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
The January 6th attack on our Capitol was an unprecedented attack on the peaceful certification of our democratic election results incited by a sitting president in an effort to retain power illegally. It was, to be blunt, an attempted coup. And it will go down in history as a critical juncture for our democracy. As we learn more about the events leading up to and including that day, it’s clear the outcome was far from certain. Had it not been for the Capitol Hill police and heroes like Officer Goodman, as well as the D.C. police and the National Guard, the certification vote might have been stopped. It’s an alarming reality that one year later the threat to our democracy has only grown. While the Capitol itself is now more secure, our democracy isn’t. The Republican Party has refused to denounce the Big Lie that fed the attack. Instead, when the coup at the Capitol failed, Republican-controlled state legislatures began passing voter suppression laws across the country that are especially designed to make it more difficult for people of color and younger voters to access the ballot box — and even include provisions that empower partisan officials to overturn the people's vote. These laws represent nothing less than a coordinated attempt to usurp our electoral process and gain undue influence over the outcome of the upcoming 2022 and 2024 elections. The failure of Republican senators to convict Donald Trump at his impeachment trial for his role in the January 6 attack — and for his failure to use his powers to stop the violence — was unconscionable. But the Republican party's actions since that time may be even more destructive for our future. Over the last year the Republican party, with a handful of exceptions, has overwhelmingly made it clear that going forward they will stand with Donald Trump over our Constitution and the rule of law. Like Trump's compatriot, Prime Minister Viktor Orban in Hungary, whose cruel and authoritarian rule Trump just publicly endorsed again yesterday, they have turned their back on democratic principles. Never since the civil war has our democracy been in such peril. That's why this is a moment that calls for decisive action. January is the make or break month for passing two measures critical to protecting our democratic electoral process. Republicans oppose both measures. That is why it is essential that we muster fifty Senate Democratic votes to reform the filibuster rule. The current rule runs contrary to the original vision of the Senate as a place where we have vigorous and long debates, but where a majority vote ultimately prevails. We must reform our filibuster rules to achieve that original intent and protect our democracy. This will require complete unanimity in our Senate Democratic Caucus and we will vote on or before January 17th. While we survived January 6th, our democracy is still very much at risk. We can't afford to wait in taking action. History is watching and will remember how we responded at this critical juncture. Onwards, Chris
* * *

clean_body: | | The January 6th attack on our Capitol was an unprecedented attack on the peaceful certification of our democratic election results incited by a sitting president in an effort to retain power illegally. It was, to be blunt, an attempted coup. And it will go down in history as a critical juncture for our democracy. As we learn more about the events leading up to and including that day, it’s clear the outcome was far from certain. Had it not been for the Capitol Hill police and heroes like Officer Goodman, as well as the D.C. police and the National Guard, the certification vote might have been stopped. It’s an alarming reality that one year later the threat to our democracy has only grown. While the Capitol itself is now more secure, our democracy isn’t. The Republican Party has refused to denounce the Big Lie that fed the attack. Instead, when the coup at the Capitol failed, Republican-controlled state legislatures began passing voter suppression laws across the country that are especially designed to make it more difficult for people of color and younger voters to access the ballot box — and even include provisions that empower partisan officials to overturn the people's vote. These laws represent nothing less than a coordinated attempt to usurp our electoral process and gain undue influence over the outcome of the upcoming 2022 and 2024 elections. The failure of Republican senators to convict Donald Trump at his impeachment trial for his role in the January 6 attack — and for his failure to use his powers to stop the violence — was unconscionable. But the Republican party's actions since that time may be even more destructive for our future. Over the last year the Republican party, with a handful of exceptions, has overwhelmingly made it clear that going forward they will stand with Donald Trump over our Constitution and the rule of law. Like Trump's compatriot, Prime Minister Viktor Orban in Hungary, whose cruel and authoritarian rule Trump just publicly endorsed again yesterday, they have turned their back on democratic principles. Never since the civil war has our democracy been in such peril. That's why this is a moment that calls for decisive action. January is the make or break month for passing two measures critical to protecting our democratic electoral process. Republicans oppose both measures. That is why it is essential that we muster fifty Senate Democratic votes to reform the filibuster rule. The current rule runs contrary to the original vision of the Senate as a place where we have vigorous and long debates, but where a majority vote ultimately prevails. We must reform our filibuster rules to achieve that original intent and protect our democracy. This will require complete unanimity in our Senate Democratic Caucus and we will vote on or before January 17th. While we survived January 6th, our democracy is still very much at risk. We can't afford to wait in taking action. History is watching and will remember how we responded at this critical juncture. Onwards, Chris * | Grassroots supporters like you help our campaign make the investments it will take to re-elect Chris in 2022 and protect our Democratic Senate majority: | = | = ---|--- PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate Van Hollen for Senate | 10605 Concord Street, Suite 202 | Kensington, MD, 20895 If you need to, click to receive only our most important emails or you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r) | |
---
Peter, in just the last few years, we've seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn't helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That's why today, I'm officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

**[STAND WITH RAND: CHIP IN TO SUPPORT RE-ELECTION >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r)**

I know this race won't be easy -- we have tough challenges ahead.
** **
The bureaucrats in our government, the pro-censorship leaders in big-tech, and the anti-freedom liberals in the media will do anything they can to make sure we don't succeed.
** **
That's why I want to start off with a big goal - to make sure we're prepared for whatever comes next. I'm pledging today to raise $100,000 for the launch of this campaign and I hope you'll join me by chipping in now.
__
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $15**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r)
[**LAUNCH DONATION: $45**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r)
The stakes are just too high to let the liberals maintain control in Washington.

You're already feeling the damage they've done!

* Gas prices are up 40%
* Groceries cost up to 6% more
* Rent, cars, and energy prices are skyrocketing
* _Americans are struggling. _

It's hitting us hard all over the nation.

And here in Kentucky, where we're recovering not only from a pandemic but a statewide natural disaster, we simply cannot afford to continue down this path.

We must correct the course now. And we can do that by taking back the Senate and restoring a common-sense, pro-freedom approach to government.

**_Let 's not forget: we only need one seat to take control. _**

And I'm 100% confident that if we stand together now we can take a stand for liberty and win that one seat to take back the Senate in 2022.

Please, chip in what you can to make our launch a success and start this year off the right way: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3476970/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59174877:J5Rl9lENE:m:1:3253819041:77E320542B112CA90B50B69A3C21DE52:r)**

Thank you in advance.

In liberty,
Rand Paul
__

name: live-poll@abbyfinkenauer.com
subject: Do you think it's time to fire Louis DeJoy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter – After constant grassroots pressure against Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, the USPS thankfully made it through the holiday season with improved on-time deliveries and minimal delays.
**But our Postal Service won't truly be safe from further cuts and delays until DeJoy – one of the few remaining vestiges of Trump's corrupt and incompetent administration – is finally gone.**
That day can't come soon enough for rural Americans who rely on the Postal Service nor for the millions of Americans counting on the USPS for medications, critical services and more. Here in Iowa, Democrat Abby Finkenauer knows exactly how important the USPS and our postal workers are to rural communities.
After the terrible derecho hit Iowa in 2020, Abby spoke to her postal worker, Tony, while he was still covering his route amidst downed trees and power lines. He told Abby about a woman on his route who broke down when he delivered her insulin. She didn't have a generator or any way to keep it cold – so Tony went home and brought her his.
**Abby understands that we need to keep improving and EXPAND – not shrink – the Postal Service, and that starts with firing Louis DeJoy. **
Grassroots action from people like you is working,__ but Abby needs your help to keep the pressure up. **Please, will you respond to her live poll before 11:59 p.m. tonight to make your voice heard? She still needs another 2,398 people to speak up. **
**Every response gets us one step closer to showing DeJoy the door and protecting the USPS, so please let us know:**
**Do you think it's time to fire Louis DeJoy?**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema don’t want to change the rules
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

As soon as Democrats took control of the Senate, ending the filibuster
should have been their top priority. Now, it’s a crisis point for the
Democratic majority.

Senate Democrats have finally decided to vote to change filibuster rules
in order to pass voting rights. That’s good news, but there are two
problems.

1) Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema don’t want to change the rules if
there’s no Republican support. They’re willing to throw away critical
voting rights legislation.

2) This potential filibuster change won’t end the filibuster. It won’t
allow other progressive legislation, like bills to codify Roe v. Wade,
protect LGBTQIA+ rights, and address racial inequality, pass with a simple
majority. Ending the filibuster is the only way we can pass these types of
bills.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88677?refcode=em20220105-21327&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl ]Senate Democrats must stop empowering Republicans. They must finally
end the filibuster. Can you chip in $3 right now to fuel
our continued fight to end the filibuster?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88677?refcode=em20220105-21327&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl ]Contribute $3

Six months ago, Mitch McConnell and the GOP used the filibuster to block
the For The People Act. That was a big opportunity to secure historic
voting rights protections as Republicans across the country pass more
voter suppression laws.

Why has it taken so long for Senate Democrats to act? And will Manchin and
Sinema block even the most basic filibuster reform? This may be our last
chance for voting rights.

Until we transform the Democratic Party to unequivocally fight for the
people and take bold action like ending the filibuster, this country is in
trouble.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88677?refcode=em20220105-21327&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl ]If you’re sick of the GOP blocking change and Democrats refusing to
end the filibuster, donate $3 or more today to fuel our
work to end the filibuster.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88677?refcode=em20220105-21327&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl ]Contribute

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220105-21327-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21327_1203867_C21GVl&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=21327%2E1203867%2EC21GVl

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janice=20McGeachin=20for=20Idaho=20Governor?=
subject: Our Campaign is Strong and Growing Stronger!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Janice for Idaho, Machele Hamilton Treasurer [unsubscribe](https://janicemcgeachin
body:
The McGeachin for Governor Campaign to #MakeIdahoFreeAgain had a great 2021. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/janicemcgeachin/01-04-2021?e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [ ](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=375042635a&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | Happy New Year! We are blessed to have abundant snowfall this winter, which will serve our state well over the coming year. [**Click Here**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=8a0eb3aae6&e=823fa8e224) to watch my New Year's video message on Facebook. The McGeachin for Governor Campaign to **#MakeIdahoFreeAgain** had a **GREAT** 2021\. We raised just shy of **$500,000** in donations from more than **1,100** donors! We have more than **1,000** statewide volunteers who have signed up to participate in our campaign. On social media, we had a banner year, reaching more than **11 million** people on Facebook with our message of individual liberty and personal freedom. On Twitter, we had approximately **6.4 million** impressions. It appears that Freedom is popular in Idaho! We look forward to reaching even more people with our positive message in 2022.
* * *
This year, the Legislature will convene on January 10th at noon, and I will again be serving my constitutional duty as the President of the Senate. **Capitol Clarity** will also resume this session, with our first meeting of the year scheduled for Thursday, January 13, 2022. I hope to see you there! _(Please remember that this is NOT a political event, though, so please leave your campaign gear at home. Thank you!)_
* * *
Unfortunately, this New Year's Eve, we saw again just how important it is to have a Governor who stands up for your personal liberty. Visitors to downtown Boise might have mistaken it for New York or Los Angeles when they faced demands to show their vaccine passports as they attempted to enjoy the festivities at the Idaho Potato Drop. While serving as Acting Governor earlier this year, I issued an executive order that would have prevented all government entities in Idaho from imposing vaccine mandates. Opposing this protection of personal choice, Gov. Little took swift action to strip Idahoans of their freedoms and to reimpose vaccine mandates in Idaho. **Vaccine mandates have no place in a free society, and no Idahoan should ever face discrimination, denial of service, or loss of employment due to their personal medical decision to forgo a vaccine.** Under a McGeachin administration, defending your personal health choices will always be a top priority! As I've traveled across the state, I've spoken to recent arrivals from Washington and California who moved here to escape the destructive liberal policies that ruined their home states. They warn us that Idaho is heading in the same direction. As our campaign shifts into overdrive for 2022, it is more important than ever that we maximize our opportunity to reach Idahoans about the critical decisions they face in the 2022 Primary Election. Will you please join the campaign to **#MakeIdahoFreeAgain** by donating [**$25**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=32afeadab9&e=823fa8e224), [**$50**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=08f3c15add&e=823fa8e224), [**$100**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=a3653c2989&e=823fa8e224), or even [**$500**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=b6f75d64a1&e=823fa8e224) today, so that we can safeguard our state from turning into the next California or New York?
---
| [DONATE Today!](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e48d429bee&e=823fa8e224 "DONATE Today!")
---
| With your help, we will engineer a conservative victory in May that will **#MakeIdahoFreeAgain!**
---
| Blessings,
Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor
---
| **P.S.** Please [**DONATE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=49b612b96c&e=823fa8e224) if you are able, [**VISIT OUR CAMPAIGN STORE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=7c3673400a&e=823fa8e224) to see our unique merchandise, [**LIKE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=d46d2ee6cc&e=823fa8e224) and [**FOLLOW**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=88a3efe574&e=823fa8e224) us on social media, and [**VISIT OUR WEBSITE**](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=e91eb52e1b&e=823fa8e224) to learn about some of the other ways you can get involved with the Janice McGeachin for Idaho Governor Campaign.
---
| | | | | | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=85f0c8ed65&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=ed4a10ff5d&e=823fa8e224)
---
| | [](https://janicemcgeachin.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=75545c0bb4a66af3c4692bc0e&id=9eb5a7adf4&e=823fa8e224)
---

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: The Yes Man
body:
At least his votes are consistent
---
| | | | | | Volume 23 | January 5, 2022
---
|
---
| A Word From Erik
---
| | |
---|---
|
Ed Perlmutter seems like a nice guy, but maybe you don't really know him.

Scan his voting record in the last year, and you won't find a "no" vote. That's because Ed Perlmutter is a "yes man" for Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden.

Every time he cast a vote, Ed voted yes to bills pushed through by House Democrats and voted 95% of the time with Nancy Pelosi.. Apparently, Ed thinks that what's good for California is good for Colorado. I disagree.

Ed has consistently voted to approve pork-filled spending bills, including the most notorious in recent history, the Build Back Better act. Build Back Better is an explosion of government spending on social programs. If he cares so much about Colorado families, why didn't he take the approach of Democrat Sen. Joe Manchin when presented with the bill? Here's what Joe Manchin had to say:

"My Democratic colleagues in Washington are determined to dramatically reshape our society in a way that leaves our country even more vulnerable to the threats we face," Manchin said. "I cannot take that risk with a staggering debt of more than $29 trillion and inflation taxes that are real and harmful to every hard-working American at the gasoline pumps, grocery stores and utility bills with no end in sight."

Ed Perlmutter is no Joe Manchin but rather a yes-man to Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden.

Ed has also voted to further restrict law-abiding citizens from their right to bear arms. How is this in any way a good thing for Coloradans as we see crime skyrocketing?

That's why I am challenging Ed Perlmutter to a debate on the issues this January. By doing so, Ed must answer to voters on crushing inflation, rising crime and an education system that is leaving our children behind.

No matter what your political affiliation--Republican, Democrat or Unaffiliated--you recognize something has to change.

I will bring about the change we need in Washington. I will support legislation that benefits Coloradans and oppose those that don't. Send me to Congress so I can stand for you and tell Ed Perlmutter it's time to go home.
|
---
| | |
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---|---
|
We're back on the road this week as I visit with voters in Salida and Buena Vista.
On Friday I will join Peter Boyles to discuss the race in Congressional District 7 (see Upcoming Events below).
Next week, I travel to Washington to discuss with Congressional leaders the issues important to Colorado.

I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail!
| | |
---
| Every bit can help
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization.
There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today.
Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff

clean_body: At least his votes are consistent | | | | | | Volume 23 | January 5, 2022 | | A Word From Erik | | | ---|--- | Ed Perlmutter seems like a nice guy, but maybe you don't really know him. Scan his voting record in the last year, and you won't find a "no" vote. That's because Ed Perlmutter is a "yes man" for Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. Every time he cast a vote, Ed voted yes to bills pushed through by House Democrats and voted 95% of the time with Nancy Pelosi.. Apparently, Ed thinks that what's good for California is good for Colorado. I disagree. Ed has consistently voted to approve pork-filled spending bills, including the most notorious in recent history, the Build Back Better act. Build Back Better is an explosion of government spending on social programs. If he cares so much about Colorado families, why didn't he take the approach of Democrat Sen. Joe Manchin when presented with the bill? Here's what Joe Manchin had to say: "My Democratic colleagues in Washington are determined to dramatically reshape our society in a way that leaves our country even more vulnerable to the threats we face," Manchin said. "I cannot take that risk with a staggering debt of more than $29 trillion and inflation taxes that are real and harmful to every hard-working American at the gasoline pumps, grocery stores and utility bills with no end in sight." Ed Perlmutter is no Joe Manchin but rather a yes-man to Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden. Ed has also voted to further restrict law-abiding citizens from their right to bear arms. How is this in any way a good thing for Coloradans as we see crime skyrocketing? That's why I am challenging Ed Perlmutter to a debate on the issues this January. By doing so, Ed must answer to voters on crushing inflation, rising crime and an education system that is leaving our children behind. No matter what your political affiliation--Republican, Democrat or Unaffiliated--you recognize something has to change. I will bring about the change we need in Washington. I will support legislation that benefits Coloradans and oppose those that don't. Send me to Congress so I can stand for you and tell Ed Perlmutter it's time to go home. | | | | | Campaign Update | | ---|--- | We're back on the road this week as I visit with voters in Salida and Buena Vista. On Friday I will join Peter Boyles to discuss the race in Congressional District 7 (see Upcoming Events below). Next week, I travel to Washington to discuss with Congressional leaders the issues important to Colorado. I sincerely hope to see you soon on the trail! | | | | Every bit can help | Erik's effort to represent Colorado is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive. No generations of beer barons, or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. There's just us...and you. Anything you can spare will help Erik secure the nomination. Please consider a donation today. Help Erik right this ship! Join the cause and share what you can spare. With our gratitude, Aadland for Colorado Staff | | | | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events Thursday Jan 6: Erik will appear on the Jimmy Lakey Radio Show. name: Reverend Raphael Warnock
subject: 1 year since my election in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend: One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more.
But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority.
**But here’s the deal, friend: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR!**
**Right now, CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.**
**So I need to ask:[Will you split a donation of $3 or more right now between my reelection campaign and Mark Kelly’s so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue delivering for our country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-jan22?refcode=em220105-1-7&t=1&refcode2=1899_6688874_19QRx2&akid=1899%2E6688874%2E19QRx2)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history.
But with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control. [**So will you split $3 or more between Mark’s campaign and mine to help me win in Georgia, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and keep Georgia blue?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-warnock-jan22?refcode=em220105-1-7&t=2&refcode2=1899_6688874_19QRx2&akid=1899%2E6688874%2E19QRx2)
Thank you, friend. It's going to take all of us coming together to win this.
– Reverend Raphael Warnock

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1899%2E6688874%2E19QRx2).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: We can’t afford to lose this Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BILLY LONG FOR SENATE
body:
The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are direct
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsiqjcn1in7rn6br66oacb6fgsd793q4thak6poo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onh6op72cph64ojad5keqrbddbgctj60t9iemqm2cb3mtgbcs37morrfchnc5h7fduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cdb4mdh60tj2cor6eddm6uobapbi4no)
|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7dtdcecnj88damev33hjao6g5tu47b6aolk16j0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)

---
Fellow Conservative,

You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. T**he increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America,** which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington.

_Their top target?_ Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. **We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long.**

[**I’ve already joined Billy on the campaign trail, and plan to continue, but need grassroots conservatives like you to join us.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhs0108mb40b5pjav0nrsd3gcf1mu769ibusfuf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu89eqqlgvcb66nt9hu31gj07iu34dre4uoeucgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)
Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the _TOUGHEST_ Senate races in the country. [**Will you join me by chipping in $10 or more right now to Billy Long for Senate?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt8ot0ha7g68pjjv1td43af629rhfbs2g4iq0dvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1fj2p6d7l1fhi6halvv0tm8hnrhtijus9cv7hfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)
>From day one in Washington, **Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States.** He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. **His loyalty to the American people has never wavered.**

_I’m writing to tell you this:_ **If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp.** His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, **but he’s never been of Washington.**

He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life.

_Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right?_ **Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first.** That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative.

This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. [**The only way we’re going to be able to keep Missouri in Republican hands is if conservatives like you join our team right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zph9ocv3soa2u4itm77es0dgs3hbtr2r4f26a098_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)

[** SUPPORT BILLY LONG NOW ➞ **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znjg087dht7ftktd628q5qrdf930gv7b9ag1mco0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)
Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. **Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri.**

They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. [**Fellow Conservative, that’s why I am counting on you to step up immediately, asking that you give generously to ensure my friend Billy Long has the resources he needs to keep Missouri RED for the Republican Party.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zijc3pjq056ofeq8sdc2hl9339us1fehal1kmkao_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i64o71cph2bs)

Thank you,

Kellyanne Conway
Former Counselor to President Donald J. Trump

clean_body: The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are direct | Fellow Conservative, You and I have fought together for freedom for years now. The increasingly radical Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America, which is why they are directing all their resources towards breaking the 50-50 Senate tie and increasing their power in Washington. Their top target? Missouri’s soon-to-be vacated U.S. Senate seat currently held by a Republican. America, and Missouri, literally cannot afford for the Democrats to come in and take this seat. We must band together and support a rock-solid conservative who is prepared for the job - Missouri’s own, Congressman Billy Long. Your support is vital to not only Billy Long, but the Republican Party in what’s set to be one of the TOUGHEST Senate races in the country. From day one in Washington, Billy fought to implement the America First Agenda by standing up to Communist China and encouraging American companies to expand right here in the United States. He has cut taxes and regulations, and helped small businesses thrive. Billy is a friend to the unborn, our military veterans and law enforcement. His loyalty to the American people has never wavered. I’m writing to tell you this: If we put Billy Long in the U.S. Senate, we won’t have to worry about him giving into the swamp. His vote will be for you. What you see is what you get. He’s been in Washington for 10 years, but he’s never been of Washington. He’s not just talking the talk, like the power-hungry Democrats do. Billy passed legislation to release Missourian workers from unnecessary government regulations, improving their economic situation and quality of life. Sounds like the opposite of what the radical-Democrats are doing in Washington, right? Because unlike Joe Biden, Kamala Harris or Chuck Schumer, Billy understands that Americans should ALWAYS come first. That’s the type of Republican we need fighting for us, Fellow Conservative. This race is going to be competitive and it will certainly be one of the most expensive battles we see this cycle. Even President Trump is confident that we can and will take back the Senate, but that plan becomes increasingly difficult if the Democrats swoop in and buy and lie their way into one of our red-state seats. Let me tell you, Democrats already have their eyes and pocketbooks set on Missouri. They aren’t wasting any time using big corporations and dark-money donors to pad their campaign accounts. | | Let me be clear, Derek. Voting rights – and the very fabric of our democracy – are under attack. There is a clear solution in front of us right now in the Senate – pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. But with Senate Republicans and the threat of a filibuster blocking our efforts, it’s time to reform the filibuster to get this done. **_[I want all of my colleagues to see how fired up folks in Virginia and across the country are about the Senate finally passing voting rights. Will you add your name to the list now and tell the Senate to bypass the filibuster and enact legislation protecting voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40393580/324148763/1996830185?ms=mw_em_220105_1&refcode=mw_em_220105_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDk0YjliYy02MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_LhVBOaAyPXNQJmJ6vpzT1YNLHOLLJP-sv3uN8N0L1k=&emci=83cd856b-436e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3d94b9bc-636e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=4568237)_** We cannot make voting rights a top priority in the Senate with the standard filibuster rule in place. Republicans will continue to block the legislation. The only way to address voting rights is to enable a simple majority to pass these bills. **Derek, if we made an exception to the filibuster for the debt ceiling, then why can’t we do the same for voting rights legislation? ** It’s time to treat these grave threats to democracy with proper urgency. body:
Since leaving Congress two years ago, I have made it my mission to help elect aggressive new leaders and activists who will pick up the...
| [ ](https://email.baxterforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/OR+113/d2p7Ng04/VWVmSV42Jlb6W36RNjz27HKZwW2lg-cV4CZ5kRN5GS5Sm3lLBGV1-WJV7CgL-xW1p7X-w98NNlcW5GhF066TgCLTVh4yPh6qpnWVW2CDQcW69VpY1VnV2DF64D21RW3Wl6LN8N9RkNM_czfhCSpMpW273ZR_1VZX6VW8sXTyJ7vrmNfW30zzrR4p2k_LN3_s2lXZDssjW4MFNZW2rngk8N3DVlNGCFjtSV6_6Yw8wBXx9N26ClPrZmtLxW8WRbnX61vGSDN7fdQjxqnHJhW8NQf4x4yPd6DW4fL-p94MYxD8W1P0Wr154KXz1W7Hqm0V7k4Jh-W4vRXMX8FKV7JW4bQfFB5VWhWyW25NWKq17Fnwp3pcr1)
---
Peter,

I served as an uncompromising Patriot in Congress for 30 years and had the great honor of playing a significant role in achieving the goals set out by two great Presidents: Ronald Reagan and Donald J. Trump. The battles now raging on Capitol Hill and across our country will determine whether our blessed America remains the land of liberty and opportunity for which we Americans have always considered our birthright. Well, it isn’t. Every generation has earned it again and again defeating enemies of liberty be they foreign or domestic. If any generation decides to sit out the fight and not get involved in the upcoming battle... the dream of our forefathers and mothers will be lost forever. Since leaving Congress two years ago, I have made it my mission to help elect aggressive new leaders and activists who will pick up the torch and carry on the legacy of Reagan and Trump. It is up to us now. The voters need to be offered candidates who are hard working patriots who won’t sell out their principles or their fellow Americans. America needs champions who are proudly dedicated to our Constitution with its Bill of Rights and who are absolutely committed to put America first and put the interest of the American people over any other concerns. It is now up to us to save our country from the globalists, the Marxists and others who would burn our flag and trash our American way of life. Together we can win the battle and secure our liberty, but we must start right now. The America-First movement desperately needs back up. Fortunately, you and I can help elect one of the youngest pro-America freedom fighters to Congress in 2022. [I am endorsing Tim Baxter for Congress in New Hampshire. clean_body: | | | | Are you coming to Florida? | Friend, The Democrats and Joe Biden are COMPLETELY out-of-touch with the American people. They continue to ignore US while allowing the media and Hollywood to say whatever they are told. Think about it, Joe Biden and liberal Lisa Murkowski have been in office together for over 20 years, and they still HAVE NOT made good on their promises. It is time for a change. I want to hear what YOU have to say! That is why I am inviting you to join me for a very personal experience at President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago, in beautiful Palm Beach, Florida. This experience includes your hotel, flight, ticket to the event, and a picture with President Trump! Since we launched our campaign to defeat Liberal Lisa Murkowski and gain a true Republican majority in the Senate, you have stood by my side. And if we win, I can thank you IN PERSON for your support. We are picking a winner soon, and I hope it’s YOU! Kelly For Alaska Republican Candidate United States Senate | | | | ==

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action Alert: Save the filibuster, save our elections!
body:
| |
---
Senate Democrats are moving once again to gut the filibuster and pass their radical, federal takeover of our elections.

They know that decentralized, state-run elections (as was intended by our Founders) are a threat to their power. They know that states implementing election integrity measures are a threat to their power.

So, in their quest to cement their total power over America, they are trying to take total control over every election in the nation. This is such a radical change of such immense magnitude, and yet, they want to make this change with barely a majority by changing the filibuster to allow it to pass with 51 votes.

The filibuster exists so that the bills that are passed are supported by most Americans, not just a small, extremist subset of one party.

And don’t think for one second that the Democrats will stop at passing “The Freedom to Cheat Act” if they change the filibuster rule. They will pass every crazy, radical policy that they’ve been trying to pass for the last several decades.

The call-to-action is to contact your Senators to tell them to leave the filibuster alone and vote no on S. 2747 – “The Freedom to Cheat Act.”

**This week, we are trying out a new activism platform called AlignAct.** We think it will make it easier and faster for you to take action and share the call-to-action when you’re done. It will allow you to send a pre-written email to your Senators and post on social media with just a few clicks. There is also a sample phone script for when you call.
** **
[**Please click through to this week’s call-to-action,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._pZU0NA) **and then let us know what you think of the platform by replying to this email.**

In liberty,

Jenny Beth

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|

Charles’ team let me know that they’re really close to hitting the fundraising goal for the event. There are still a few tickets left for Friday’s event, and it won’t be the same without you. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
#

Friend,
Thank you for your incredible work last year.
In 2021, we improved the lives of Americans in transformative ways, and I’m proud of the victories I brought to Westchester, Rockland, and our nation due to your unwavering support.
Within my first few weeks in office, we went straight to work rebuilding our country after four years of shameful leadership in the White House.
Alongside my Democratic colleagues, I passed the American Rescue Plan — which ramped up vaccine efforts, sent survival checks to the American people, cut child poverty in half through the expanded Child Tax Credit, safely reopened our schools, and helped small businesses stay afloat.
I also helped pass the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — the single largest investment in our nation’s infrastructure in history. Now we’ll see $1.2 trillion go towards repairing our roads, bridges, and public transit, creating new electric vehicle charging stations, and getting clean water to low-income communities.
**For decades to come, the American people will see life-changing gains because of these historic bills.**
**[Friend, please help our team start the year off strong by chipping in a small donation. I’m up for re-election, and with so much at stake — we can’t afford to fall behind and let Republicans take control of Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40393767/324150109/-2132411086?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_TYE_AC_20220105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjkwNzQ0NC02NjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aeLNJGI_68OF-sBG82M7gq0wAzGKP2AFfUxZpPgONnY=)**

Last fall, I played a leading role in getting the _Build Back Better Act_ passed in the House. Due to Joe Manchin, this legislation is currently at a standstill in the Senate — but I will not stop working until my colleagues get it over the finish line for the American people.

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: One step closer to defeating Mace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Annie Andrews for Congress
body:
I wanted to reach out and thank you for all you’ve done to support our campaign.

| Hi,

I wanted to reach out and thank you for all you’ve done to support our campaign. It’s because of you that we broke fundraising records by raising **$500,000** for the campaign’s first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline.

We’re also proud to share that over _1,000_ of our donors are medical professionals, and represent 20% of our total donors! I couldn’t be more grateful to everyone who contributed and brought us one step closer to defeating Nancy Mace and bringing true leadership to the Lowcountry.

I started this campaign because I want my children and the entire next generation to have better opportunities and a safer, healthier country to thrive in.

Right now, our community is facing major challenges including a dangerous uptick in gun violence and a surge in COVID-19 cases. Amid all of these issues, politicians like Mace have done nothing but spread misinformation on national television to promote their own selfish motives. She continues to display a lack of character that is embarrassing to the people she was elected to represent, including me.

We can’t afford to let Mace continue to use her political power to benefit herself and herself only. **This year, we’ll elect a leader for _all_. A leader we can be proud of. A leader our kids can look up to.**

I hope you’ll continue following our journey as we push to bring positive change to our local communities.

Thanks again,
Annie

clean_body: I wanted to reach out and thank you for all you’ve done to support our campaign. | Hi, I wanted to reach out and thank you for all you’ve done to support our campaign. It’s because of you that we broke fundraising records by raising $500,000 for the campaign’s first Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline. We’re also proud to share that over 1,000 of our donors are medical professionals, and represent 20% of our total donors! I couldn’t be more grateful to everyone who contributed and brought us one step closer to defeating Nancy Mace and bringing true leadership to the Lowcountry. I started this campaign because I want my children and the entire next generation to have better opportunities and a safer, healthier country to thrive in. Right now, our community is facing major challenges including a dangerous uptick in gun violence and a surge in COVID-19 cases. Amid all of these issues, politicians like Mace have done nothing but spread misinformation on national television to promote their own selfish motives. She continues to display a lack of character that is embarrassing to the people she was elected to represent, including me. We can’t afford to let Mace continue to use her political power to benefit herself and herself only. This year, we’ll elect a leader for all. A leader we can be proud of. Team – Mitch McConnell and dark money groups have spent over $7 million on attack ads against Maggie Hassan. **That’s more than they’ve spent attacking any other Democratic Senator in the country.** But in 2021, we didn’t raise as much money as other vulnerable Democrats. That means that we’re getting hit the hardest by the GOP, but we have the fewest resources to fight back. If we're outraised and outspent again in 2022, we'll have no chance of holding this seat. With polls showing a tied race, we need to make up ground – and fast – or we could lose this election and our Senate majority. name: Mike Collier
subject: You really came through
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Wow,

After tallying up all the contributions that came in to our campaign for Texas Lieutenant Governor over the past few days, my team and I are proud to announce we successfully reached our end-of-year grassroots fundraising goal!

Y’all really came through.

In what started out as a very challenging month, our ability to come together and overcome the obstacles truly says something about the power of our grassroots team.

It’s clear that there is growing energy and momentum building behind our campaign to take back our beloved Texas.

We can create even more change together by defeating hyper-partisan Dan Patrick in November. If I am elected Lieutenant Governor, I will work toward protecting our constitutional rights, expanding affordable and high-quality health care, education, and economic opportunities across our state, fixing the damn grid, and making the Lone Star State a place every single person can be proud to call home.

Hitting our grassroots end-of-year goal was a big step forward for us. Let’s keep moving, step by step, toward victory this November.

Thanks again for all you do,

Mike

clean_body: [] Wow, After tallying up all the contributions that came in to our campaign for Texas Lieutenant Governor over the past few days, my team and I are proud to announce we successfully reached our end-of-year grassroots fundraising goal! Y’all really came through. In what started out as a very challenging month, our ability to come together and overcome the obstacles truly says something about the power of our grassroots team. It’s clear that there is growing energy and momentum building behind our campaign to take back our beloved Texas. We can create even more change together by defeating hyper-partisan Dan Patrick in November. If I am elected Lieutenant Governor, I will work toward protecting our constitutional rights, expanding affordable and high-quality health care, education, and economic opportunities across our state, fixing the damn grid, and making the Lone Star State a place every single person can be proud to call home. Hitting our grassroots end-of-year goal was a big step forward for us. Let’s keep moving, step by step, toward victory this November. Thanks again for all you do, Mike DONATE TODAY [] The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States [] | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Bruno Amato
subject: Kevin McCarthy betrayed our democracy on January 6th.I’m running for Congress to make sure he never has that opportunity again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eNaK6EBmEOntdC5D2mp6leCohYBQ5RQSz-5SEwPzq8R7QCGvSEp99TfXTIwkLj3PcFClQcOO81R0yOzz8SB61fIg0FTr724g3DDqwJHjfsX78cDkdCle-Ib-RKjB3GahgODdRP1SDD2KIlnAJdHur9qDPBZZExvm0hw90MLqu7E5PLCI5sQHcGgSTpnMAqy2NhoEnLNaDpJugfn3KXG0-iZRuV4Ip3_Kj9KHFaaLuiuOQbXQ7QTfUxV0pVP7DaJQMbbwR_7hg_Kzkfyny_PwTfDIKc-VLVsfi_XImsVOQmpPAAUjwemK-UfTlfzd5y74hiWQA30XkpxUoUce1XjteDc4GQEWvBFlxNYVJuZZCpU_VLUpVcbId6cSUtuFOilCcrzRBhNxrVnGlbuZcPONi16piGb7bcgDfvDMOmIADtpH/3ig/poE7kdATQc6w4X1OCqW2NQ/h0/ERXlQl2yEoBlOl4xwAWg8RCVghRvOafBbVR326kdsJU)
---
. Nearly a year ago today, I joined millions of other people in horror as we watched an insurrection and an attempted coup — an attack on democracy itself — to overturn a legitimate election. I'm a veteran. When I joined the Navy, I swore to protect against all enemies, foreign and domestic. I never imagined domestic would include a Trump-directed mob to try and take down our government. That day, I wondered what my own representative — Congressman Kevin McCarthy — would do in response to such a direct assault on our country. Would he stand up to Donald Trump, finally put aside politics aside, and put out a call for unity and accountability?
He did none of those things. Instead, the same day of that attack, Kevin McCarthy had a phone call with Donald Trump. And ever since then, he’s done everything he can to minimize just how close we came to losing our democracy.
So I did a little more digging on what — if anything — Kevin McCarthy has done for folks in our district.
I learned he has yet to make good on his promise to build a new VA clinic. He has not addressed our poisoned drinking water in Bakersfield. He has repeatedly blocked raising the wage when our district has some of the worst rates of poverty in the country. He has turned his backs on the people he represents.
**That’s when I knew I wanted to serve my country one last time — by running for Congress against him.**
Instead of cooperating with a full investigation into January 6th, he has tried to stop and obstruct the investigation at every turn. He attempted to hold up the formation of the committee for months.
He threatened to strip any Republican House member of their committee assignments if they accepted an offer to participate on the Select Committee.
He did not appoint a single Republican to the committee and then called it ‘partisan based’ just hours before the opening of the committee’s first hearing in July.
Instead, Kevin McCarthy said he wanted to form his own committee to investigate the insurrection instigated by the leader of his own party.
Now, after doing everything he could do stop from bringing full accountability to those who allowed January 6th to unfold — including protecting members of his own party who have been directly connected to helping PLAN the insurrection — he’s continued to try and twist the story to blame the Democrats.
**I am working to unseat him because he does not work for us, the folks of the Central Valley, who need real leadership in Washington.** He continues to work for the very people that attempted to overthrow the government on January 6th.
This fight is going to take all of us. [**This can be the year we defeat him. I’ve never been more convinced that guys like McCarthy should not be anywhere near the halls of power. Our district and our country deserve better.
