clean_body: | | | . Nearly a year ago today, I joined millions of other people in horror as we watched an insurrection and an attempted coup — an attack on democracy itself — to overturn a legitimate election. I'm a veteran. When I joined the Navy, I swore to protect against all enemies, foreign and domestic. I never imagined domestic would include a Trump-directed mob to try and take down our government. That day, I wondered what my own representative — Congressman Kevin McCarthy — would do in response to such a direct assault on our country. Would he stand up to Donald Trump, finally put aside politics aside, and put out a call for unity and accountability? He did none of those things. Instead, the same day of that attack, Kevin McCarthy had a phone call with Donald Trump. And ever since then, he’s done everything he can to minimize just how close we came to losing our democracy. So I did a little more digging on what — if anything — Kevin McCarthy has done for folks in our district. I learned he has yet to make good on his promise to build a new VA clinic. He has not addressed our poisoned drinking water in Bakersfield. He has repeatedly blocked raising the wage when our district has some of the worst rates of poverty in the country. He has turned his backs on the people he represents. That’s when I knew I wanted to serve my country one last time — by running for Congress against him. Instead of cooperating with a full investigation into January 6th, he has tried to stop and obstruct the investigation at every turn. He attempted to hold up the formation of the committee for months. He threatened to strip any Republican House member of their committee assignments if they accepted an offer to participate on the Select Committee. He did not appoint a single Republican to the committee and then called it ‘partisan based’ just hours before the opening of the committee’s first hearing in July. Instead, Kevin McCarthy said he wanted to form his own committee to investigate the insurrection instigated by the leader of his own party. Now, after doing everything he could do stop from bringing full accountability to those who allowed January 6th to unfold — including protecting members of his own party who have been directly connected to helping PLAN the insurrection — he’s continued to try and twist the story to blame the Democrats. I am working to unseat him because he does not work for us, the folks of the Central Valley, who need real leadership in Washington. He continues to work for the very people that attempted to overthrow the government on January 6th. This fight is going to take all of us. Thank you, Bruno | | ---|--- Bruno Amato is a proud veteran, working class guy, a Democrat, and is committed to serving his country once again by running for Congress in California’s 23rd District. Unlike some lifelong politicians in Washington, Bruno is ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work for the great people of the Central Valley. Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. He is running to fight for universal healthcare, economic justice, and real investments in education, and so much more. He's not taking a dime from corporations or corporate PACs — because he's running to work for the people. Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: sign on: protect voting rights to save our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is our opportunity to safeguard the right to vote.
#
Team,
With Republican-dominated state legislatures across the country continuing to pass new laws to make it harder for millions to vote, and the Senate GOP repeatedly obstructing federal voting rights legislation, it’s clear that we must act now to protect the right to vote in free and fair elections.
That’s why we can’t let the GOP’s assault on our democracy go unanswered. It’s time for the Senate to take concrete action to defend voting rights and save our democracy.
**[Our democracy is at stake – and the consequences will be dire if we fail to act. We simply can’t miss this opportunity. Add your name now to join me in the fight for voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40394396/324152689/-766467255?ms=jr_em_nd_220105_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_220105_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzk4M2YyNS02YTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3AehC56DbWR-bfbxObI7Ls3kJLWANb46z9jdgQ8lQA=&emci=105e9bde-5e6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ec983f25-6a6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=3800590)**
In the past, voting rights was a bipartisan issue where Democrats and Republicans could find common ground. But nearly a year to the day since the deadly January 6th insurrection at the Capitol, the dangerous and baseless attacks on voting rights are only getting worse.
I am committed to preserving our democracy at all costs, even if that means reforming the rules of the Senate to get this done. We cannot let Republican obstructionists stand in the way of protecting the right to vote.
We need to show the groundswell of support here in Nevada and across the country and demand that the Senate take immediate action on voting rights. Can I count on your support?
**[Sign the petition right now to show your support for protecting voting rights.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40394397/324152690/-766467255?ms=jr_em_nd_220105_1&refcode=jr_em_nd_220105_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzk4M2YyNS02YTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s3AehC56DbWR-bfbxObI7Ls3kJLWANb46z9jdgQ8lQA=&emci=105e9bde-5e6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ec983f25-6a6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you,
Jacky

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hunter=20Estes?=
subject: Under the Dome - Legislative Session begins
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132206?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**The Mississippi Legislature is officially back in session!** The bang of the gavel indicates a new year with plenty of possibilities for the government to spend your money in increasingly astounding ways.

However, we are hopeful that some good can be done in the next few months. **With the launch of our[2022 Freedom Agenda,](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=c117761e8b&e=5703353baa) we’ll be pushing for a range of policy changes that seek to advance liberty in our state.**

Already yesterday, over 300 bills were introduced in the House. Here is a highlight of some of the good, the bad, and the just plain interesting...

**The Good:**
* **_HB 164_ would defend the free speech rights of students on college campuses.** The legislation would take a positive step to ensure that students are not discriminated against based on their religion or political ideology. It guarantees the ability for students to peacefully assemble, protest, host speakers, distribute literature, carry signs, and circulate petitions. Our campuses should be bastions of speech and thoughtful discourse, and this bill helps to guarantee that.
* **_HB 239_ would authorize the sale of wine in grocery stores.** It is long past time that the state ends the enduring legacy of prohibition in Mississippi. The taste of alcohol freedom is sweet, and this bill, along with a range of others, would help to lift unnecessary restrictions on the free market.
* **_HB 253_ would guarantee that the 2nd Amendment is upheld in Mississippi.** The legislation would prevent any federal efforts to confiscate the legally-owned firearms of law-abiding Mississippi citizens.

**The Bad:**
* **_HB 199_ would authorize early voting for up to 21 days in the state of Mississippi.**
* **_HB 97_ would mandate Medicaid expansion in Mississippi.** Expansion in other states has consistently failed to produce the desired outcomes and led to major new financial burdens on taxpayers.
* Finally, there are too many bills to mention that seek to create countless new government departments, agencies, task forces, and more. We should always be wary of the continued expansion of an already bloated government bureaucracy

**The Interesting:**
* **_HB 181_ would establish blue as the official state color of Mississippi** (Personally, I am more of a fan of pink)
* **_HB 273_ would mandate homework by requiring teachers to introduce daily and weekly work assignments for students.** I’m not sure if there is a lobbyist on behalf of Mississippi children but I imagine that constituency will be quite enraged.

**As bills move through the legislative process, you can stay updated on them, learn about what they do, and find out how your legislators are voting through our[Legislative Tracker.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7fc302c9ea&e=5703353baa)**

If you have questions about upcoming legislative issues, please feel free to send me a question.
---
| |
---

All the Best,

Hunter Estes
Senior Director, Policy & Communications

_Ps. Be sure to follow our Facebook and Twitter pages for detailed updates about the legislative session._
---
| |
---
| _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=37e56c3660) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=37e56c3660).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Noah for Nevada
subject: Stop the American Communists
body:
Dear Peter,
The American Communists are scared! ([Meet the Scariest Republican Candidates of 2022](https://www.salon.com/2022/01/03/meet-the-scariest-candidates-of-2022-it-wasnt-easy-to-pick-em/)). They know their plan to steal American freedoms is being exposed.**[I am proud to be identified as one of the biggest threats to their Marxist agenda in 2022!](https://www.salon.com/2022/01/03/meet-the-scariest-candidates-of-2022-it-wasnt-easy-to-pick-em/)**
They can only succeed in destroying our precious American freedoms if they can fool us into believing their tired lies, including:
* _Restrictions are "temporary"_
* _Censorship is for "safety"_
* _Opposition to critical race theory (Marxism) is "racist" or "dangerous"_
* _American patriots are a "threat to democracy"_
* _Veterans are potential "domestic terrorists"_
* _Our beautiful American Flag is a symbol of racism_

All lies. But the enemies of America rest easy knowing that most candidates and even incumbents will do nothing to stop them, or merely pretend to oppose their evil plot against freedom and liberty.
_**[DONATE HERE](https://noah4nv.com/donate/)**_

Normal Americans are waking up to the fact that we are in the midst of a battle for the heart and soul of our free republic. **_To do nothing is to surrender._** Unfortunately, formerly free nations in Europe and Australia are already in the grip of authoritarianism, and the globalists are determined to do the same to America - the "big prize." ** _We must never let that happen._**

I speak the truth every day on the campaign trail and refuse to be censored; that is why the enemies of America are so threatened by me. I get attacked relentlessly by big tech, the media, and the political establishment. (just search for me on the web or check out my social media feeds to see for yourself).
**_They cannot afford to let me win, because they know I will continue to expose them and defend our God-given liberties._**
_**[DONATE HERE](https://noah4nv.com/donate/)**_

But I cannot fight this battle without your help. Please donate $100 to fund my fight to ensure that the freedom of every American is protected in Congress.

When I get to Congress I will work hard to:
* [Impeach the fake "president" and demand consequences for the coup ](https://noah4nv.com/articles-of-impeachment/)
* Halt all immigration until the wall is complete
* Remove liability protections for big pharma to force them to stand behind their products
* Waive sovereign immunity for suits against the Chinese Communist Party for COVID

_**[DONATE HERE](https://noah4nv.com/donate/)**_

Learn more at [www.noah4nv.com](www.noah4nv.com)
[nvm@noah4nv.com](mailto:nvm@noah4nv.com)
[Facebook.com/NoahForNV](http://Facebook.com/NoahForNV)
[Twitter.com/Noah4NV](http://Twitter.com/Noah4NV)

clean_body: Your input helps us focus on the issues that matter most to you this year. Peter, A few weeks ago our team sent a survey asking your priorities for 2022 –– and I saw that your response was missing. Please take a minute and fill it out, as your input will help us focus on the issues that matter most to you this year. On behalf of the whole team, we appreciate all you’ve done to keep us on track. Mike is working to build on all we achieved together last year and that starts with hearing from you. Thanks, Patrick McNulty —--------- begin forwarded message —------- To: Subject: Your feedback is vital to success in 2022 From: Gallagher Survey Team Peter, Believe it or not, it’s time to start laying the groundwork for BIG victories in 2022 on all the issues facing Wisconsin and our country. We’ll be honest –– we’ve got our work cut out for us. A common-sense conservative majority is needed now more than ever in Congress, and you can count on Nancy Pelosi doing everything in her power to stop Republicans from winning in critical battlegrounds like Wisconsin. Can you help our team hit the ground running in 2022 by answering our RESPONSE NEEDED: 2022 PRIORITIES SURVEY What issue do you want to see Team Gallagher focus on in the new year? *Select All That Apply Peter, we’ve been through a lot together this year –– and we’re so thankful that you’ve stood with Mike at every turn. From holding Biden accountable for his disastrous withdrawal in Afghanistan to combatting out-of-control spending we’re seeing from Democrats, none of this would be possible without you. But we’re not done yet –– and we need to keep our foot on the gas all the way to Election Day. ** -- We appreciate your input, Gallagher Survey Team | | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

If a Devin Nunes clone wins the Special Election , this district will fall deeper into the clutches of MAGA Republicans who aim to tear down our democracy in the name of Trumpism. But if Phil Arballo wins the Special Election , this district will finally have a representative who will fight for their rights, protect democracy, and answer to no one but the community he serves. He's running for Congress in California to replace Devin Nunes -- a far-right, MAGA Republican who just abandoned the Central Valley. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. Peter, **It’s officially election year and Jessica Mason (TX-30) is just 40 days out from the beginning of early voting for her primary!**

If you remember, Jessica was running to primary 29-year-incumbent Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson – that was until EBJ announced her retirement in November. Since then, the ballot grew to nine candidates.

But Jessica was in the fight before all this. She was ready to take on EBJ and represent real change in her district where she was born and raised. She didn’t wait to run until things looked easier because she was always up for the challenge.

On February 14th, the primary election’s early voting begins and we need to provide Jessica with all the support she needs to win this election. Jessica has the lived experience of her district and the challenges they face. She’s attended the schools in the district and has worked as an affordable housing coordinator for her community.

After her time in the Navy as a medic, she chose to return to South Dallas and EBJ had become compliant with the issues in her district. She knew it was time for someone young and fresh to shake things up. We are so proud to support someone like Jessica.

So now we need to make sure she receives the funds she needs to win this primary. Election year means more costs for digital advertising, staffing, campaign materials... & the list goes on and on. ******[If you could, will you chip in a few dollars today to help jumpstart Jessica’s campaign year and give her the resources she needs to win?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40395000/324155262/214728439?refcode=220105_FR_jmearlyvoting_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRmOTEwZDAxLTZjNmUtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=D7beEyrCabuBK7em1WyI0SwfnGhvWhi4JelyZGdJG-A=)****** ****_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_**** | | ************[**$10 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40395001/324155263/214728439?refcode=220105_FR_jmearlyvoting

body:
This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf8q2md2ru178u10l2p39n71ks4un76g7l3u8ac8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u3i3ccb5m5h74oriejgeeobkc1ieap3me5g6ed3nmpir2pjnmqqn8or7clrj4ttnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcipm4o3mcpj32t5l69jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1chgm8or7cjgm49fg)
This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpave7skc7kh5b613bbc55tlbmsdck8asl45eqd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative,

I want you to take a moment to imagine Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare:

**A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, from a swing state like Nevada, defeats a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time.**

This hard-fought victory, in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District, is the race that finally pries the Speaker’s Gavel from Pelosi’s clenched fist, demoting her to minority leader or better yet – **straight into retirement.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3kj3m8a8h74jod0oab8nkgukvvrsb22qj187cno_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)
**Just as important, with Republican control of the U.S. House of Representatives, we can now stop President Joe Biden’s radical, socialist agenda dead in its tracks.**

CNN, MSNBC, the New York Times, and the Washington Post won’t know what to do with themselves... and it will be glorious! All the phony narratives they’ve run since 2015, when Donald J. Trump first announced his campaign for President, will be exposed for the world to see!!

AOC and her Squad comrades will be relegated to the back bench of Congress, where they can stew about the results, and figure out a new way to resurrect their grand schemes for American socialism. Or, maybe how to apply for dual citizenship in Venezuela.

[**Fellow Conservative, all of this happened... because you took a chance and donated $25, $35, $50, $100 or more to my campaign for Congress.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziro60tl6e5lkusqvpug1k22paug4svlv3bagcvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs) **My name is April Becker, and in addition to running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District, I truly am Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare._But it’s not why you might think._**

[**SUPPORT APRIL BECKER NOW -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z480ggrigvqnjghhcck00k2i61pecsj7k31gu5fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)
Right now, Speaker Pelosi is focused on two things: advancing her party’s radical socialist agenda, and protecting her most vocal and vulnerable Democrat colleagues to defend her shrinking majority. **I’m not even on her radar._Nor do I want to be._ **

I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. **I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z90pek77e93jfd8atu4cgerj7f1ltluniaqlu5o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)
**I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations.**[**My plan is to take down one of Pelosi’s most trusted partners before she even knows she’s in trouble. By the time she finds out, I’ll have such a groundswell of grassroots support that it will simply be too late.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znlqdugqjjboqru4gi97e0udmnq8htpc4nbmdml0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)

[**SUPPORT APRIL BECKER NOW -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg6f0ms08g728pph3cmis6horu2kf69sq68f5obg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)
I’m for balanced budgets, lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, and more freedom. I believe the cancer of _“cancel culture”_ is one of the greatest challenges we face, and I’m appalled at how quickly the liberals are trying to erase history. _Abraham Lincoln isn’t even safe!_

I could take another ten emails to tell you why I’m running for Congress, and the issues I care about the most, but I’m sure I’d just be preaching to the choir. So rather than list all of the horrible executive orders and laws being passed by President Biden and Speaker Pelosi, let me leave you with just one thought:

**If you’ll stand by my side and make a contribution today, we can take them down.**

[**Whether you send $25, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even $1,000 - every dollar makes a difference. I’m Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare, and she doesn’t even know it. Join my team, make a donation today and we’ll teach her a lesson she’ll never forget.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd71amkqs1i763per05rvqo2ah6mtd2fq7oq5umo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5i66pr4s5h2bs)

Thank you,

clean_body: This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party This display proves once again that Democrats will never put Americans FIRST. They want to lock you down again while they party together through the night. They use their status and impalpable power to do as they please while forcing everyday citizens to live under their rules. | Fellow Conservative, I want you to take a moment to imagine Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare: A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, from a swing state like Nevada, defeats a little-known Democrat with no accomplishments to speak of other than voting with Pelosi 99% of the time. This hard-fought victory, in Nevada’s 3rd Congressional District, is the race that finally pries the Speaker’s Gavel from Pelosi’s clenched fist, demoting her to minority leader or better yet – straight into retirement. Just as important, with Republican control of the U.S. House of Representatives, we can now stop President Joe Biden’s radical, socialist agenda dead in its tracks. CNN, MSNBC, the New York Times, and the Washington Post won’t know what to do with themselves... and it will be glorious! All the phony narratives they’ve run since 2015, when Donald J. Trump first announced his campaign for President, will be exposed for the world to see!! AOC and her Squad comrades will be relegated to the back bench of Congress, where they can stew about the results, and figure out a new way to resurrect their grand schemes for American socialism. Or, maybe how to apply for dual citizenship in Venezuela. My name is April Becker, and in addition to running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District, I truly am Nancy Pelosi’s worst nightmare.But it’s not why you might think. Right now, Speaker Pelosi is focused on two things: advancing her party’s radical socialist agenda, and protecting her most vocal and vulnerable Democrat colleagues to defend her shrinking majority. I’m not even on her radar.Nor do I want to be. I’m a working mom with three children. I worked to pay my own way through college, and then law school. I’m a practicing attorney who donates her time fighting for the underdog and taking on tough cases. I’m the type of person who outworks everyone in the room and exceeds expectations. I’m for balanced budgets, lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, and more freedom. I believe the cancer of “cancel culture” is one of the greatest challenges we face, and I’m appalled at how quickly the liberals are trying to erase history. Abraham Lincoln isn’t even safe! I could take another ten emails to tell you why I’m running for Congress, and the issues I care about the most, but I’m sure I’d just be preaching to the choir. So rather than list all of the horrible executive orders and laws being passed by President Biden and Speaker Pelosi, let me leave you with just one thought: If you’ll stand by my side and make a contribution today, we can take them down. Thank you, April Becker Republican for Congress (NV-03) | April Becker is a true Nevada success story. As a working mom with young children, April put herself through college and law school at UNLV. April is the owner of April Becker & Associates law firm and is a top-rated litigator and real estate attorney in Las Vegas. A Republican woman with staunch conservative credentials, April is the key to flipping a target district in the swing state of Nevada, ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid For By Becker for Congress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| When Joe Biden's DOJ targeted concerned parents who showed up at school board meetings protesting anti-white Critical Race Theory, it wasn't just beyond the pale.
It might have been the most dangerous thing we face in America right now...
That's because it paves the way for a broad targeting of innocent citizens the likes of which we've never seen before. name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: We Must Do Better for Our Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
We Must Do Better for Our Schools | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=1382926b17&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | This week, as students, teachers, and staff were preparing to return to our Philadelphia public schools after winter break, they were met with a last-minute, piecemeal approach that suddenly shut down schools as late as the mornings they were en route to school.

The Philadelphia School District had known for weeks that the COVID virus spike following holiday break would yield tremendous staffing shortages, rapidly spread illness, and insufficient conditions for a safe, effective learning and working environment.

They had the resources to prepare administration, staff, and families for a brief transition to virtual learning while the worst of the surge subsided, but instead continue to disrupt families, students, and staff with kneejerk decisions happening on a daily basis.

We need to do better for our teachers, support staff, families, and students to make sure they aren’t scrambling for last-minute childcare or thrown into unsustainable, unsafe working conditions.

I support the Philadelphia Teachers Union and urge Philadelphia School District to make a blanket return to virtual learning for the next two weeks for the least disruptive and most practical approach to this difficult month. _Deja_
---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e683d1dbaa&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja Alvarez is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. If elected, Alvarez would become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c497d36c6f&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Team Gary
subject: Do you think this candidate could win?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/92071c02b776056c/10d07ed173adaa7bc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — Have a second? We have a couple of questions for conservatives who know we won’t take back the Senate unless we nominate candidates who can win. **

---
|
---
If a Republican candidate had a long history of stalking and threatening women, could they — _and should they_ — win?
---
|
---
[**YES OR NO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/92071c02b776056c/75d5d93b24c1aea3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
If a Republican candidate with a history of stalking and threatening women _refused_ to address their behavior, could they win?
---
|
---
[**YES OR NO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/92071c02b776056c/5879eb1ef894ef5cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
Do you think Democrats and the media would come down on a Republican candidate with a history of stalking and threatening women like a ton of bricks?
---
|
---
[**YES OR NO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/92071c02b776056c/539cae6bd127a566c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
|
---
Finally, if a Republican candidate supported a pathway to citizenship for illegal immigrants, could they win?
---
|
---
[**YES OR NO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/92071c02b776056c/449df8a3bd6d76cec3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
**Well, there is a candidate with this history running in Georgia. His name is Herschel Walker. ** Herschel Walker cannot win because he will be too busy defending his own actions to talk about Raphael Warnock. Team,
There’s no other way around this: the filibuster allows 41 Republican Senators to STOP historic voting rights legislation in its tracks. And since Democrats only have 50 votes in the Senate, Mitch McConnell’s minority holds a lot of power.
Just last year alone, Republican state legislators in **19 states** passed egregious voter suppression laws!
In other words, if we Democrats don’t take decisive action and SOON, we can kiss the future of our democracy as we know it GOODBYE.

And now, one year later, we still don’t have all of the answers. While House Democrats are working hard to uncover the truth, many GOP members are still refusing to cooperate. We deserve to know everything that happened that day, Peter, especially when our current congressman was involved. We cannot allow an insurrectionist who helped orchestrate one of the darkest days in recent history to continue spreading his extremism. He does not represent our values in WNC. Jasmine is running for Congress to replace Cawthorn’s extremism with a new type of politics centered around love, hope, and empathy. She’s a real leader, and we need her in WNC and Washington. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40395546/324158139/-825069922?refcode=20211124_mf_redistrict&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGI5NzM1OC03MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHBjWtED3RT_86_TxZThc_ejPSWOX599pkZcJrUWC-Y=) Team, **It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter. ** She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation. **But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.** **I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022. ** [**So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40395547/324158140/-1217423743?refcode=20220105_MF_twitter2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGI5NzM1OC03MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHBjWtED3RT_86_TxZThc_ejPSWOX599pkZcJrUWC-Y=) | ********[**DONATE NOW »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40395548/324158141/-825069922?refcode=20220105_MF_twitter2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGI5NzM1OC03MDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WHBjWtED3RT_86_TxZThc_ejPSWOX599pkZcJrUWC-Y=)********

body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign now: Tell Twitter to suspend Marjorie Taylor Greene’s official account too >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb460da88-9f77-4e6d-a237-6f66e92b63ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb77f2bd9-5a43-4bb2-8a2f-05e2c4b218f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Republican Congresswoman, spewer of conspiracy theories, and Trump fanatic Marjorie Taylor Greene recently had her personal Twitter account permanently suspended for spreading false information about COVID-19 vaccines. The last straw was Greene claiming there was an "extremely high amount of Covid vaccine deaths.” We know vaccines are safe and effective – her lies and conspiracy theories are literally killing people. But Marjorie Taylor Greene still has access to her official Congressional Twitter account, and therefore still has the ability to spread dangerous misinformation. We think she should be completely banned from Twitter for the harm she’s done. [Sign your name now to tell Twitter: Suspend Marjorie Taylor Greene’s official account too!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabe762a2-5524-429a-b17e-c800bc2ae91c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Roger Marshall
subject: First Fox interview of 2022
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3e9aca0d8146f306/978feb4b9b3d8922c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

# **Friend — On Sunday, I joined Fox News for the first time in 2022. Hope you’ll watch it below. **

---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3e9aca0d8146f306/0092b77ca60c6f76c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
**My message was simple: The American people are waking up to the nightmare that Joe Biden’s policies have created. ** Whether it’s the border crisis, skyrocketing crime, record inflation, national security embarrassments, or a failed and tyrannical approach to COVID, Biden has failed Kansans and Americans. **I firmly believe that if we stay engaged and united together, we’re going to do something about it in 2022. ** We’re going to take back the U.S. Senate and House, and we’re going to send the woke left a message that their march to change America ends here. [**I hope you’ll stand with us in that effort.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3e9aca0d8146f306/9ed768d1f5b952dac3d6b838967d376c/37973)

Senator Roger Marshall

subject: Did you catch Monday's breaking news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
In 12 days or less, we'll see if Senator Kyrsten Sinema will join with Democrats to finally put an end to the Jim Crow filibuster. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwLbt9XS1LJntZHL60fiH7KRhRrdutCa5jk4X7M4WYsUri-wxRyD-8m4V-x3XVxh2m6uVmIIHSxzrLfGmvcyy4WgVqzLJB0ui5KlXQSDS8WZfJmbIvFn-YoJf7FwUQyBQ4HiuRNyGSyi_OrVQMlf-1QngoJQLMTlLrPOK1VIgC5DRUlStSHBp6TBdLoxCp5Wx4PZW-M-foZM8qiY8e6YcY4A4ZCSONgGcaTF_V3bic0UB/3ig/vXHJ-oIaSuqQy1o8TxVV_w/h0/ZzXVG1XkNzSl8diXm1N_Z_TQ7Bxsjm1Fa3DR1hgw2-Q)
Peter, did you catch this breaking news from Monday? Senator Chuck Schumer announced earlier this week that the Senate is looking to vote on filibuster rule changes, and _soon_ — before January 17th. In 12 days or less, we'll see if Senator Kyrsten Sinema will join with Democrats to finally put an end to the Jim Crow filibuster to advance voting rights legislation, protect abortion access, and so much more. body:
Hello,

I wanted you to hear it from me first — thanks to the support and dedication of this grassroots team, we reached our end-of-year goal!

Early investments are key to winning competitive races like ours. And because so many folks chipped in before the end-of-year deadline, we are starting the next phase of our campaign strong.

But, that doesn't mean we can slow down. In fact, it's time to kick our campaign for mayor of Los Angeles into high gear. With 2021 behind us, the primary is right around the corner. I know with your continued support we can make our vision for L.A. a reality and create a city where all people have the opportunity to thrive.

I want to say **thank you** for supporting our campaign so far. The next few months won't be easy, and every single second from here on out matters. If we're going to tackle homelessness, defend against COVID-19, and build an L.A. that puts our communities and public safety first, we have to stay on target. That's why I'm asking:

**[Will you make your first donation of the new year to my campaign? If you're an L.A. resident, individual contributions up to $214 are generally matched 6-to-1 by the city. That means a $5 contribution could become $35, or $50 could become $350. Every little bit goes a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40395722/324158705/-482874312?ms=em22_220105_koff1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&refcode=em22_220105_koff1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&source=em22_220105_koff1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220105_koff1_fndd_gq_act___KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=omh13UEeyi7UrcSRpdAnYbn9gI%2BWRUSzzv0Ks92YVmd4ZPF3K4EE6TdtyHRYxzGJZhMHBnEi5VN%2FjLtetLUBMO4XrejG7NkVlMoazzl6hhqkuXYRgqiZY62nGonU8u7d1vdMjjjzDEt8KdFOE61E7g%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODI4OGMxMS03MTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DjEtqJE4phB1_HArQqshi7rNA4lIkJ6lJm5V6tXI-CM=&emci=bb74732d-516e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=88288c11-716e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=2429742)**

Folks, When I’m fighting for New Mexico, I’m always grateful for the strong Democrats in our delegation. Together, we’re working to protect clean air and water, defend voting rights, repair our infrastructure, and rebuild our economy. Teresa Leger Fernandez represents our 3rd district and has been a steadfast ally in Washington and a true public servant to her constituents. **I’m proud to work with her in New Mexico and in D.C. — and I’m proud to endorse her for re-election.** **But right now, Teresa needs more than my support.** First, in November, the House Republicans’ campaign arm placed NM-03 on their list of targets for the midterms. Then, Teresa’s district became much more competitive after redistricting. [**Teresa needs community members like you to chip in and power her campaign for re-election this year, and she needs to start the election year strong. name: Ted Cruz
subject: BREAKING: New Evidence That FAUCI LIED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
He’s the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S. history. | Fellow American,

I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

_**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**_

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=264378e92fed4a20a458424d48b50929&_e=QpfUaWAZxsrIOXDnp2ivmXlZjhxA6VfRNy-2h4jVnW2isLpiEbcSGFvbwWyJooNtCUQX4SVAAYYuysbeEi79ehsTVA-isJlMmP3pNQs4xzE7_DOAfxHK86Sc9dVX-OutnA-TQqlRXgxfO-PjVJ0s7s0f55CdG-GgvYFjixRzQ2104fMzczpzaChKa2ypgThXDX2j-B2dfORcszoiN6EkeyEGPTkQy7s7Pk6JawhKszcbkTASgTa8BaZx5H5rbCOspNIpTejUq_jKa1ygxsdn1oq6K2D_bDxgFw-cxKHW1Fk_Xl6bwY6d5C628lDsG2fOG2mbyuFt_d0_1nukNfREEl9Vcao0fNDBBgwVKgD0aGOz7rFm-cFp9aF5rk2BNKene0ZxGz9BVQrcRTJ92k7ce7n5I4WQuLo6oWMi4NnomYyLtUteTa5rdjb5W0WniCFjh3tClfoLjk4jZZKrl2nYLA%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=264378e92fed4a20a458424d48b50929&_e=QpfUaWAZxsrIOXDnp2ivmXlZjhxA6VfRNy-2h4jVnW2isLpiEbcSGFvbwWyJooNtCUQX4SVAAYYuysbeEi79ehsTVA-isJlMmP3pNQs4xzE7_DOAfxHK86Sc9dVX-OutnA-TQqlRXgxfO-PjVJ0s7s0f55CdG-GgvYFjixRzQ2104fMzczpzaChKa2ypgThXDX2j-B2dfORcszoiN6EkeyEGPTkQy7s7Pk6JawhKszcbkTASgTa8BaZx5H5rbCOs88eU1Ew0ALHzY09Aa1zh5o2eAJnU8L3IPkNPpbSGasJiaABBmH3ecBwHOx74H9JrjujErITaEgFhEPbOaMCSCfNPl8g-ymsum-jb-6jJzi8JBVIOtqVINjNzYXXUcc6D21dMJsupGRkVIz3_Fo6ZRB4ttlWVbNSruuPAdDwZE8c3FNdYi6ehX5G8O4RfY3-7bf2A83u7cyMcX-9u6Wk-2A%3D%3D)**

We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. _**[Can we count on you to act now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=264378e92fed4a20a458424d48b50929&_e=QpfUaWAZxsrIOXDnp2ivmXlZjhxA6VfRNy-2h4jVnW2isLpiEbcSGFvbwWyJooNtCUQX4SVAAYYuysbeEi79ehsTVA-isJlMmP3pNQs4xzE7_DOAfxHK86Sc9dVX-OutnA-TQqlRXgxfO-PjVJ0s7s0f55CdG-GgvYFjixRzQ2104fMzczpzaChKa2ypgThXDX2j-B2dfORcszoiN6EkeyEGPTkQy7s7Pk6JawhKszcbkTASgTa8BaZx5H5rbCOsKzfSyXhVcTSUH1uArsubg6-SukmoaY5YQw7zeVEjsq0NBc_XffpKe_ukfJ7GedORU_HidX8jfQTAMUFX26binNv7vWH2hfS1d98Gnc56cUTzvcsG8SxpaZqmmhi3h_OaPdav4hdLe7Tbw7rjv-9QxAjNqUSpoNMeVRoo89jXieZd9BWlTBedEP71hU2SKe66hfDhTEl82iIxb9ZlxCZlHA%3D%3D)**_

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

| | Team, two things are breaking in Tom’s race right now that you need to know about:
* After the redistricting news, we know **our district hasn’t gotten easier** and the pundits at the Cook Political Report classified **the rating of our race as more competitive.**

* Kevin McCarthy’s major SuperPAC – which raised and spent more than $165 million dollars in 2020 – announced that **Tom Kean Jr. is part of the first wave of the “Trailblazers Fund”.** Because Kean Jr. is in the first round of endorsements, **we can be sure they’re going to spend the most in districts like ours this year.**

How we respond to this type of news in the next 24 hours is critical to our race.

[We need to start 2022 strong, which is why we’re asking 500 people to help us kick off the new year with a donation of any amount in the next 24 hours. Republican super PACs MASSIVELY outspent us on the airwaves | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40396461/324161643/-420428835?refcode=20220105_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTMyZDA0Ny03MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVhdGdzJ-eMil7cs1zCPC24D0Xr0rEc1ZQSfz5y0-jc=) Friend - subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40396631/324162563/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE3M2RmZC03MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMVVcDlBRqjRISMrBeAANKZEbegXsLgk_Ltdn2NNEFM=)
Folks, My campaign team just finished reviewing last year’s fundraising numbers and thanks to support from this grassroots team, we surpassed our fundraising goal last quarter and finished 2021 strong. _Thank you._ My staff shared these numbers with me, and since you’re a key part of this campaign, I thought you’d like to see:
* Last year, folks like you pitched in **52,640 contributions** , and **15,511** of those came in during the last quarter.
* We grew this grassroots team — **16,963 first-time donors** invested in this campaign last year.
* We received **23,896 signatures** on petitions supporting the Child Tax Credit, defending _Roe v. Wade_ , and so much more.
* This team submitted **10,793 responses to our monthly surveys** and requests to share your stories over the course of the year.

**You power this campaign.** When we needed your help fighting off misleading attacks against my record or closing the fundraising gap between our campaign and the National GOP, you stepped up. Now, we’re in an election year that will decide control of the Senate and determine if we can continue making progress on our country’s most pressing issues. In the months to come, we can expect the National GOP to invest heavily in flipping Colorado and backing one of the eight opponents running to take my seat. We have to be ready for anything. No matter what comes our way, I’ve seen what this grassroots team can do. I’m ready to fight alongside you and build on the progress we’ve made in reducing child poverty, tackling unemployment, investing in our infrastructure, and cutting taxes for families. Thank you for your continued support, Michael | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40396632/324162564/-20397166?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220105_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE3M2RmZC03MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMVVcDlBRqjRISMrBeAANKZEbegXsLgk_Ltdn2NNEFM=)**

Today is the anniversary of the eve of the insurrection on the Capitol, team [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40396717/324163036/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZWI5NmRkLTc0NmUtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nd_9oSLsWw7x2aNBygbR3M384YPFd3ErQPU5djo2D30=&emci=abbbde0b-746d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=4aeb96dd-746e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001) **Today is the anniversary of the eve of the insurrection on the Capitol, team.**

The attack on January 6 was planned from the beginning. By **January 5, 2021** , the made-up militias of deluded citizens and the members of the Treason Caucus were gearing up to execute their plans against our government and defend the Big Lie. **No matter the cost.**

While supporters of President Trump still contend that there was no indication of violence before the attack, it's clear that these are nothing but lies. These people had been public and blatant about their treason, so much so that on this day last year, several arrests of weapons possessions occurred, and the FBI issued a report warning of an incoming **"war"** at the Capitol.

There were calls for violence and death across social media, and those who saw the threats were silenced or blocked from taking action by Trump officials. No action was taken, and former Capitol Police Chief Steven Sund said his organization was never made aware of the report.

**Today represents failure.** Failure to recognize clear signs and red flags that littered the web the day before our government would be attacked, failure to stop the January 6 insurrection from happening.

We all know what happened next.

On January 6, we saw these mobilizations birth a violent movement hell-bent on destroying our democracy. The warning signs were there, and they were ignored.

We can never let this happen again. **[Will you answer the call to action against those who would betray our democracy? By donating just $5 today, you will help us build a war chest to help remove the treason caucus from office and keep them accountable.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40396718/324163037/1157390272?refcode=em22_220105_J64_fnd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220105_J64_fnd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhZWI5NmRkLTc0NmUtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nd_9oSLsWw7x2aNBygbR3M384YPFd3ErQPU5djo2D30=)**

Thank you,

In response to HUNDREDS of GOP voter suppression bills, Senate Democrats are finally eyeing changes to the filibuster.

With our democracy hanging in the balance, this moment could not be more important.

That's why we're urgently collecting responses from grassroots Democrats like you.

**Let us know: Do you SUPPORT changes to the filibuster so that the Senate can pass voting rights reform? >>**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/LERqs2~) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.)
---|---|---

_**We 're requesting at least 51 more signatures from local Democrats before midnight. Please submit your response straight away.**_

The time for action is NOW.

**FIRST:**

After Republicans across the country launched **HUNDREDS** of voter suppression bills, President Biden warned that our democracy is in deep trouble:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
**
THEN:**

Senate Democrats jumped into action - and are now eyeing changes to the filibuster so they can finally **PASS** voting rights reform.

**NOW:**

[We're calling for 51,000 grassroots Democrats to rise up and take a stand for voting rights at this pivotal moment. Let us know: Do you SUPPORT changes to the filibuster so that the Senate can pass CRITICAL voting rights legislation?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfx~)
| [PETITION RESPONSE: PENDING
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)

Senate Democrats have been trying to pass voting rights legislation for **MONTHS**.

But Republicans have shut down each and every bill - because they know they have no chance of winning in a free and fair election.

[**With so much on the line, your input has never been more important. Can you take just one minute and let us know if you support changes to the filibuster? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_wMDkbV-)

name: Jordan Moskowitz - Political Director
subject: 90 DAYS OUT!
body:
It's time to take back our local governments.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- We are just 90 days out from the 2022 Spring Election! On April 5, voters across the state will convene to elect representatives for local offices – and**the Republican Party of Wisconsin is working to ensure that we have conservatives fighting for our freedom at every level of government.** These past two years have exposed just how important our local elected officials are. For some time, liberals have been infiltrating our local governments and school boards with radical socialist ideas and Critical Race Theory. Even now, local leaders in Milwaukee and Madison have shuttered schools once again – creating deja vu for concerned parents who watched their children suffer from learning loss after the school closures of 2020. [**Are you willing to chip in to support our Local Elections Fund as we ramp up our efforts during these last 90 days?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVUR_F3keFJy1iuM8jV66Wx9dicyUHAHc7TpvaarEV8xR163puB7tQ_jHB1FNDqmsW&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=2) In 2021, the Republican Party of Wisconsin**launched a 6-figure initiative that helped recruit, train, and support 100+ local candidates in over 80 local races across Wisconsin.** This effort to take back our local offices couldn’t have been made possible without your support – but this year, we want to make an even bigger difference. Your donation will help us provide training, tools, and data to help common sense conservatives run in and win local elections. [**Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us build a coalition of local conservative leaders? We can’t do it without you!**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVUR_F3keFJy1iuM8jV66Wx9dicyUHAHc7TpvaarEV8xR163puB7tQ_jHB1FNDqmsW&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=3) Thanks,**** Jordan Moskowitz
Political Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVUR_F3keFJy1iuM8jV66Wx9dicyUHAHc7TpvaarEV8xR163puB7tQ_jHB1FNDqmsW&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=4 "CONTRIBUTE TO OUR LOCAL ELECTIONS FUND") [CONTRIBUTE TO OUR LOCAL ELECTIONS FUND](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVUR_F3keFJy1iuM8jV66Wx9dicyUHAHc7TpvaarEV8xR163puB7tQ_jHB1FNDqmsW&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=4)
---
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=5).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=6) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=90_days_out_v3&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: One year later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Tomorrow marks one year since the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
#
Peter,
Tomorrow marks one year since the horrific insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.
In the House, Speaker Pelosi has appointed a bipartisan select committee to investigate the Jan. 6 attack and the former President’s attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election.
Here’s something I know for sure – we cannot sweep what happened that day under the rug.
The committee has already uncovered revelatory evidence, including texts and emails from Mark Meadows and Donald Trump, Jr. The investigation should continue in 2022 until the job is done.
One year later, let’s double down on our commitment to finding the truth and delivering justice.

clean_body: Tomorrow marks one year since the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol. Peter, Tomorrow marks one year since the horrific insurrection at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. In the House, Speaker Pelosi has appointed a bipartisan select committee to investigate the Jan. 6 attack and the former President’s attempts to overturn the results of the 2020 election. Here’s something I know for sure – we cannot sweep what happened that day under the rug. The committee has already uncovered revelatory evidence, including texts and emails from Mark Meadows and Donald Trump, Jr. The investigation should continue in 2022 until the job is done. One year later, let’s double down on our commitment to finding the truth and delivering justice. My best, Dick Durbin * Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

| Peter, This week is a big week for Team Mo Brooks. Not only do we have an exclusive grassroots conference call with Congressman Brooks, but we’ll be officially qualifying to be on the ballot this year. This Thursday, tomorrow, we'll have our inaugural statewide grassroots conference call, with our top supporters, like you. I hope you'll be able to join us as Congressman Brooks gives an update on the campaign and you'll be the first to hear the next phase of the campaign. Details: Date: Thursday, January 6th Time: 6:30pm (central) Call-in number: 256-952-9015 Call-in Code: 731245 We'll be doing these calls regularly, and hope you'll be sure to join in as we work to elect a conservative Senator we can trust. Additionally, this Friday, at 10:00am, Congressman Brooks will be at the Alabama Republican Party Headquarters in Birmingham to officially qualify for the ballot. If you're available, we hope you'll join us and show the insiders and the swamp exactly why Mo is going to win this race - because Alabama conservatives are fired up, because we need an America-First champion in the United States Senate, which is exactly why President Trump (and you!) support him. If you're able to make it, let us know by emailing rsvp@mobrooks.com -Team Mo Brooks

In light of the total bias and dishonesty of the January 6th Unselect Committee of Democrats, two failed Republicans, and the Fake News Media, I am canceling the January 6th Press Conference at Mar-a-Lago on Thursday, and instead will discuss many of those important topics at my rally on Saturday, January 15th, in Arizona—It will be a big crowd! National Guard or Military to be present at the Capitol. Their emails and correspondence with the Department of Defense exist, but the media won’t ask for this evidence, or report the truth!

This is the Democrats’ Great Cover-Up Committee and the Media is complicit. Why did Adam “Shifty” Schiff forge and change the statement of Congressman Jim Jordan without any consequence? Why will Crazy Nancy Pelosi not provide her communications with the House Sergeant-at-Arms and the House Chief Administrative Officer, or promise to retain these vital messages, which many feel she has already destroyed—perhaps illegally? Also, why is the primary reason for the people coming to Washington D.C., which is the fraud of the 2020 Presidential Election, not the primary topic of the Unselect Committee’s investigation? This was, indeed, the Crime of the Century.

The good news is that our Senate campaign is off to a tremendous start! While I am not a politician, there has been an outpouring of support from conservatives across Georgia and around the country for our campaign.

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Rural Strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, today I'm personally reaching out to talk to you about rural voters. To put it simply, the Democratic Party is not competing in rural areas. And our campaign wants to change that.
This campaign is about uplifting voices that have been forgotten by leaders in our community for decades. We will not continue the cycle of alienating our rural neighbors in favor of big cities. The Democratic Party needs rural voters.
The future of GA-14 depends on dedicated leadership on kitchen table issues – ones that affect all of us .
That’s why I’m so proud of our Rural Revival Plan. Our plan tackles the issues that really matter to folks on Main Street. Our residents aren't worried about issues that don't affect them, and DC politics have no place here. But my neighbors do care about having clean drinking water, access to the internet for their children, or if the next tornado will wipe out their town.
It’s time to show Democrats how to compete in rural areas. Chip in today if you’re with me. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0105]
Thanks so much,
Holly.

clean_body: [] Peter, today I'm personally reaching out to talk to you about rural voters. To put it simply, the Democratic Party is not competing in rural areas. And our campaign wants to change that. This campaign is about uplifting voices that have been forgotten by leaders in our community for decades. We will not continue the cycle of alienating our rural neighbors in favor of big cities. The Democratic Party needs rural voters. The future of GA-14 depends on dedicated leadership on kitchen table issues – ones that affect all of us . That’s why I’m so proud of our Rural Revival Plan. Our plan tackles the issues that really matter to folks on Main Street. Our residents aren't worried about issues that don't affect them, and DC politics have no place here. But my neighbors do care about having clean drinking water, access to the internet for their children, or if the next tornado will wipe out their town. It’s time to show Democrats how to compete in rural areas. Chip in today if you’re with me. [] Thanks so much, Holly. body:
Our campaign has been endorsed by Kansans for Life, the voice for the pro-life movement here in the Sunflower State. Friend, **Our campaign has been endorsed by Kansans for Life, the voice for the pro-life movement here in the Sunflower State. ** [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=cdb0ce638ef24b28b82183e40fd14c4b&_e=nlesKzX4k0WWdrt7i9yOAEyAAR0ouBMJ05Igfo2hyeCrs3ZZrvBTD_f23Qo6XOAcT6I_q0HYs4bBBL2518wvaTYhj_X0YHalccQ9YP878vt7frMr0vS3flLGYSQxC1TZAKDCME6v8a7wwZitWNLss_8zog4X1VedTlEup_hhn1FjUT61bC5EEjytLiuHKpEQgXRL0sSQT6JwE9OjOrVElZcDFUkFHYzr26g7dJpMKV1_KdUygH94Nn4v5gx20ES2UT8q3ET5LIqn_X-SgPB_Ey33-Umv2Oez443DwuY8d2RX8DqkcFQDpPQPSPVRhIdjl8RS-VtafpljZSU7dzE-iqCRn8ENCET4NYHzL63WfYg7SBwGZ19lt2D0mEzkdTCxsSebDmuQC0LXftxzVQ5KFQQkJVw1lHm141b4iTnw9Z55pZFv5FFUL53JtLwXz67bJO8xA0Xa7_tyEHBuQ6b9Gsvu1Ky5IfB_eNmGPTdnQqcnxtUN7gqnwko45Q56LmFK) Kansans are ready to replace the Kelly administration with one that shares our values, upholds our laws, and protects our most vulnerable. I’m grateful to have the endorsement of Kansans for Life and to work with them to achieve this shared goal. **I need you to stand with me.** [**STAND WITH KFL: ADD YOUR NAME**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=cdb0ce638ef24b28b82183e40fd14c4b&_e=nlesKzX4k0WWdrt7i9yOAEyAAR0ouBMJ05Igfo2hyeCrs3ZZrvBTD_f23Qo6XOAcT6I_q0HYs4bBBL2518wvaTYhj_X0YHalccQ9YP878vt7frMr0vS3flLGYSQxC1TZAKDCME6v8a7wwZitWNLss_8zog4X1VedTlEup_hhn1FjUT61bC5EEjytLiuHKpEQgXRL0sSQT6JwE9OjOrVElZcDFUkFHYzr26g7dJpMKV1_KdUygH94Nn4v5gx20ES2UT8q3ET5LIqn_X-SgPB_Ey33-Umv2Oez443DwuY8d2S1cmu_rSBQqlgBRjmEuiNL6OavMXtNVbTPV2faqWKtEdx0BVVO2XRtTX4H1ZjpTgrBXI9Sd8nO6iRZsFW8Cwshkc19qx3b3g5srZkWxLSJawtRdjE1Rz3OSXdc3vP0Pd38pNuhhZtYcEJtQI26XooSqxVK1ygQPphs4lMw4an6aW9aN4-Rzfi2mY0OX6-3w_wkGuImJDe4wwNY3KHMlHAD) [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=cdb0ce638ef24b28b82183e40fd14c4b&_e=nlesKzX4k0WWdrt7i9yOAEyAAR0ouBMJ05Igfo2hyeCrs3ZZrvBTD_f23Qo6XOAcT6I_q0HYs4bBBL2518wvaTYhj_X0YHalccQ9YP878vt7frMr0vS3flLGYSQxC1TZAKDCME6v8a7wwZitWNLss_8zog4X1VedTlEup_hhn1FjUT61bC5EEjytLiuHKpEQgXRL0sSQT6JwE9OjOrVElZcDFUkFHYzr26g7dJpMKV1_KdUygH94Nn4v5gx20ES2UT8q3ET5LIqn_X-SgPB_Ey33-Umv2Oez443DwuY8d2QbWNamDFQucExSkwBeYuelDpzBB32Um_IB1AggQ4gPnlNwmekbNk4oBequvZRdTAGz1jz5uisIQWBvJr70XaG49eLlqmy216WYaQV1SCzqo2C-FOD5HbaPNtFpWMjs30GTJSfwKZVDaz571lVxuEHvrCSbj3VdrdWycku4Cqadut2fqCoirM92i30cK9DG-XGbNYYavSzbjUDdaDRfowXj) We have a unique fight ahead of us this year in Kansas. In 2019, our state Supreme Court ruled that our Kansas constitution contains a nearly-unlimited right to abortion, placing in jeopardy many of our bipartisan, commonsense regulations of abortion that have been in place for many years. **As Attorney General, I have fought to DEFEND our state's pro-life laws. But Governor Kelly said she was "PLEASED" with the court's ruling that puts pro-life protections in jeopardy.** This coming August, Kansans will have the opportunity to vote for the Value Them Both constitutional amendment to protect those existing commonsense regulations and ensure that the people, through our elected Legislature, get to decide on any new abortion laws. And then in November, Kansans will have the opportunity to elect a new governor who will actually uphold our state's laws rather than being "pleased" when pro-life laws are imperiled. I am grateful to have received the support of Kansans for Life, and I am grateful for your help in electing a new, conservative governor for our great state. [**If you’re with me, please add your name to show that you are a pro-life member of Team Schmidt! **](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=cdb0ce638ef24b28b82183e40fd14c4b&_e=nlesKzX4k0WWdrt7i9yOAEyAAR0ouBMJ05Igfo2hyeCrs3ZZrvBTD_f23Qo6XOAcT6I_q0HYs4bBBL2518wvaTYhj_X0YHalccQ9YP878vt7frMr0vS3flLGYSQxC1TZAKDCME6v8a7wwZitWNLss_8zog4X1VedTlEup_hhn1FjUT61bC5EEjytLiuHKpEQgXRL0sSQT6JwE9OjOrVElZcDFUkFHYzr26g7dJpMKV1_KdUygH94Nn4v5gx20ES2UT8q3ET5LIqn_X-SgPB_Ey33-Umv2Oez443DwuY8d2RHJQIReFI4PW-slB0CNYQKk9G5pc932vpNu8WjTV2c5xWU_ltsB96dc67mCempHeXu3jzICVET3yGPetJ3GUXoqiSgD-ZrMGVmh0rNBFma2A0tV7ozFqMw4lrN7zkf6TeqA_KPA8WqJutBC_bLCDGMAJEMdZ7PVc5AKh-RelApKWYEUv5JZz6pfhciVfS8e4_X3JDppMJjaL8ikBUvkxpg) Derek Schmidt** **

name: Great America Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6635%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=WUvnfVbIzxVoMJIV0AwKEA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68487%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9EgDcUdnuWsKYyTGt5Aj8g&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well.
Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time.
How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges?
Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_.
Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution.
Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.”
That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves.
**So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
_**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more.
The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68488%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U3blEz3JF65OQKsGKRVc4g&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long.
Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68489%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6WIjGg%2flDhRA8EbvCaL0kA&sysid=1)
Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6635%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=WUvnfVbIzxVoMJIV0AwKEA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6635%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=WUvnfVbIzxVoMJIV0AwKEA&sysid=1)

name: Tobias Read
subject: Protecting our schools
body:
We must do whatever it takes to keep our kids in school. I have some ideas.
---
| | Dear Peter, In the constantly changing landscape of multiple organizations making dozens of public health recommendations, I’d forgive you if you missed the new **[Oregon guidelines for school extracurriculars.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397010/324164194/317584238?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM1MzI3ZS03NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lR6VaVm5Vn3BWpfELDDHN5nFF4ywbw5i_m7Ya8RjA58=&emci=1d35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1e35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126)** For now, the state isn’t mandating this, but the recommendations are to cancel or seriously restrict important non-academic activities. The goal here is commendable – keeping schools open. But restricting and canceling extra-curricular activities will only worsen the growing mental health crisis our children are facing. **We should be able to __both__ keep schools open safely for in-person learning, and provide children with important social, emotional, and physical learning opportunities outside of the classroom environment.** We’ve spent two years lurching from one problem to the next, and nobody has put in the necessary effort to plan ahead for the next _day_ , let alone the next few months. Our kids are suffering because of this lack of leadership. They are facing learning gaps that will take years to undo, a mental health crisis that is quite literally killing them, and social isolation that’s causing behavioral problems in every school district in Oregon. Here are just a few deeply concerning data points that were **[pointed out New York Times columnist David Leonhardt](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397011/324164195/-669043186?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM1MzI3ZS03NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lR6VaVm5Vn3BWpfELDDHN5nFF4ywbw5i_m7Ya8RjA58=&emci=1d35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1e35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126)** :
* Three medical groups, including the American Academy of Pediatrics, have recently declared **[a national state of emergency in children’s mental health.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397012/324164196/351572919?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM1MzI3ZS03NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lR6VaVm5Vn3BWpfELDDHN5nFF4ywbw5i_m7Ya8RjA58=&emci=1d35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1e35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126)**
* Suicide attempts have risen, slightly among adolescent boys and sharply among adolescent girls, **[according to the C.D.C.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397013/324164197/-735142260?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM1MzI3ZS03NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lR6VaVm5Vn3BWpfELDDHN5nFF4ywbw5i_m7Ya8RjA58=&emci=1d35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1e35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126)**
* **[Gun violence](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397014/324164198/-1785491502?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM1MzI3ZS03NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lR6VaVm5Vn3BWpfELDDHN5nFF4ywbw5i_m7Ya8RjA58=&emci=1d35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1e35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126)** against children has increased as have **[behavioral problems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397015/324164199/1405188429?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTM1MzI3ZS03NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lR6VaVm5Vn3BWpfELDDHN5nFF4ywbw5i_m7Ya8RjA58=&emci=1d35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1e35327e-776e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=30662126)** by students.

**We have to provide parents and students with stability. This requires us to stop reacting and start planning.** The solution isn’t to wait for a problem and then cancel necessary activities in a half-baked attempt to make the problem go away. We must do **whatever it takes** to keep our kids in school. I have some ideas. We all know that, in the midst of the Omicron surge, a significant number of faculty and staff in our schools will need to isolate themselves at home. Rather than wait for that to happen and close the schools, we should work now to bring on an emergency group of substitute teachers from retirees and recent grads, prepare backup curriculum tools, and secure other resources to weather the storm and keep kids in the classroom. We also need to dramatically expand testing opportunities at school for students and staff. And finally, we need to get everyone vaccinated and boosted as soon as possible. There are other challenges to plan for as well if we’re going to keep schools open. We should partner with transportation companies to get more drivers on hand to prevent crippling transportation problems leaving kids stranded at bus stops. We need to support the people who feed our kids at school and prepare for staffing problems in the cafeteria or disruptions in the supply chain. **This stuff is difficult, but it isn’t impossible.** What it’s going to take is leaders from the school district level all the way to the Governor’s office getting serious about proactive leadership. **We’ve had two years of reaction after reaction, and it’s time for that to end.** It’s hurting our kids and our working families. Thank you,

---
