clean_body: We must do whatever it takes to keep our kids in school. I have some ideas. | | Dear Peter, In the constantly changing landscape of multiple organizations making dozens of public health recommendations, I’d forgive you if you missed the new For now, the state isn’t mandating this, but the recommendations are to cancel or seriously restrict important non-academic activities. The goal here is commendable – keeping schools open. But restricting and canceling extra-curricular activities will only worsen the growing mental health crisis our children are facing. We should be able to both keep schools open safely for in-person learning, and provide children with important social, emotional, and physical learning opportunities outside of the classroom environment. We’ve spent two years lurching from one problem to the next, and nobody has put in the necessary effort to plan ahead for the next day , let alone the next few months. Our kids are suffering because of this lack of leadership. They are facing learning gaps that will take years to undo, a mental health crisis that is quite literally killing them, and social isolation that’s causing behavioral problems in every school district in Oregon. body:
We had an incredible December and an incredible year. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397078/324164458/1537097269?refcode=EM_CT_220105ty_N_TE_ED_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTAzMWQyYS03ODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tajufn-kiTes3vQd4v2YG7o-pqB1Lf-sE3brpPNuuk0=)
---
Team, I want to take a moment to personally say THANK YOU for an amazing December and an incredible 2021. Because of donors like you, we crushed our own goals and projections for the entire month and ended the year having raised a quarter of a million dollars! I know the team and I asked a lot of you over the last several months, but your support puts us in a strong position moving into 2022, and what we expected to be a very competitive election year. Together, we can finally bring back real leadership to our district, and start working on the big issues like fixing our infrastructure, reopening our schools, and increasing the number of highly-skilled and well-paying jobs. It is because of your dedication and support that my team and I can run this campaign on a day-to-day basis. And I will always be grateful for the trust you have in me and our mission to build a better future for Central PA. Thank you again for what you do, and let’s keep the momentum up in 2022. Best,

\--- Eugene
---
---
**** | **** | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. clean_body: We had an incredible December and an incredible year. | | = Team, I want to take a moment to personally say THANK YOU for an amazing December and an incredible 2021. Because of donors like you, we crushed our own goals and projections for the entire month and ended the year having raised a quarter of a million dollars! I know the team and I asked a lot of you over the last several months, but your support puts us in a strong position moving into 2022, and what we expected to be a very competitive election year. Together, we can finally bring back real leadership to our district, and start working on the big issues like fixing our infrastructure, reopening our schools, and increasing the number of highly-skilled and well-paying jobs. It is because of your dedication and support that my team and I can run this campaign on a day-to-day basis. And I will always be grateful for the trust you have in me and our mission to build a better future for Central PA. Thank you again for what you do, and let’s keep the momentum up in 2022. Best, \--- Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Cheryl Stephens

# [Arizona Crossing Sees 2,404.9% Hike in Illegal Immigrants Over Last Year](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57573&L=26554&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXJpem9uYS1jcm9zc2luZy1zZWVzLTI0MDQtOS1oaWtlLWluLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1vdmVyLWxhc3QteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. In 2021 eight of the nine crossing stations along the southern border saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over the previous year, according to government figures. Yuma took the prize with an unbelievable 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions at the end of the fiscal year in September.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57573&L=26554&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXJpem9uYS1jcm9zc2luZy1zZWVzLTI0MDQtOS1oaWtlLWluLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1vdmVyLWxhc3QteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [New York’s racialized coronavirus priorities are illegal and warrant DOJ investigation, critics say ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57573&L=26555&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnktcmFjaWFsaXplZC1jb3ZpZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Fox News New York is blatantly violating the Constitution and should be investigated by the Department of Justice (DOJ) for prioritizing non-White individuals for certain coronavirus treatments, critics told Fox News.

Tom Fitton, who leads the conservative group Judicial Watch, similarly told Fox News that the Justice Department should investigate the issue as it constitutes a form of illegal discrimination. clean_body: As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. | | | Because no one is above the law! | January 05, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. In 2021 eight of the nine crossing stations along the southern border saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over the previous year, according to government figures. Yuma took the prize with an unbelievable 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions at the end of the fiscal year in September. == | | | == Fox News New York is blatantly violating the Constitution and should be investigated by the Department of Justice (DOJ) for prioritizing non-White individuals for certain coronavirus treatments, critics told Fox News. Tom Fitton, who leads the conservative group Judicial Watch, similarly told Fox News that the Justice Department should investigate the issue as it constitutes a form of illegal discrimination. == == Judicial Watch AG Garland testified that he based his memorandum off of a letter from the National School Board Association (NSBA) that labeled parents as “domestic terrorists.” The National School Boards Association later issued an apology for the letter. In November, Republicans on the House Judiciary Committee questioned the completeness of Garland’s testimony. == The Washington Times Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said he was permanently banned from TikTok, the popular social media video platform with China-based ownership. The head of the conservative activist group said he was removed from TikTok without an explanation. = = = = == == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

Thank you so much, friend. Last week was our biggest fundraising deadline of the campaign so far, and you showed up. This whole project is about restoring integrity to public service and about making Washington work again for the people it is supposed to serve—us. It’s about protecting the rights of workers and working families, reducing health care costs, making broadband more accessible, and protecting the individual liberties we value here in the North Country. And it’s about fighting for what’s right, not just for what is politically expedient. I will not stop, I will not tire and I will not relent until your voice is heard and your interests are represented appropriately. I’m proud to be in this with you and to have you on the team. Now, on to 2022! Yours in gratitude, Bridie | Bridie Farrell is a crime victims advocate and former U.S. National Speed Skater running against far-right Rep. Elise Stefanik in her home district of NY-21. body:
One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397217/324165206/-367306429?refcode=20220105_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg0M2NlNS03OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQFSHxLszfRyW0zieK0Jeox755zB63X6dym4PcwWPns=)

| | Derek, One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more.

But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority.

But here’s the deal, Derek: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR!

Right now, CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.

**[So I need to ask: Will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood – anything you can spare before midnight tonight – so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority and continue delivering for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397218/324165207/-367306429?refcode=20220105_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg0M2NlNS03OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQFSHxLszfRyW0zieK0Jeox755zB63X6dym4PcwWPns=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397219/324165208/-368617150?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg0M2NlNS03OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQFSHxLszfRyW0zieK0Jeox755zB63X6dym4PcwWPns=)** | | | [DONATE $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397220/324165209/-367306429?refcode=20220105_CGVA_Warnock&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg0M2NlNS03OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQFSHxLszfRyW0zieK0Jeox755zB63X6dym4PcwWPns=)

As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history.

**[But with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to win back control. So will you split $25 or more now between my campaign and CommonGood – before the critical midnight deadline – to help me win in Georgia, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397231/324165221/-367306429?refcode=20220105_CGVA_Warnock&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTg0M2NlNS03OTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iQFSHxLszfRyW0zieK0Jeox755zB63X6dym4PcwWPns=)**

clean_body: One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. | | | = | | Derek, One year ago today, grassroots folks like you powered our historic victories in Georgia to take back the Senate for Democrats. Since then, we've taken huge strides to advance President Biden’s agenda, provide pandemic relief, kickstart our economy, and more. But our work is far from over. To make lasting change in our country, we need to pass our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice – and that means defending and expanding our 50-50 Senate majority. But here’s the deal, Derek: my election in 2020 was a ‘special election’ – meaning I already have to run for reelection THIS YEAR! Right now, CNN is calling me the most vulnerable Democratic senator up for reelection – and the GOP is coming after me as their TOP target for defeat. = = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. = Thank you, Derek. It's going to take all of us coming together to win this. – Reverend Raphael Warnock Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click. body:
The Republican attacks on our democracy that we are seeing across the country are completely unacceptable. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40397857/324168131/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220105FR_N_TL_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzY3ZDBhMy03YzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xyWFtlIsK6nOrtHG867Vn-ubex41jY5LVYkVW6_XOAo=)
---
Peter,

Republicans lost the 2020 Presidential election, and they are trying to find ways to prevent that from happening again, no matter how unconstitutional. We are now seeing unprecedented attempts at gerrymandering and making it harder for people to vote.

Voting rights are under attack, and Ron Johnson is doing nothing about it. It’s not even that he’s doing nothing though, **he’s actively trying to stop any progress or legislation that would protect the right to vote.**

The Republican attacks on our democracy that we are seeing across the country are completely unacceptable, and the federal government must step in and stop them. We must abolish the filibuster and pass both the ‘John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act’ and the ‘For the People Act’. We must set a federal standard to protect voting rights nationwide.

**[We must defend our democracy this fall. We are now seeing unprecedented attempts at gerrymandering and making it harder for people to vote. Voting rights are under attack, and Ron Johnson is doing nothing about it. It’s not even that he’s doing nothing though, he’s actively trying to stop any progress or legislation that would protect the right to vote. subject: Team Gibbons Launches 2022 Bus Tour!
body:
Check out our weekly newsletter
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W6FG1QiRIIWuvzdBwIeLbfQhApmKCMEm1az3nEWij7om4onTFu-os_0dW7LSgZcr9cofcpS7Ihbumu7O3oaumewpiO7aEWx8q_bhKx38EjsXxHh1Y5wVas3nk774aACaLWzW4rXVhkl7S82YUaKZFJt4IsOG_OgANMdjfV1iOrNUdkjjul7BAw==&c=-FzBMtDvmKcxWhkK99sZXul38RJw1GVrIx-JItsWb2gxtM4jSzFdqA==&ch=8bXstZkjJYWAdoVT2aZwsSchO5-4T2CH7bBTCq7XNO6zPr22ZJR65w==)
---
| Peter,
Happy New Year's from Team Gibbons! Our bus tour is underway and we are off to a strong start.
Starting in my hometown of Parma, we listened to small business owners share their concerns about skyrocketing costs and the determination they have to bring new business to the city. In Norwalk, Huron County Chairman Harry Brady held a meet and greet and we met with voters in Woodville and Delta. It's obvious voters are looking for a change from typical career politicians and party insiders.
We finished day two in Ottawa this evening. Tomorrow we will round out the first leg of our statewide tour by visiting with folks in Darke, Preble and Montgomery Counties.
The tour won't stop and we look forward to sharing more details soon.

Peter,

In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more.

clean_body: In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more. Peter, In 2021, Kim and her Democratic colleagues in the House delivered real progress for families across the country. They passed legislation to invest in our infrastructure, provide COVID-19 relief, lower the cost of prescription drugs, and so much more. But as we begin the new year, we have a lot of work ahead of us. Kim remains focused on finding solutions to the issues that matter most to you in Congress. To best represent your interests, Kim wants to hear directly from you. | Kim knows how important it is to listen to the people she's been elected to serve, and she wants everyone to have the chance to make their voices heard. That's why last year, Kim held 16 town halls and drove over 5,400 miles visiting businesses, farms, first responders, veterans, and vaccine clinics across our district. We'll be sharing your feedback with her in just a few days, so don't miss your chance to let Kim know what's on your mind. Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

| Peter,

I never thought I would get involved in politics — and even in 2017, when I realized I would have to forge my own path in politics to get the results my community needed, I never imagined I would be the candidate.

I’m an everyday Nebraskan. I was raised by a single mom here in Omaha, I worked my way through college, and I was the first person in my family to graduate with a Bachelor's degree. I know what it’s like to work hard every single day — that’s why I’m ready to work every day for the people of Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. clean_body: I am intimately familiar with the frustrations families and workers here in Nebraska and across the country face. | = | Peter, I never thought I would get involved in politics — and even in 2017, when I realized I would have to forge my own path in politics to get the results my community needed, I never imagined I would be the candidate. I’m an everyday Nebraskan. I was raised by a single mom here in Omaha, I worked my way through college, and I was the first person in my family to graduate with a Bachelor's degree. I know what it’s like to work hard every single day — that’s why I’m ready to work every day for the people of Nebraska’s Second Congressional District. = | = I know what the people of NE-02 need because I am a lifelong constituent of the district. I know that everyday folks want affordable and accessible health care, we want coronavirus relief measures, and we want good jobs and schools. I am intimately familiar with the frustrations families and workers here in Nebraska and across the country face, because I face them too: rising gas prices, job insecurity, crumbling infrastructure, and more. And because I face these issues myself, you can bet I will never stop working to address them. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, = * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: your vision for New Mexico
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40398632/324170945/-2081290588?code=jtk1144-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDM0NjY4Ny04MTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ijjuJgKAFNLT9afLoUsU_h_DtgoXJIEC0xhIw-LPlT4=&emci=432baeb0-5f6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=14346687-816e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24265352)
---
Peter,

As I counted down to midnight on New Year's Eve, I couldn't help but think about everything we accomplished during this challenging year of 2021.
From running a successful vaccination campaign to slashing taxes for working families, I'm proud to say that our policies left New Mexicans better off than they were a year ago.
As we embark on this new year, I'm so excited about the future that lies ahead of us. I have big plans to deliver even more positive change in 2022 – but before I finalize my strategy, I need your help.
I'm turning to my top supporters to hear their thoughts about our goals in the new year, and I want to hear from you, Peter. **Will you take this survey before my team and I meet tomorrow?**

clean_body: | | | Peter, As I counted down to midnight on New Year's Eve, I couldn't help but think about everything we accomplished during this challenging year of 2021. From running a successful vaccination campaign to slashing taxes for working families, I'm proud to say that our policies left New Mexicans better off than they were a year ago. As we embark on this new year, I'm so excited about the future that lies ahead of us. I have big plans to deliver even more positive change in 2022 – but before I finalize my strategy, I need your help. I'm turning to my top supporters to hear their thoughts about our goals in the new year, and I want to hear from you, Peter. Will you take this survey before my team and I meet tomorrow? | | Thank you so much for being an invaluable part of this team. I look forward to reading your responses. Michelle Lujan Grisham | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. |

| Friend,

| One year! It’s hard to believe that I’ve already been in Congress for one full year. I wanted to take just a moment to thank you for your support over these first 12 months. We have delivered meaningful results for Iowa’s farmers, families, and rural main streets even while Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and “The Squad” continue to undermine our safety and our freedom. We have accomplished so much over this last year, but I am even more excited about what is to come. With the help of bold patriots like you, this year we will Fire Pelosi, take back Congress, and begin the hard work of undoing the damage Biden has done to the foundation of our country. Again, thank you for all the support you have shown me. It has made a huge difference. Randy

I’m facing a tough reelection battle against 6 radical Republican opponents. My opponents are being backed by the GOP war chest, but I know that the strength of this grassroots team is unmatched.
I mean it when I say this is a people-powered campaign — which is why the goal for my upcoming fundraising deadline depends on **the amount of individual support we are able to raise.**
Individual contributions fuel our fight for progress, and they make sure we can hold onto the legislative wins we’ve made — from strengthening public education to defending reproductive rights.

clean_body: | | | | | Team — keeping Nevada blue in 2022 and defending the progress we’ve made are my top priorities. In order to make that happen, we have to expand and strengthen this coalition of Democrats so this campaign is strong enough to hold onto this seat. ** | | | I’m facing a tough reelection battle against 6 radical Republican opponents. My opponents are being backed by the GOP war chest, but I know that the strength of this grassroots team is unmatched. I mean it when I say this is a people-powered campaign — which is why the goal for my upcoming fundraising deadline depends on the amount of individual support we are able to raise. Individual contributions fuel our fight for progress, and they make sure we can hold onto the legislative wins we’ve made — from strengthening public education to defending reproductive rights. subject: the next Supreme Court vacancy

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40398804/324172053/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDE1Nzg3Ny04MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvfqWJkou4PZjSbRj6OT6Z6296GJLusl8s1B2HX9EKY=&emci=d1049a14-576e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7d157877-836e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6371843)

Hello,
It’s been almost six years since Justice Antonin Scalia passed suddenly and a vacancy occurred on the Supreme Court.
And it’s been almost six years since Mitch McConnell and my opponent, Chuck Grassley, conspired to not hold a vote – or even a hearing – for President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, because it was “an election year.”
**But now Chuck Grassley is already creating another completely made-up “rule” for a Supreme Court vacancy during President Biden’s first term!**
He just told CNN: _"You know what the rule is on that. You go back to 1886 and ever since then, when the Senate's been of one party and the president's been of another party, you didn't confirm."_
During Gerald Ford’s presidency, Ronald Reagan’s presidency, and George H.W. Bush’s presidency, a Democratic-led Senate confirmed Republican-nominated justices. Grassley should know – _since he was there during the votes, at least physically._
I share your curiosity where this “one party can’t confirm another party’s Supreme Court nominee" business comes from. Are those the words of a shyster or of forgetfulness?
**We cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate and put Mitch McConnell and Chuck Grassley back in charge.** We don’t have to imagine what will happen if there’s another Supreme Court vacancy; they’re already telling us.
Senate control will likely be decided by my race here in Iowa. The Super PACs are already loading up millions for attack ads against me. **The only way to protect our Senate majority and prevent McConnell and Grassley from stealing yet another Supreme Court seat is if grassroots donors like you help with the resources to fight back.**
[**Please, may I count on you to give $5 or more to my campaign right now – whatever you can afford before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40398809/324172058/-42398318?refcode=em20220105pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDE1Nzg3Ny04MzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvfqWJkou4PZjSbRj6OT6Z6296GJLusl8s1B2HX9EKY=)

clean_body: Hello, It’s been almost six years since Justice Antonin Scalia passed suddenly and a vacancy occurred on the Supreme Court. And it’s been almost six years since Mitch McConnell and my opponent, Chuck Grassley, conspired to not hold a vote – or even a hearing – for President Obama’s Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland, because it was “an election year.” But now Chuck Grassley is already creating another completely made-up “rule” for a Supreme Court vacancy during President Biden’s first term! He just told CNN: "You know what the rule is on that. You go back to 1886 and ever since then, when the Senate's been of one party and the president's been of another party, you didn't confirm." During Gerald Ford’s presidency, Ronald Reagan’s presidency, and George H.W. Bush’s presidency, a Democratic-led Senate confirmed Republican-nominated justices. Grassley should know – since he was there during the votes, at least physically. I share your curiosity where this “one party can’t confirm another party’s Supreme Court nominee" business comes from. Are those the words of a shyster or of forgetfulness? We cannot afford to lose our Democratic majority in the Senate and put Mitch McConnell and Chuck Grassley back in charge. We don’t have to imagine what will happen if there’s another Supreme Court vacancy; they’re already telling us. Senate control will likely be decided by my race here in Iowa. The Super PACs are already loading up millions for attack ads against me. The only way to protect our Senate majority and prevent McConnell and Grassley from stealing yet another Supreme Court seat is if grassroots donors like you help with the resources to fight back. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We cannot allow McConnell and Grassley to get away with it again. Not on our watch. Thank you for being a part of our campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) body:
Election Integrity News to Know | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/28a9651e8272/independence-day-newsletter-test-7233062?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=2bdd5685c1&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
##
**True the Vote Statement Regarding Georgia Ballot Harvesting Investigation**
---
| Hi Friend,
I'm writing today to share a recent development that you will undoubtedly find interesting.

After a year's worth of research and analysis, True the Vote submitted three official complaints to the Georgia Secretary of State's office regarding occurrences in the 2020 General and 2021 Run-off Elections.

As a result, on January 3, 2022, Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger announced a statewide investigation into ballot trafficking in Georgia.

You can read more about the announcement here - [Georgia Opens Investigation Into Possible Illegal Ballot Harvesting in 2020 Election ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=a396ab0180&e=ad8cba7e98)

Shockingly similar findings will soon be released to appropriate authorities in five additional states.

This statement is the limit of our public comments at this time so as not to impede investigative efforts currently underway. We will continue to provide updates directly to you in email and on our website.

Thank you all for your patience and continued support. Keep the faith. God bless America.

In 1940, Winston Churchill delivered a speech to the House of Commons. He brought news of developments that marked a turning point in the war. But it is, perhaps, the end of the beginning." _Today, our observation is the same. It is not the end, but it is the end of the beginning. Please stay connected, there is still much work to be done.

clean_body: Election Integrity News to Know | | | | | | | True the Vote Statement Regarding Georgia Ballot Harvesting Investigation | Hi Friend, I'm writing today to share a recent development that you will undoubtedly find interesting. After a year's worth of research and analysis, True the Vote submitted three official complaints to the Georgia Secretary of State's office regarding occurrences in the 2020 General and 2021 Run-off Elections. As a result, on January 3, 2022, Georgia Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger announced a statewide investigation into ballot trafficking in Georgia. You can read more about the announcement here - Shockingly similar findings will soon be released to appropriate authorities in five additional states. This statement is the limit of our public comments at this time so as not to impede investigative efforts currently underway. We will continue to provide updates directly to you in email and on our website. Thank you all for your patience and continued support. Keep the faith. God bless America. I have big news, Peter – and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

Yesterday, I launched my new political action committee called **Elder for America PAC!**

_Why am I doing this?_ **Because we have a country to save, and I will not sit on the sidelines.**

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dae0cfab34be4496a61cd3787ee55c1f&_e=bf3aAOT3wwm6u62poBwa5Kr9OGbJulnSXkQJ9HEPSVsM9fI_m-o7lrARu7YUWlmjJsaGOyXmgUPoqK6dRYlbravwkg9Yuw2eYmx9TJpRn-09xcvvx7j9XF-87Ihp0tT0wr4pqBLeZyL6-TMH25CfyJ_P8HvxZkUsUyKYV_7VNLhtim6R5Jsnmgf-pQIrSa7aRURBaKSRPA4GhPxQKbQusus7oPQBZAGE7JAHTTbn2QPLVGMH4e7RzMgUI8ElQsXDHflCoRPQJ45iYDIghagnBpdA7LRV7nYDNCg4GSiXxcj3gyxuriwjtmT_0EOzVh45KvotIdJAq2YMiTTgyI6xwryUkfnjUNCfBwlNkgfNI72NM9NN8VzdqvI2NF1cmSZADxCt_iLmD_xNJN2AccHRY64iQqJqcbz0njmDTVnWrRAGW4uUa3krVtfY61kMdbhK)
Elder for America PAC will engage in public education campaigns, direct voter contact, and fundraising **to help Republicans win key seats in the House and Senate and take back majorities in the 2022 midterms.**

We will also focus on races and policies at the local level that affect public safety and education – two key areas where Americans are being failed.

[**I’m reaching out because I cannot do this alone. If you’re ready to join me in the fight to save America, please be among the first to join my team with a Week 1 contribution of $25 or more to support the mission of Elder for America PAC.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dae0cfab34be4496a61cd3787ee55c1f&_e=bf3aAOT3wwm6u62poBwa5Kr9OGbJulnSXkQJ9HEPSVsM9fI_m-o7lrARu7YUWlmjJsaGOyXmgUPoqK6dRYlbravwkg9Yuw2eYmx9TJpRn-09xcvvx7j9XF-87Ihp0tT0wr4pqBLeZyL6-TMH25CfyJ_P8HvxZkUsUyKYV_7VNLhtim6R5Jsnmgf-pQIrSa7aRURBaKSRPA4GhPxQKbQusus7oPQBZAGE7JAHTTbn2QOK3CsIV_eGzW9TtgtmgchCtJAT9qKCVcByK00G_c8biAkCvRwK7DWBXvYJgnLAVrYHolIzqOHu6yl2epotXZvbr7NqiscsxgFPTl_P0jSHaaOEefviQ_XBrZvBMrN1H_bWrAN8MjSGLIW16AerWtcnpLJH4wTTz7GzkRFuzRxabfH5N27upn8a7WN--stcugomW1qgDedvsgTo9sIBoIX3)

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dae0cfab34be4496a61cd3787ee55c1f&_e=bf3aAOT3wwm6u62poBwa5Kr9OGbJulnSXkQJ9HEPSVsM9fI_m-o7lrARu7YUWlmjJsaGOyXmgUPoqK6dRYlbravwkg9Yuw2eYmx9TJpRn-09xcvvx7j9XF-87Ihp0tT0wr4pqBLeZyL6-TMH25CfyJ_P8HvxZkUsUyKYV_7VNLhtim6R5Jsnmgf-pQIrSa7aRURBaKSRPA4GhPxQKbQusus7oPQBZAGE7JAHTTbn2QOyt72kCHteHuoMFfkKlZgt6MKtbNE4zSwYe-gk0G2l2cVSeS1pam_9Smmx17KJZbbYNIclCEFShdsL5XC04gZ6vdfred0Rzznk5b6E7CVJyZuyBZY5ibuuvF2nFWYTpsx4r8DhizQDjCibfCD_M-6etVw5yXuPXiFnIBCKTQMoYTDjPkUFw8wIiH4F21j5LHkPw--Y6u9Aah0Q_Q4lvOi9)
The radical left’s woke agenda is destroying America. Our major cities look like warzones thanks to ‘progressive’ district attorneys and other pro-criminal policies.

Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated.

Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers.

Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist.

**I for one have had enough** , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome.

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dae0cfab34be4496a61cd3787ee55c1f&_e=bf3aAOT3wwm6u62poBwa5Kr9OGbJulnSXkQJ9HEPSVsM9fI_m-o7lrARu7YUWlmjJsaGOyXmgUPoqK6dRYlbravwkg9Yuw2eYmx9TJpRn-09xcvvx7j9XF-87Ihp0tT0wr4pqBLeZyL6-TMH25CfyJ_P8HvxZkUsUyKYV_7VNLhtim6R5Jsnmgf-pQIrSa7aRURBaKSRPA4GhPxQKbQusus7oPQBZAGE7JAHTTbn2QOEjYaR1bRBncB-_8BXENnCbkRFML7TZmMbSUlXLcvL8edeNyKt-ZGCnXXjZ1UkVOdEccVincq9akI87DAIhpnjce39BddVC0zrFchta0ZDAmxO9lEKa0LZ6ctjfj0VrgBYl3gwDwAsRhqe01WOy6P0LItXsLEtDC4xWMU_qO5jl2OG8bLW3z3xNjL7EG1c7Es8Qn-Dbs6cNvKGLlvLQ9vX)
Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country.

[**But to win this fight and others, I need you on my team. Be among the first to throw your hat in the ring with me by making a Week 1 contribution to Elder for America PAC of $25 or more.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dae0cfab34be4496a61cd3787ee55c1f&_e=bf3aAOT3wwm6u62poBwa5Kr9OGbJulnSXkQJ9HEPSVsM9fI_m-o7lrARu7YUWlmjJsaGOyXmgUPoqK6dRYlbravwkg9Yuw2eYmx9TJpRn-09xcvvx7j9XF-87Ihp0tT0wr4pqBLeZyL6-TMH25CfyJ_P8HvxZkUsUyKYV_7VNLhtim6R5Jsnmgf-pQIrSa7aRURBaKSRPA4GhPxQKbQusus7oPQBZAGE7JAHTTbn2QMJhNNAh4lxu3wOe8COBUx6JrrhUe1DIiLlAkpf4OUfkN7h9TjJa8l2HilNXEgHQG6Y5YE1eafFAOCVSpMiDrLPK8wURlRhIgQRXG_8mBpgQo0_MWjOZot5ueinF5WmBcC2oxNzn1XXZUzP8aTWPV6qsY7o5wcSFbW4N8QSJLFCNU4aoV-K5ukgFIidRanow5iqWToFrrI5NhUn1ZJPbd-v)

**We have a country to save** – and with patriots like you on my team, _I know we can!_

Thanks,

Larry Elder

P.S. We have a long fight ahead of us to save our country, but this is the only chance there is to be a Week 1 supporter of Elder for America PAC. [**Will you stand alongside me in this fight from the beginning?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=dae0cfab34be4496a61cd3787ee55c1f&_e=bf3aAOT3wwm6u62poBwa5Kr9OGbJulnSXkQJ9HEPSVsM9fI_m-o7lrARu7YUWlmjJsaGOyXmgUPoqK6dRYlbravwkg9Yuw2eYmx9TJpRn-09xcvvx7j9XF-87Ihp0tT0wr4pqBLeZyL6-TMH25CfyJ_P8HvxZkUsUyKYV_7VNLhtim6R5Jsnmgf-pQIrSa7aRURBaKSRPA4GhPxQKbQusus7oPQBZAGE7JAHTTbn2QORjDMgmN0UT59c37hq9ezJETtYgkeZq_s_J0d0A08Q25_4C3LBaCAhvyo_H8ZtZYxTXJk1hj_D26FLE-fPKa2Jb1HeR2C78Wb5Yg9vbZm8-CZWVsfn_7aiENsL726G9nuYpYHh1Wjnrve32FR3fs5UTR8PTMG_glgGrgSN54okQJ7wGO2eJ4XdnDE3aznaMAa1xrp0E4YxQlZaGdJJS4hs)

Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated. Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers. Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist. I for one have had enough , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome. Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country. We have a country to save – and with patriots like you on my team, I know we can! Thanks, Larry Elder P.S. We have a long fight ahead of us to save our country, but this is the only chance there is to be a Week 1 supporter of Elder for America PAC. Thanks! -Larry | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee www.elderforamerica.com Don't want to receive any more of our emails:

| | Peter,

I wanted to make sure you saw the below message from our House Republican Conference Chairwoman, Elise Stefanik. She has a special and exclusive opportunity to join her and President Trump for a private dinner at Mar-a-Lago Club on January 11th. **This opportunity ends tonight at 11:59 PM, though, so make sure you[enter now to win a seat at the table](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=75723ad254&e=9920087750) before time expires.**

Semper fi,

Congressman Van Taylor

\----- Original Message -----
From: Elise Stefanik
Date: December 22, 2021
Subject: Dinner with Me & President Trump

Peter,

This is House Republican Conference Chairwoman Elise Stefanik. I'm glad to reach you!

I'm writing today because you’ve proven yourself as a TOP America First Patriot. This is a very special and exclusive opportunity.

**We've launched a contest to join me and President Trump for a private dinner at his Mar-a-Lago Club on January 11th!**

That’s right – one lucky winner will get to sit down at the table with President Trump.

_Dinner, a photo with President Trump, roundtrip travel to Palm Beach, and lodging will all be 100% covered!_
**[ORDER 1 RAFFLE TICKET - $50>>>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=4e728e3fc3&e=9920087750)
[ORDER 3 RAFFLE TICKETS - $150 >>>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=9d1ef57db3&e=9920087750)
[ORDER 10 RAFFLE TICKETS - $500 >>>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=88577c89a9&e=9920087750)**
Our nation is on a path to complete and total disaster under Joe Biden and the Democrats – I’m proud to be leading the charge to END this Far-Left insanity in Washington.

**My good friend President Trump and I are fighting to SAVE AMERICA in 2022!**

On January 11th, we’re going to discuss the America First movement, our plans to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi, and much more. It’s going to be an amazing evening.

[Enter now to win a seat at the table.](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=dc92444f68&e=9920087750) We’d love to have you join us.

Response needed by: Midnight
Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Voting rights are under attack, Peter.

Democrats hold the majority in both the House and the Senate, but Republicans are using the threat of a filibuster to block critical voting rights legislation.

There is no reason voting rights should be a partisan issue. The right to vote is provided to us by the Constitution.

But Republicans across the country are using their power to roll back protections for our constitutional rights. They know they can’t win elections the fair way, so they’d rather suppress votes than win over the hearts and minds of the American people.

**Even right here in Colorado, Republicans have tried to destroy mail-in voting and create archaic voting restrictions. They even went so far as to try to allow any voter to demand a recount in any local election.**

While Republicans were working to destroy voting access, I was doing just the opposite. In the State House, I passed a multilingual ballot access so voters who don’t read English well can still easily participate in our elections. When I’m in Congress I will continue to fight for voting rights.

**So today, I want to make my voice heard loud and clear: the Senate cannot delay any longer. They must come together and pass protections for our voting rights by whatever means possible.**

Are you with me? Take my quick poll to tell me more about where you stand on this important issue for Colorado and our country.
Do you agree that the Senate must take action to protect voting rights?
****[I AGREE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40399336/324182247/-2041462027?refcode=ea.c88ed9ce-876e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.c88ed9ce-876e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODhlZDljZS04NzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4piQ79HOvNQRchHHsz55MGm0j-dqwOpAWfPSn8DrewU=&emci=b4457802-7b6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c88ed9ce-876e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12666102)****

clean_body: We need your input >>> | | | To support relief efforts for those affected by the Boulder County fires at the end of last year, please. DO YOU AGREE, Peter: The Senate must do everything they can to defend voting rights. | ** Response needed by: Midnight Survey for: dpwillis67@gmail.com Voting rights are under attack, Peter. Democrats hold the majority in both the House and the Senate, but Republicans are using the threat of a filibuster to block critical voting rights legislation. There is no reason voting rights should be a partisan issue. The right to vote is provided to us by the Constitution. But Republicans across the country are using their power to roll back protections for our constitutional rights. They know they can’t win elections the fair way, so they’d rather suppress votes than win over the hearts and minds of the American people. Even right here in Colorado, Republicans have tried to destroy mail-in voting and create archaic voting restrictions. They even went so far as to try to allow any voter to demand a recount in any local election. While Republicans were working to destroy voting access, I was doing just the opposite. In the State House, I passed a multilingual ballot access so voters who don’t read English well can still easily participate in our elections. When I’m in Congress I will continue to fight for voting rights. So today, I want to make my voice heard loud and clear: the Senate cannot delay any longer. They must come together and pass protections for our voting rights by whatever means possible. Are you with me? Take my quick poll to tell me more about where you stand on this important issue for Colorado and our country. Do you agree that the Senate must take action to protect voting rights? Thanks for your support, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | | = = ****Learn more at:** Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . ****If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.******

clean_body: See what the buzz is all about. = That’s right, folks – It’s not looking good for MAGA loyalist and Trump-endorsed Mike Garcia. = Earlier this month, California's citizens' redistricting commission voted 14-0 to approve our new congressional map, resulting in a HUGE win for Democrats — despite Garcia’s push for a better GOP advantage. The non-partisan election forecasters at The Cook Political Report have called our district, now CA-27, a “TOSS UP.” We’re ready to flip CA-27 and send Quaye to Congress, but we need your help. = | = = = Republicans only need 5 seats to take back the House, and we have a unique opportunity to unseat Mike Garcia. President Biden won this district by 10 points, and now our predicted margin has increased, favoring Democrats by 12 points. It may not seem like much, but it’s important to remember that in 2020 Garcia only won by a razor-thin margin of 333 votes. Quaye is the leader we deserve — and he is our best shot at flipping this district. But we can’t do this without you. That’s what it’s going to take to bring the disastrous, socialist, open borders Democrat agenda to a screeching halt - and set up the opportunity to retake the White House in 2024. I’m writing to you today because you’ve proven yourself as a TOP America First MAGA Patriot. This is a very special and exclusive opportunity.

**This is your last chance to****join me and President Trump for a private dinner****at his Mar-a-Lago Club on January 11th!**

body:
I will not tolerate liars, far-right extremism, or those who want to destroy our democracy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40399542/324192494/-363952900?refcode=BLU-DDC-20220105-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDkwODlkYi04YjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8skQcc7u8x0XGW3ku9gQBaytWw2l3hkV-U7cGyyBW1c=)

| I’ve heard some folks say recently that I'm too hard on GOP extremists who follow Trump’s every move. But here’s the thing: nice won't win.

My opponent, Paul Gosar, has incited an insurrection, spread deadly misinformation about the pandemic, and threatened violence against a colleague and our democracy. And just recently, Gosar told anti-vaxxers to “stay the course,” even though reports have suggested he has received the vaccine.

clean_body: I will not tolerate liars, far-right extremism, or those who want to destroy our democracy. | = | I’ve heard some folks say recently that I'm too hard on GOP extremists who follow Trump’s every move. But here’s the thing: nice won't win. My opponent, Paul Gosar, has incited an insurrection, spread deadly misinformation about the pandemic, and threatened violence against a colleague and our democracy. And just recently, Gosar told anti-vaxxers to “stay the course,” even though reports have suggested he has received the vaccine. I will not tolerate liars, far-right extremism, or those who want to destroy our democracy. I have been and will always be blunt in order to replace white supremacist Paul Gosar and ensure Arizona has the leadership it deserves. = | = Thank you for standing with me, Delina * | | = Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress Delina DiSanto for Congress PO Box 4809 Cave Creek, AZ 85327 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

These days mark the year to the death of the Terrorist Soleimani of which the 45th President ordered his execution.

I mention this because other credible sources from Israel state that with satellite images... the world can now see that Iran had built UNDERGROUND tunnels – A CITY OF BALLISTIC MISSLES with hundreds of thousands of them that can reach the Holy Land of Israel.

_**"This is a realistic threat more than nuclear weapons,"**_ the news source states.

subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene fined again for refusing to wear mask on the House floor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.
---- Begin forwarded message ----
From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers
Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
Marcus for Georgia

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: We need a wealth tax, and we need it now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It's unacceptable to have a country where the ultra-wealthy are raking in millions while working people suffer.
#
Peter, this just in:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220105?refcode=em20220105-933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&refcode2=933_420207_drv5mZ&akid=933%2E420207%2Edrv5mZ)
And if you thought it couldn't possibly get worse:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220105?refcode=em20220105-933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=933_420207_drv5mZ&akid=933%2E420207%2Edrv5mZ)
These headlines make it crystal clear: **We need a wealth tax, and we need it now.** That's why Pramila and Elizabeth Warren introduced the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act that would tax those with net worths over $50 million — that's the top 0.05% of households — so the ultra-wealthy finally start paying their fair share.
[**If you're still with Pramila in the fight for a long-overdue wealth tax so we can invest in our communities, can you chip in $3 to fuel her work — and our grassroots organizing — to make it law?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220105?refcode=em20220105-933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=933_420207_drv5mZ&akid=933%2E420207%2Edrv5mZ)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220105?refcode=em20220105-933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=933_420207_drv5mZ&akid=933%2E420207%2Edrv5mZ)**
The wealth tax that Pramila and Senator Warren are proposing would bring in **three trillion dollars** over ten years! Just imagine what we could do with that money in our communities. That's health care, education, bold investments in renewable energy, affordable housing, and so much more.
It's unacceptable to have a country where the ultra-wealthy are raking in millions while working people suffer. [**If you agree with Pramila that we need to finally tax the ultra-millionaires and billionaires in this country, chip in $3 and help her keep fighting to get this done.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20220105?refcode=em20220105-933&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=933_420207_drv5mZ&akid=933%2E420207%2Edrv5mZ)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220105-933-footer&t=24&refcode2=933_420207_drv5mZ&akid=933%2E420207%2Edrv5mZ)**

clean_body: It's unacceptable to have a country where the ultra-wealthy are raking in millions while working people suffer. Peter, this just in: And if you thought it couldn't possibly get worse: These headlines make it crystal clear: We need a wealth tax, and we need it now. That's why Pramila and Elizabeth Warren introduced the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act that would tax those with net worths over $50 million — that's the top 0.05% of households — so the ultra-wealthy finally start paying their fair share. The wealth tax that Pramila and Senator Warren are proposing would bring in three trillion dollars over ten years! Just imagine what we could do with that money in our communities. That's health care, education, bold investments in renewable energy, affordable housing, and so much more. It's unacceptable to have a country where the ultra-wealthy are raking in millions while working people suffer. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

That’s because redistricting has **SUPERCHARGED **our chances of retaking this seat! [**KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=a9a97948188b40dda34f80ce3dea4b58&_e=rRLvblDYJvjlBUT2rLp_WcfNFQgANIV36Lx6CPCe5MtW9eZTpSvJdCT4zUFK0G795xSFdyntBMmXaXXU3d9PrVL0hu-isYHW3DQeOfwFp5OryOdYh9_Imgx6_kwQXS8uw4iwfH63Oot291ttlqPwqTZjEMTKFKeY2h_Pet9sJ6T_MS3hv6-rUVUokTYWDKbB5UV6vdD74kM0SKh3wFQ57gm4nhYc0mRg9VcdyArk5pVCwv0_CRdjW8E3DskPKWeM2L9JN6G5zgsUrjgQJQdt_dfUesPTyt-zvyzpesvHqBMvV5bOur-AiSKWhv_XutTkE6Sol5iUVLLkIxc9ho64Y9XSl2YimHYG6ilHrwMaI8ecoQbAt4wFJ5p_wpEe6jUjqaHMtQJd6AomLw0IR0R3CTzjPOrSR0AMeo-_6hMGffAQYQau-3QripxT7eplXHAS0FeW5YfThunIgjD9nRRtx4YR7AdQ6-jjkSV0w7q1j2c%3D) Here's what the press is saying...

Peter,
---
Poll after poll in 2021 showed us that Americans were no longer optimistic about the future of our country.
---
**_Sadly, for far too many, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have crushed the American Dream._**
---
But there is reason to have hope in 2022 – this is the year we will take back Congress with pro-Trump patriots like Navy SEAL Eric Greitens! But first, we must ensure our platform focuses on what matters most to grassroots Americans.
---
_That’s why as the National Chair of Eric’s MUST-WIN U.S. Senate campaign, I’ve decided to commission a survey to see what matters most to YOU._

clean_body: This survey is our foundation for taking back Congress in November. | Peter, Poll after poll in 2021 showed us that Americans were no longer optimistic about the future of our country. Sadly, for far too many, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have crushed the American Dream. But there is reason to have hope in 2022 – this is the year we will take back Congress with pro-Trump patriots like Navy SEAL Eric Greitens! But first, we must ensure our platform focuses on what matters most to grassroots Americans. That’s why as the National Chair of Eric’s MUST-WIN U.S. Senate campaign, I’ve decided to commission a survey to see what matters most to YOU. name: Marisa Wood
subject: I need your endorsement -- now more than ever.
body:
I’m in this fight -- on the eve of the Jan. 6 anniversary -- because we can’t stand by while McCarthy allows QAnon-followers like Marjorie Taylor Greene to invade Washington. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40399902/324199941/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhZjQzYy05MjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJqw45SOv730HkDFswNawbMnHm3iXe0s2umFX5DCiy0=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c8f0d42a-8c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/c56af43c-926e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhZjQzYy05MjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJqw45SOv730HkDFswNawbMnHm3iXe0s2umFX5DCiy0=&id=124172018)._ Big news, friend.

**Yesterday, we got word that one of our primary opponents has suspended their campaign for Congress in this district.**

This is great news because it means we’re one step closer to unifying the Democratic vote in this race. But it’s a stark reminder that taking on a deeply-entrenched Republican like Kevin McCarthy is no easy task. I’m sure my primary opponent would agree.

**So today, I wanted to write and let you know that I’m staying in this fight, and I’m not backing down.**

**I’m in this fight** because our Central Valley district is being left behind while Kevin McCarthy is busy defending Trump and jockeying for a leadership position in the House.

**I’m in this fight** because we need an advocate for our communities -- not a puppet for corporate special interests.

**And I’m in this fight** \-- on the eve of the Jan. 6 anniversary -- because we can’t stand by while McCarthy allows QAnon-followers like Marjorie Taylor Greene to invade Washington.

**I’m not going anywhere, and right now I need to know you're with me because the more support we gather early on, the better our chances are of beating McCarthy:**

**[Will you click here to say you officially endorse my campaign? Today, I'd love to see your name with the hundreds of other endorsements we've received from grassroots supporters across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40399903/324199942/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhZjQzYy05MjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJqw45SOv730HkDFswNawbMnHm3iXe0s2umFX5DCiy0=&emci=c8f0d42a-8c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c56af43c-926e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=21170704)** | **[Endorse Marisa](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40399904/324199943/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhZjQzYy05MjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJqw45SOv730HkDFswNawbMnHm3iXe0s2umFX5DCiy0=&emci=c8f0d42a-8c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c56af43c-926e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=21170704)**
---

This goes without saying but I'm not a politician, and I never dreamed of running for Congress, especially after being a teacher for more than two decades.

But I need you to understand something: My kiddos and their families are hurting. I had to do something to leave this community better off for everyone -- and that starts with taking on Kevin McCarthy.

Now I need you to step up too. I need to know you support this campaign. Together, I know we can create the change that we need to see here in the Central Valley and beyond.

**[I'd love to have your endorsement, friend -- let me know you're with me>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40399905/324199944/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTZhZjQzYy05MjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJqw45SOv730HkDFswNawbMnHm3iXe0s2umFX5DCiy0=&emci=c8f0d42a-8c6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c56af43c-926e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=21170704)**

Thank you,

Marisa Wood
Teacher for US Congress

Friend,

We’ve been excited to see an outpouring of support from conservatives standing with us to **turn Georgia RED and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority.**

But Friend, the Democrats have responded by making Georgia their number one priority. They’re raising tens of millions of dollars to accomplish their goal.

Destroying our economy

Peter

2022 has started off in economic shambles. Inflation is at the highest level in 40 years and shelves across the country are empty thanks to complete failures from Joe Biden and the radical left Congress Socialist policies.

Prices have skyrocketed for ALL Americans, basic necessities are becoming more and more unaffordable, and Joe Biden wants to pass more tax and spend bills through Congress. The American people are struggling every day because of the effects of Bidenflation, and we need a Congress that will hold this failed administration in check.

Although this year may be starting out in shambles, with YOUR support we will take back the House and slam the brakes on Joe Biden’s failed presidency.

Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or even $25 today so we can beat the Left’s socialist agenda and make our country affordable again>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-1-5-22?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast15)

subject: Can we send you a sticker?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
We designed this exclusive sticker to celebrate the recent launch of Erica’s historic campaign to represent the North Carolina 2nd District.
#
Have you seen our brand new campaign sticker?
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32701?t=1&akid=745%2E3698%2EY6EKxj)
[**_So many grassroots supporters have already donated to get one — but we don’t see your name on the list! Before we run out, chip in_**** _any_****amount** **to help cover the printing + shipping costs, and we’ll send one straight to your mailbox!**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32701?t=2&akid=745%2E3698%2EY6EKxj)
**[Get your sticker →](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32702?refcode=em20220105-745&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=745%2E3698%2EY6EKxj)**
**We designed this exclusive sticker to celebrate the recent launch of Erica’s historic campaign to represent the North Carolina 2nd District.** This seat is wide-open, and it’s one of the only “toss-up” House races in the entire country.
We have a golden opportunity to elect a new champion for working people to Congress. It’s going to take one of us, for all of us, to win — _and that’s Erica_.
**We hope you can put this sticker on your laptop, water bottle, phone care (or wherever you want) to show you’ve been on Team Erica since day one!**
[**_For a limited time, if you make a donation to our campaign, and we’ll send you this brand new sticker. Every contribution will help power our efforts to send Erica to Congress, where she will fight for working families in NC-02 and beyond_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32701?t=4&akid=745%2E3698%2EY6EKxj)[.](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32701?t=5&akid=745%2E3698%2EY6EKxj)

Team Erica Smith

name: Morgan Harper HQ
subject: This is who we’re up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The most important things we learned from The Washington Post’s profile of J.D. Vance.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220105-497-footer-ak&t=2&akid=497%2E90090%2ETHVug4)
**Did you see this _Washington Post_ article on J.D. Vance?**
[****](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19531?t=3&akid=497%2E90090%2ETHVug4)
**Here’s the TL;DR about what makes J.D. Vance so dangerous****:**
**❌** J.D. Vance is not consistent — he went from being a never-Trumper to supporting Trump in the blink of an eye — and he does it all as part of his opportunistic play for U.S. Senate. He’ll do or say anything for that very reason.
❌ _“So long as we’re trailblazing on diversity, equity and inclusion,” Vance complained, “it doesn’t matter if normal people get screwed.”_
❌ He has close ties to the billionaire Peter Thiel and has already received a $10 million donation from Peter Thiel through a pro-Vance super PAC.
❌ **He could very well be on the ballot this November and could even make it to the general election.**
[**_Can you rush a donation to our team right now so we can combat J.D. Vance’s outlandish and dangerous campaign for U.S. Senate?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19531?t=4&akid=497%2E90090%2ETHVug4)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19726?refcode=em20220105-497&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=497%2E90090%2ETHVug4)**
J.D. Vance exemplifies a candidate who will say and do anything to be elected, and that shows that he doesn’t really care about the working families of Ohio.
Morgan is committed to fighting for everyday Ohioans, and for policies that will actually help folks, like a minimum wage increase, student loan debt cancellation, passing the PRO Act, and more.
**_[If you’re with us, chip in a donation of any amount right now. We’ve got to come out strong against J.D. Vance in 2022.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19531?t=24&akid=497%2E90090%2ETHVug4)_ **
Together,
Morgan Harper HQ
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220105-497-footer&t=25&refcode2=497_90090_THVug4&akid=497%2E90090%2ETHVug4)**

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Greg Abbott’s first television ads (NEWS)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Greg Abbott is buying his first TV ads. How we respond today is critical.
#
Greg Abbott is _officially_ going up on air with his very first TV ads.
The news reports indicate they’re going to blanket the _entire_ state with these ads — a move that could cost millions in a big state like Texas.
We started this race with $0 when Greg Abbott already had $55 million.
It’s true that they can advertise earlier and more than us at this point. But, we have the power to change that if we pick up the pace on grassroots donations right now.
[**Donate $3 now to counter Greg Abbott’s influx of TV ad money. Every dollar helps us inch closer so that we don’t get drastically outspent.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/51536?refcode=ema20220105-170173&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=170173%2E444211%2EKRz5EI)

Let’s show Greg Abbott what we’re made of today. Yes, he’s got tens of millions of dollars from special interests and big business in the bank. But, we’ve got something better: hundreds of thousands of energetic and savvy donors and volunteers all across the country. Together, Team Beto can go toe-to-toe against Abbott’s Big Money — and win.
Thanks for everything,
Team Beto

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Why aren’t politicians talking about this?
body:
Ghoulish Hi there, Why aren’t politicians talking about Medicare for All in the middle of a pandemic? [**I am the only candidate in my race for Congress who supports Medicare for All. Can you chip in $3 now to help me win against my pharma-funded opponent?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40400076/324200735/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjVjNTM5My05ODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ki_4gXcE_2i_7VvdAW9ziH2xdQos3WQTJfTkrWBljjU=) People are going bankrupt and becoming homeless because of Covid medical bills — now would be a good time for Democrats to pass Medicare for All. Instead Democrats are arguing about process. Democratic leaders refuse to even vote on Medicare for All, but last December’s Covid relief bill included money for Covid funerals and easily passed both chambers of Congress. This is essentially Congress funding death and not life. It’s ghoulish. We urgently need Medicare for All. I served on the board of an organization fighting for single-payer healthcare in Washington State and appeared in a Medicare for All documentary. I’m committed to this fight, but I need your help to take this to Congress. In Congress, I’ll combine my elected position with direct action to fight for Medicare for All, because simply asking nicely and saying “please” isn’t working. [**My Democratic opponent is funded with big money from Big Pharma and health insurance companies — but I don’t take ANY corporate money. If you can, please chip in $3 now, so I can fight for Medicare for All in clean_body: Ghoulish Hi there, Why aren’t politicians talking about Medicare for All in the middle of a pandemic? = People are going bankrupt and becoming homeless because of Covid medical bills — now would be a good time for Democrats to pass Medicare for All. Instead Democrats are arguing about process. Democratic leaders refuse to even vote on Medicare for All, but last December’s Covid relief bill included money for Covid funerals and easily passed both chambers of Congress. This is essentially Congress funding death and not life. It’s ghoulish. We urgently need Medicare for All. I served on the board of an organization fighting for single-payer healthcare in Washington State and appeared in a Medicare for All documentary. I’m committed to this fight, but I need your help to take this to Congress. In Congress, I’ll combine my elected position with direct action to fight for Medicare for All, because simply asking nicely and saying “please” isn’t working. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = One-third of Covid deaths have been due to lack of healthcare. That’s roughly 265,000 people. This is unconscionable, and we need Medicare for All. subject: Statement from Rob Astorino
body:
\--- Gov. Kathy Hochul's State of the State Address. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=655a38bbb5&e=3ca66fc65a)
---

---
| **STATEMENT FROM REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR GOVERNOR ROB ASTORINO **
**ON GOV. KATHY HOCHUL'S STATE OF THE STATE ADDRESS**
"The lack of self-awareness and the level of denialism in this speech was really something else. The 40-minute monologue inspired no confidence and no honest accounting. Much as she said she was unaware of the many Cuomo scandals during the past seven years she served as his right hand, she is now pleading ignorance to the pain she has directly
caused New Yorkers. For instance, she correctly states that 'we simply don't have enough health care workers' to deal with COVID but fails to mention she created that crisis by forcing out 34,000 skilled health care workers over her unscientific vaccine mandate.

What New Yorkers needed today was an honest accounting of the failures of the state and a bold and substantive path forward. What we received instead was retread rhetoric and cringe level-cliches we've heard a million times. When I become Governor, I will pull this state out of the rotten pit it is in and put us back on the road to success, prosperity and freedom.”
---

[ SUPPORT ROB ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=76c58814ae&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=d86b1c85ae&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: This is what people power looks like 💪💪💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
All signs are pointing to the fact that ours will be the most competitive and expensive race in the country in 2022.
#
**Hey Derek — it's John + Gisele. And we wanted to pass along a simple (but super important) message: This is what people power looks like. 💪💪💪**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39942?refcode=ema20220105-4091&t=1&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)
It’s because of yinz that we just had ANOTHER record-breaking fundraising quarter. And that’s going to translate to a stronger campaign + bring us one step closer to flipping PA’s Senate seat 🔵
But here’s the thing... **probably the biggest mistake we could make right now is looking at these (truly amazing) numbers and thinking we’re all set for 2022.**
We’ve got 10 months left to go, Derek. That’s 10 months of scaling up our statewide operations and spreading out bold + inclusive Democratic message to voters. Another 10 months of competing against GOP frontrunner Dr. Oz, who’s dropping literal millions at a time _of his own cash_ on TV ads.
**_We need to go even bigger than before. And we know together, it’s possible._**
**[Derek, would you be willing to chip in your first donation of 2022 to help build the grassroots campaign that will flip this Senate seat blue in 2022? Gisele and I would be deeply grateful for any support you can send our way today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39942?refcode=ema20220105-4091&t=2&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39942?refcode=em20220105-4091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)**
**Thank you for believing in our campaign, and thank you for trusting in John to flip this Senate seat blue so we can deliver for working people across Pennsylvania.**
Your support means the world to us,
John + Gisele Fetterman ❤️
P.S. All signs are pointing to the fact that ours will be the most competitive and expensive race in the country in 2022. **[With that in mind, will you be among the first folks from 18326 to donate in 2022 so we can keep our foot on the gas? Thank you so much in advance.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39942?refcode=ema20220105-4091&t=22&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)** 🙏

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220105-4091-footer&t=23&refcode2=4091_434096_GQortF&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=4091%2E434096%2EGQortF)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

subject: Stop the Unconstitutional Mandates
body:

---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=456a8992d8&e=c2296cffff)
