clean_body: Your input is the key to our victory in 2022. | Friend, I was just on Fox and Friends yesterday morning discussing the many ways the Biden-Harris administration and Nancy Pelosi failed you in 2021. Simply put, we don’t need a mandatory booster shot to fix America, we NEED a booster wall. But while the radical Left goes on its out-of-touch socialist crusade, I’m going directly to grassroots patriots like YOU to form our campaign’s strategy for victory this election year. That’s why to kick off 2022, I’ve commissioned my very own Election Year Priorities Survey to get your input on the critical matters that will decide the fate of our race for Texas’ new seat – and consequently, the fate of the entire House majority. The next time I go on Fox and Friends, I want to show the country just how many Americans were a part of forming our campaign's winning platform. Election Year Priorities Survey Participant: dpwillis67@gmail.com Submission Status:[Pending] Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress P.S. | | Dear Fellow American, American civics education, and specifically the teaching of American history, is at a crisis point. In K-12 schools nationwide, false narratives are being constructed, and content is being cherry-picked to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. Maybe you’ve even seen this happening in your local schools. As a result, we are faced with a choice: will we allow our children to be indoctrinated using curricula developed by anti-American ideologues and promoted by Left-wing education bureaucrats? Or will we insist that our children are taught honestly, using a curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation’s history? We must insist on the **latter** , both for the sake of truth and for the sake of our children and America’s future. For this reason, we have produced the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** —and I’m writing to ask your help in promoting this curriculum to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide. **What is the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum? ** The**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. This curriculum has been designed not by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College—and we are making it available **free of charge**. To be clear, the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** is not a _slap-dash_ response to the efforts of anti-American ideologues to indoctrinate our children. It is a 2,000-page, 85-lesson curriculum based on decades of studying American history. Developed over 18 months of intense and focused effort, its roots extend as far back as the beginning of Hillsdale College in 1844. And we need your help to make the **Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum** available to educators, homeschool families, and concerned citizens nationwide...and to make it available **free of charge** so that it will have the greatest impact. _We have set a budget goal of $400,000 to promote the**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** and our other outreach efforts—including _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and our classical K-12 charter school initiative. _ That’s an ambitious budget, and we need to get started as soon as possible. One reason why your support really matters: **Hillsdale College refuses to accept one penny in taxpayer support—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans**. This makes our work uniquely dependent on the support of citizens like you—citizens who agree with Hillsdale’s mission on behalf of liberty. We remind ourselves daily of Hillsdale’s 177-year-old mission—to provide “sound learning” of the kind needed to preserve “the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty.” With that mission in mind, we produced the **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum** —and now we need your help to promote it nationwide. Will you take this opportunity to _**support the Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum and our other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?**_ Understanding that a proper education is vital to the preservation of liberty—and that the anti-American indoctrination now being forced on too many American children poses an existential threat to liberty—I hope you will make your most generous tax-deductible gift today. **I’ve included a secure link for your convenience here: ** _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=144227&L=77406&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL3N1cHBvcnQtaGlsbHNkYWxlLTE3NzYtY3VycmljdWx1bT91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTE3NzZfY3VycmljdWx1bSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9LZWxsaVdhcmQwMTA1MjAyMiZzYz1NSzEwMjFFTTI=)**_ Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to hearing from you. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
|
---

---

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Washington has failed us.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
While we’re facing crises from climate change to attacks on the right to vote or reproductive freedom, the Senate has failed to act.
#

While we’re facing crises from climate change to attacks on the right to vote or reproductive freedom, the Senate has failed to act.
People are tired of the division and gridlock, and it must end. That is why we must win this race in North Carolina to expand our majority.
We need leaders who will honestly serve as a voice for working people — who will fight tooth and nail to improve our lives and create a prosperous and healthy future for the next generation. That is what I pledge to do as your next Senator, but first, I need your support to win this race.
**[Will you please make a $3 contribution to our campaign today to help us flip North Carolina? Super PACs are going to spend limitless sums of money trying to buy this seat, and we must stop them.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220105-1-subs&refcode2=237.357359.Q0IwZU&t=1&akid=237%2E357359%2EQ0IwZU)**
Throughout my life, I have sought truth and justice at times when it was hardest to find. As a judge and Chief Justice, I saw the way policies handed down by Washington failed our families.
The truth is the status quo is broken because the system is rigged in favor of corporations and the wealthy and well-connected.
Our Republican opponents are proving every day that they will be more of the same. They would rather focus on baseless attacks and whichever extreme position they think will help them win their primary.
But if we come together and work hard, then I know we can win and deliver real progress and a prosperous and healthy future for all of our families.
**[It’s going to take all of us playing a role to win a race like this. So if you can, make a $3 contribution to help us win and give North Carolina a voice for the people and justice in the U.S. Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220105-1-subs&refcode2=237.357359.Q0IwZU&t=2&akid=237%2E357359%2EQ0IwZU)**
Thank you,
Cheri Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220105-1-subs&refcode2=237.357359.Q0IwZU&t=3&akid=237%2E357359%2EQ0IwZU)**

Raleigh, NC 27611

If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=237_357359_Q0IwZU&akid=237%2E357359%2EQ0IwZU) today to help us make history.

While we’re facing crises from climate change to attacks on the right to vote or reproductive freedom, the Senate has failed to act. People are tired of the division and gridlock, and it must end. That is why we must win this race in North Carolina to expand our majority. We need leaders who will honestly serve as a voice for working people — who will fight tooth and nail to improve our lives and create a prosperous and healthy future for the next generation. That is what I pledge to do as your next Senator, but first, I need your support to win this race. Throughout my life, I have sought truth and justice at times when it was hardest to find. As a judge and Chief Justice, I saw the way policies handed down by Washington failed our families. The truth is the status quo is broken because the system is rigged in favor of corporations and the wealthy and well-connected. Our Republican opponents are proving every day that they will be more of the same. They would rather focus on baseless attacks and whichever extreme position they think will help them win their primary. But if we come together and work hard, then I know we can win and deliver real progress and a prosperous and healthy future for all of our families. Thank you, Cheri Beasley Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

name: Mikayla Ridley
subject: We have plans for Defending and Strengthening Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mikayla Ridley for Congress
body:
| |
---
Dear Peter, The 2020 Presidential Election was the most contentious of our lifetimes. Democracy itself was at stake. But in that election, turnout was only about 67% of eligible voters. With so much at stake, so many Americans stayed home. For this country to be a great democracy, we have to start acting like it. Mikayla Ridley understands why 33% of people didn't vote: because voting in this country is unnecessarily difficult and so many people's needs aren't represented by the two major parties.
---
[ **Contribute** ](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/un0jM8-4zAycIyNFvrU07w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21yZW1haWxzP2NkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrJnJlZmNvZGUyPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWtXA3NwY0IKYdUVI9Zh_HFtJlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAFY~)
---
That's why one of Mikayla's major platforms is Defending and Strengthening our Democracy. Here's some of what she wants to do:
* [V](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/Qn_Tkj8MZLB3Y3LfFJCIiQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmlkbGV5Zm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tL2lzc3Vlcz9jZG1jPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrVwNzcGNCCmHVFSPWYfxxbSZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABW)[oting is a right](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/Qn_Tkj8MZLB3Y3LfFJCIiQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmlkbGV5Zm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tL2lzc3Vlcz9jZG1jPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrVwNzcGNCCmHVFSPWYfxxbSZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABW), so we should make it easier: make Election Day a federal holiday, automatically register citizens to vote when they turn 18, and expand access to early voting and no-excuse absentee voting.
* [We need to implement Instant-Runoff, ranked-choice voting](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/Qn_Tkj8MZLB3Y3LfFJCIiQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmlkbGV5Zm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tL2lzc3Vlcz9jZG1jPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrVwNzcGNCCmHVFSPWYfxxbSZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABW). So many people vote for the lesser of two evils, but what if we could rank the candidate we want without having to vote strategically? With ranked-choice voting, more candidates with a greater diversity of perspectives would run, and we would have the opportunity to vote for what we believe in rather than who we think might win.
* [We ](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/Qn_Tkj8MZLB3Y3LfFJCIiQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmlkbGV5Zm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tL2lzc3Vlcz9jZG1jPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrVwNzcGNCCmHVFSPWYfxxbSZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABW)[have to get corporate money out of our politics](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/Qn_Tkj8MZLB3Y3LfFJCIiQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SWaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucmlkbGV5Zm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MuY29tL2lzc3Vlcz9jZG1jPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlMj0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWsmcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrVwNzcGNCCmHVFSPWYfxxbSZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABW). Big donors have greater access to politicians, so they can put major pressure on Congress and the Senate to vote the way that they want. So the rich get access, but the middle class, the working class, and the poor don't have lobbyists or big checkbooks. Our elected officials must represent the people and not payouts.

There's even more: getting rid of the Electoral College system, which undermines democracy, and getting rid of the filibuster, which allows Senators who represent just 11% of Americans to vote as if they represent a majority. The last few years have shown us how essential it is to defend and strengthen our democracy. We need people like Mikayla Ridley in Congress to fight for it. To have her go to work on Capitol Hill, we need you. [Grassroots donations power this campaign forward; contribute your first or your next dollar amount today](http://clicksp.ridleyforcongress.com/f/a/un0jM8-4zAycIyNFvrU07w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRjuKgVP0SYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21yZW1haWxzP2NkbWM9MjM5Z3pyV2RnaHhIQUNLMXdrZURsYmpYNVVrJnJlZmNvZGUyPTIzOWd6cldkZ2h4SEFDSzF3a2VEbGJqWDVVayZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yMzlnenJXZGdoeEhBQ0sxd2tlRGxialg1VWtXA3NwY0IKYdUVI9Zh_HFtJlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAFY~). Thank you, The Team at Ridley for Congress
---

clean_body: | Friend, I’m ecstatic to tell you that a donor has reached out to me and said that because they’re so excited about Taking Back the House in 2022, they will match any donation made before MIDNIGHT 500%. I’m running in the closest House race in the country, and starting off January and 2022 with a BANG is so crucial. That’s why I’m only extending this offer to my most loyal supporters. UNLOCK 500% MATCHING BELOW ⬇️ ⬇️ Click or scan the QR code below! This isn’t going to last long, and I don’t know if we’ll ever have the opportunity to make such a major impact again. Just think, your $5 would make a $25 impact. Your $50 donation would mean $250 that we can use to support our campaign by stocking up on yard signs, buying food for volunteers, and spreading our conservative message across the district. In short, any cent you give will make 5X the impact to Fire Pelosi and Take Back the House! Take advantage while this lasts and use the code above to help me start 2022 right so we can Take Back the House! Thank you, Mariannette Miller-Meeks | Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. subject: Before Anything Else
body:
I just wanted to say thank you! |
---
| | [ ](https://cashaforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=50a6a6c04812360fd0aebd140&id=4052673dc8&e=ade10d3dbe)

| | Peter,
Before we get too far into 2022, I want to take a moment to thank you for your steadfast support of my campaign.

Choosing to run for Congress in one of New Jersey's most competitive congressional districts against a well-funded liberal puppet was not an easy decision. But, I knew North Jerseyans are ready to stop the madness.
---
| If last year's election taught us anything, it's that a red wave is coming to New Jersey. New Jersey families and businesses deserve a fighter that will stand strong for their best interests in Washington.

Thank you for joining in this important fight. This is just the beginning.

Sincerely,

Larry Casha
Candidate for Congress, NJ-11

name: Team AOC
subject: What matters most to you in 2022?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We want to know what matters most to you going into this election year. Take our priorities survey to let us know what your priorities are for our movement going into 2022.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220105-2726-header&t=1&akid=2726%2E2526796%2EE52XKQ)
**January marks six months until Alexandria’s primary election,** and this team is in an incredible position to start the next phase of this campaign strong. There’s still a ton of work ahead, but with your support, we’re feeling more hopeful and confident than ever.
**With that said, we want to make sure our priorities are aligned with yours going into this election year.**
[Will you take two minutes to complete our 2022 Team AOC Priorities Survey, and share with us what matters most to you going into this new year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/jan-priorities-survey-2022/?source=em20220105-2726-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=2&akid=2726%2E2526796%2EE52XKQ)
**[Take the survey](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/jan-priorities-survey-2022/?source=em20220105-2726-P_ENG_SUR_GRM&t=3&akid=2726%2E2526796%2EE52XKQ)**
When we launched this campaign going door-to-door in NY-14, we could never have imagined how these next four years would unfold. The political landscape is forever changed because of our victory, Alexandria’s voice, and the movement we’ve built together every day since.

| | Team,

Last week the Ohio Supreme Court heard legal challenges to the new Congressional map approved by GOP Governor Mike DeWine.

New court documents confirm what we’ve known all along: **this has always been a partisan scheme to take power away from the people.** The Ohio GOP sketched a map that hands 13 seats to Republicans. But get this: the redistricting committee used one data set to make an argument to Ohio’s people and another set for GOP stakeholders.

**[Republicans are playing games with our democracy, and it’s put our seat at risk. Will you send a $25 donation to let Republicans know their games have no place in Ohio?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux95buJyXKZqB0N7DK8ROOm3s51y9ZmV9e3noPw_LHa-loVDDYYoefAWqTJ3-oH954tBZBu9GVNKUbG1ShRO9ppRev26-AXl5Y2l4qAbDkmnI3B4mJT5eOC6yrrArBOVXPL0q3bo-ubcGNssZzQ0I7gZIqDttkulP_riOaRqDupg33Z3U-oyYgXlnClom2BEzDfp7khNx6Cn25GW1o2uKwfGVbEJyqoKnneBx0Shxe89PbM92KeDzIZ7Q_SRjGbKh28GYXHe6xa2aN0nqV0YvA7boHYG3RgO6WKJAym_0vxOdyOlL34Slcga6UJi7E_kD3Ynj_IPJESWlj4Iz5pM2nBkVP0GuyMZfxaLU-VhedPyI/3ig/xVP9mpcrTfC5VYJjHXVhEQ/h1/X8yCi1F2vQZAgL3W1ImyDbuRrIMwTITzhkEfypVvBeI)**

---

Governor DeWine promised Ohioans a **fair map**. Not only did he fail to deliver, but he approved a plan that:
* He knew would result in a lawsuit

* Blatantly violated our state constitution

Now that lawsuit is being heard by none other than his son, Ohio Supreme Court Justice Patrick DeWine.

**Team, everything is on the line.** Right-wing extremists want a House majority so bad, they’re throwing out the will of the people. But we are prepared to fight back in the courthouse and at the ballot box.

**[Republicans think they can just take whatever seat they want, but we live in a democracy. District maps must reflect the will of the people. Can you contribute $25 today to help us hold on to Marcy’s seat and maintain our progress in the House?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNXS5KvDi5wrxDE5VytOtCwVpc5i8Die8BmDyLxt2ux95buJyXKZqB0N7DK8ROOm3s51y9ZmV9e3noPw_LHa-loVDDYYoefAWqTJ3-oH954nDhIKxMTkneku7w96cbJCATTMcMSk1kwjLXyyKdtJODr8dGsGn6DX8GHXaP5G2HQjFtt22ZKagY1VuFFYeDY6HQndiq7QmV5KzSNqlUuRO5HCpk9e6cqiGGGuS4kFxyE3QIzS2umcW4nHZ1J-EGnEjqoXDb_6lZPKuSYANOz_tRDvQkQ3_bEA_OWBO0Lm0ymXkWpjXMFNdF-KC07CydqpFHwz2PhXCCIYkzTEtsCIAmdI2BccrvJ9aC5l6Ai7zPMYK-vJSeMAjCZj5a1s7vmPPA9b7Ywv2DcpkkpJq_IrF1/3ig/xVP9mpcrTfC5VYJjHXVhEQ/h3/pHoUkkwyEqAnS-fc-9f5cZqHAdGEPcETo5JfD3qrg48)**

Thank you for being with us,

********

clean_body: The Ohio Supreme Court has now heard the case on gerrymandered maps | \- Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, Last week the Ohio Supreme Court heard legal challenges to the new Congressional map approved by GOP Governor Mike DeWine. New court documents confirm what we’ve known all along: this has always been a partisan scheme to take power away from the people. The Ohio GOP sketched a map that hands 13 seats to Republicans. But get this: the redistricting committee used one data set to make an argument to Ohio’s people and another set for GOP stakeholders. | Governor DeWine promised Ohioans a fair map. Not only did he fail to deliver, but he approved a plan that: He knew would result in a lawsuit Blatantly violated our state constitution Now that lawsuit is being heard by none other than his son, Ohio Supreme Court Justice Patrick DeWine. Team, everything is on the line. Right-wing extremists want a House majority so bad, they’re throwing out the will of the people. But we are prepared to fight back in the courthouse and at the ballot box. Thank you for being with us, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. name: Charles Booker
subject: Rand’s Running for President?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Yesterday, Rand Paul officially announced he’s launching his re-election
campaign. But that’s not all – he’s already gearing up for a 2024
Presidential Run.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ][IMG]

I would laugh, but this is too serious. Kentucky can’t afford another six
years of Rand Paul, much less a Senator with one eye on his stock
portfolio and the other on the White House.

Don’t worry though, together we’re going to make sure this is the last
campaign that Rand Paul runs. After all, didn’t he pledge that he would
only run for two terms?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ][IMG]

That’s one pledge we’re going to make sure he keeps. Let’s send the
message loud and clear that this grassroots movement is rising up for bold
and progressive change this election. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ]Will you chip in $20.22 or
anything you can right now to power our campaign’s voter outreach and
organizing efforts this year?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ]Contribute $20.22

Our team wants to set a record for grassroots donations today so we can
continue growing our momentum and make sure we’re prepared for the
millions in dark money Rand’s friends are planning to spend in this race.

So if you can contribute today and represent Team Booker supporters
in 18326 it would mean the world to me.

Let’s do this,

Charles

P.S. In case you missed our email from yesterday, I’m including it below.
I hope you’ll take the time to read our message and the stakes in this
election.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

It’s official,
Peter.

This morning, Rand Paul officially announced he’s launching his
re-election campaign to represent Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for another
six years.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ][IMG]

That’s six more years of spreading conspiracy theories and lies that
undermine our democracy. Six more years of holding up legislation like the
9/11 Victims Compensation Fund and the Emmett Till Anti-Lynching Act. Six
more years of using his elected office to trade stocks using insider
knowledge.

Peter, our
country cannot afford six more years of Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1044&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ]Will you chip in $20.22 or anything you can right now to show Rand
Paul that this grassroots movement is rising up to replace him in 2022? We
have a real chance to flip Kentucky — but we’re relying on supporters like
you to power our voter outreach and organizing efforts.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1045&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ]Contribute $20.22

Rand has been representing Kentucky in the U.S. Senate for nearly a
decade. For more than 10 years, he’s had an incredible opportunity to
uplift Kentuckians and bring real change to our commonwealth.

But the only person who's benefited from Rand being in the Senate is Rand.
He’s consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs. And the sad truth is
that Kentucky has one of the worst records of voter disenfranchisement in
our country’s history which has allowed failed leaders like Rand to stay
in office.

He’s voted against policies that would protect our right to vote, protect
people with preexisting conditions, provide jobs for our communities, and
save lives. Especially now — in the midst of the COVID-19 pandemic — Rand
refuses to lift a finger for the record number of working families who are
struggling to make ends meet and instead whines on Twitter about how
“masks don’t work”.

It's time to elect someone who's the complete opposite of Rand Paul.

Someone who knows what it's like to not have enough money to feed his
family.
Someone who looks at his community and asks, "How can I help?"
Someone who isn't afraid to fight for the right thing even when it isn't
politically convenient.

That’s why we’re reaching out to ask you a favor,
Peter: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14448?refcode=em20220105-1417&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1046&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD- ]Can you please
chip in $20.22 or anything you can to our campaign right now? It’s
important we show the strength of our grassroots movement now that Rand
announced he’s running for re-election.

Together,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220105-1417-footer&t=1047&refcode2=1417_346206_v3jcD-&akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD-

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1417%2E346206%2Ev3jcD-

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
